title: Youtube Video Editor (1 SPOT LEFT)
description:

Our videos can range anywhere from 5 - 15 minutes, uploading a few times a week. Since our channel is face-less, You will need to cut both audio and video while adding entertaining b-roll content. 



Ideally, we are looking for somebody who is funny and can create interesting material. We are looking for someone LONG-TERM because we have huge goals for our channel to hit millions of subscribers so if you have youtube experience then that's a BIG plus. We're looking for somebody that wants to be a part of something that will positively impact MILLIONS of lives one day. You must be teachable and have the ability to work very fast, so if you are a quick learner and can perform the tasks that we ask, you will be compensated very well. We operate as a family here and we will all work together to hit our personal and professional GOALS. As long as you're able to perform HIGH-QUALITY WORK, you'll see that we are very EASY and FUN to work with. What are you waiting for? APPLY NOW because we literally get around 80 - 100 applicants per post and we HIRE VERY FAST.



We have access to Storyblocks, 
, VidIQ, Youtube courses, and many other resources equalling over $1000 USD (50,000PHP) that we will happily share with you if you are the right candidate. We will put our time and resources to invest in you to make sure that you will become a master in your craft and that you will be successful. 



Also, we will have monthly goals which if you help us hit them, we will give you an additional performance bonus of anywhere from $25 - $50/month  (1,250PHP-  2,500PHP) on top of the monthly pay



IF YOU CAN'T DO A VIDEO

title: Executve Assistant
description:
The Executive Administrative Assistant provides high-level administrative and operational support to senior executives, ensuring the efficient coordination of schedules, communications, and internal workflows. This role requires exceptional organizational ability, strong attention to detail, and the capability to manage confidential information with discretion.



The ideal candidate is proactive, highly resourceful, and comfortable managing multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment while supporting executive productivity and team collaboration.



Key Responsibilities



Executive Support

Manage and maintain executive calendars, including scheduling meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

Coordinate internal and external meetings, ensuring all logistics and materials are prepared in advance.

Prepare, edit, and format correspondence, reports, presentations, and other business documents.

Maintain confidentiality when handling sensitive information and communications.

Support executives in managing priorities, deadlines, and follow-ups.



Administrative Operations

Manage communications by screening and prioritizing
s, phone calls, and other inquiries.

Organize and maintain digital and physical records to ensure information remains accurate and easily accessible.

Assist in planning and coordinating special projects, company initiatives, and internal events.

Monitor tasks, deadlines, and deliverables using project management systems.



Project & Workflow Management

Utilize ClickUp to organize executive tasks, track progress, and ensure project deadlines are met.

Create, update, and manage task lists, workflows, and documentation within ClickUp.

Coordinate with tea
mbers to maintain clear visibility of priorities and project timelines.

Follow up on action items and ensure accountability across teams.



Meeting & Event Coordination

Schedule and organize meetings, including preparing agendas, documenting minutes, and tracking action items.

Coordinate meeting logistics such as conference rooms, virtual meeting links, catering, and equipment.

Ensure post-meeting follow-ups and task assignments are properly documented.



Stakeholder Communication

Serve as a liaison between executives and internal or external stakeholders.

Maintain professional relationships and ensure clear, timely communication.

Escalate urgent matters and ensure priority issues are addressed promptly.



Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Management, or a related field preferred.

Proven experience as an Executive Administrative Assistant or in a similar executive support role.

Strong proficiency in ClickUp or comparable project management tools.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook).

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Strong organizational, multitasking, and time-management abilities.

High level of discretion when handling confidential information.

Strong problem-solving ability and attention to detail.

Ability to work independently while collaborating effectively with cross-functional teams.



Preferred Skills

Experience managing workflows in ClickUp, Asana, 
, or similar platforms.

Familiarity with office management systems and administrative procedures.

Experience coordinating travel arrangements and managing expense reports.

Ability to support project tracking, documentation, and team collaboration tools.

title: Operations & Patient Coordination Manager-lead generation
description:
About Better Me Bariatrics



Better Me Bariatrics is a U.S.-based patient coordination and concierge business that helps Americans navigate the non-clinical logistics of bariatric surgery abroad.



We do not provide medical care.

We do not give medical advice.

We specialize in structure, clarity, and trust during a high-stakes life decision.



We are building a small, disciplined team focused on execution—not hype.



Role Overview



We are hiring a full-time remote Operations & Lead Generation Manager to serve as the execution backbone of the business.



This role combines:



Operational excellence (patient coordination, CRM, follow-ups)



Structured lead generation (outbound messaging, inbound handling)



This is not a sales role and not a generic VA role.



You will not close deals, not discuss medical topics, and not improvise messaging.



You will be accountable for:



Lead flow



Process reliability



Zero missed follow-ups



Clean systems



Key Responsibilities

1. Lead Generation  (Primary Growth Function)



Conduct daily outbound outreach using approved scripts



Engage in
 groups, Instagram DMs, Reddit, and



Start conversations using education-first, non-salesy messaging



Direct interested people to the intake form



Log all activity in the CRM



Target:

30–50 outbound messages/day

1–3 completed intake forms/day (once ramped)



2. Inbound Lead Handling



Respond promptly to website inquiries and social messages



Send intake forms



Track responses and follow-ups



Escalate only qualified leads to the founder



3. Patient Operations & Coordination



Manage intake documents and checklists



Track each patient’s stage in the CRM



Coordinate scheduling and logistics (non-clinical)



Ensure no patient is missed, delayed, or confused



4. Systems & Reporting



Maintain CRM accuracy



Follow SOPs exactly



Provide daily or weekly summaries



Flag risks, delays, or issues early



What You Will NOT Do



No medical advice



No discussing surgery outcomes



No quoting medical prices



No closing sales



No improvising scripts



These boundaries are non-negotiable.



Required Skills & Traits



Strong written English (clear, calm, professional)



Experience with operations, coordination, or BPO work



Comfortable with CRM tools and SOPs



Detail-oriented and organized



Able to follow rules exactly



Calm under pressure



Trustworthy with sensitive information



Healthcare, travel coordination, or customer success experience is a plus.



Location & Schedule



Remote



Full-time availability required



Some overlap with U.S. time zones is needed



Compensation



Base: $400–$1000 USD/month plus a closing bonus!!  (based on experience)



Performance bonuses tied to:



Qualified leads generated



Closed patients sourced



Long-term role with growth potential.



How to Apply



To apply, you must complete the screening test below.

Applications without completed answers will not be reviewed.







SCREENING TEST (MANDATORY)



Instructions:

Answer all questions clearly and honestly. There are no trick questions. We are testing judgment, clarity, and discipline.



Question 1: Writing & Tone



Rewrite the following message to sound calm, professional, and non-salesy:



“We help people get weight loss surgery in Mexico. It’s cheaper and safe. Let me know if you’re interested.”



Question 2: Boundary Awareness



A potential lead asks you:



“Can you tell me if this surgery is safe for someone with diabetes?”



How do you respond?



(Write the exact message you would send.)



Question 3: Lead Generation Judgment



You are in a
 group about weight loss. What is the best way to start a conversation without violating trust or group rules?



Describe your approach step by step.



Question 4: Process Discipline



If you notice that a patient has not replied for 3 days and their surgery date is approaching, what do you do?



List your steps.



Question 5: Attention to Detail



This role requires following rules exactly.



Please write the sentence below exactly as shown, including punctuation:



Better Me Bariatrics provides coordination services only and does not offer medical advice or treatment.



(Yes—this question is intentional.)



Final Instruction



At the end of your application, include this sentence so we know you read everything carefully:



"I understand that this role is about structure, trust, and execution—not sales or medical advice."



What We’re Looking For



We are not looking for the loudest applicant.

We are looking for the most precise.



If you are organized, disciplined, and serious about building something long-term, we want to hear from you.

title: Practice Administration Assistant
description:
Capstone Allied Health is a growing speech pathology practice based in Melbourne, Australia, providing services to children and adults with communication and swallowing disorders.



We are seeking a reliable and organised Practice Administrator (administrative assistant) to provide remote administrative support to the practice. This role is ideal for a detail-oriented individual who enjoys organisation, communication, and supporting healthcare professionals.



The successful candidate will assist with a variety of administrative tasks that support the daily operation of the practice and help ensure a smooth experience for clients and referring professionals.



This is a remote position.



POSITION DETAILS



Hours:  Approximately 10 hours per week initially, with the potential to increase as the practice grows.

Rate:  $8-$10 AUD per hour depending on experience. (thus 5-$6.50 USD/hour)

Location:  Remote

Work arrangement:  Independent Contractor



RESPONSIBILITIES

Responsibilities may include:

- Responding to client
 enquiries

- Assisting with onboarding of new clients and referrals

- Sending intake forms and documentation

- Scheduling appointments within the practice management system

- Uploading and organising client documentation

- Generating invoices and assisting with administrative financial processes

- Formatting reports and documents for clinician review

- Creating therapy resources and visual materials

- Assisting with organisation of practice documentation and templates

- Scheduling social media posts and assisting with basic content preparation



All clinical documentation will be reviewed and approved by the speech pathologist prior to being sent to clients.



REQUIRED SKILLS:

- Excellent written English

- Strong attention to detail

- Professional
 communication skills

- Strong organisational ability

- Ability to work independently and manage time effectively

- Reliable internet connection

- Ability to maintain strict confidentiality





PREFERRED EXPERIENCE

The following experience would be beneficial but is not essential:

- Healthcare administration

- Disability or NDIS services

- Experience with practice management software

- Experience with Google Workspace

- Canva or basic design experience



IMPORTANT

Because this role involves handling sensitive client information, the successful applicant must demonstrate professionalism, reliability, and strict confidentiality.



HOW TO APPLY:

Please submit:

1. A brief introduction about yourself

2. Your CV, including your relevant experience

3. Why you think you are suited to this role

4. Please confirm that you are comfortable working within this hourly range. 

5. Your availability

6. Please tell us about one system or workflow you have improved in a previous administrative role.



To confirm that you have read the full job description, please include the phrase “Capstone” at the beginning of your application.

title: SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Flexi Schedule
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflo

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Full-Time Video Editor
description:
About Us

Network is a Singapore-based platform that helps homeowners plan their renovation with clarity and confidence. We create content, offer real renovation cost guides, and match homeowners with trusted interior designers based on their needs.

Our visual style is cinematic, premium, and story-driven — we create content that helps homeowners connect emotionally to design while showing interior designers in their best light.



What We're Looking For

We're looking for skilled video editors who can bring cinematic polish to our content. Our edits need to feel premium, modern, and structured — not like casual TikTok cuts, but like mini-commercials and branded explainers. Every video should tell a story with a clear beginning, middle, and end (Hook ? Lead-in ? Body ? Payoff).

You'll be editing for interior design clients and our own branded content. This means your work will be aesthetic, cinematic, and story-driven — helping homeowners connect emotionally to design while showing IDs in their best light.



Key Responsibilities

- Edit raw footage into polished deliverables following SOPs

- Ensure color grading, sound, and pacing match our brand style

- Deliver two main categories:

Cinematic, high-production edits (Showcases, Explainers)

Short-form organic edits (Tips, Hot Takes, Relatable skits)

- Collaborate with directors for feedback and alignment

- Meet deadlines consistently

- Daily check-ins (10 AM SGT) for campaign/creative reviews and task delegation

- Daily check-outs (8 PM SGT) for reporting results and reviewing outputs



Requirements

Technical Skills:

- Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro & DaVinci Resolve

- Strong portfolio showing cinematic/commercial-style edits

- Ability to apply cinematic color grading

- Comfortable mixing audio - balancing voice, music, and ambient sound

- Can design and animate minimal overlays/text aligned to brand identity



Key Traits:

- Strong sense of pacing and rhythm

- Understands how to edit for maximum retention (grabbing attention in first 3 seconds)

- Ability to make self-directed creative choices that improve overall content

- Attention to detail in timing, text placement, shot selection, and rhythm

- Collaborative mindset and responsive to feedback

- Reliable with deadlines



Work Arrangement

Schedule: No fixed working hours, but must be available for daily updates and campaign reviews

Daily Check-In: 10 AM SGT for campaign/creative reviews and task delegation

Daily Check-Out: 8 PM SGT for reporting results and reviewing outputs

Communication: Slack for daily updates and reporting; Google Drive/Dropbox for file transfer

Turnaround Times: Half a day for short-form content, 1 day for cinematic edits

description:

This role will initially be project-based, with the potential for longer-term collaboration if the partnership is a good fit.



We are looking for someone with strong branding experience, ideally with work related to retail, food, beverage, or coffee brands.



Responsibilities

• Develop and execute brand design concepts

• Create visual assets for marketing campaigns and digital platforms

• Contribute to brand identity development and visual guidelines

• Design materials for retail, packaging, and in-store branding

• Collaborate with our internal team to maintain brand consistency

• Provide creative input and design direction when needed



Requirements

• Minimum 5 years experience in graphic design or art direction

• Strong portfolio showcasing branding and identity work

• Experience working with retail, food, beverage, or coffee brands preferred

• Strong skills in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign)

• Strong understanding of typography, layout, and brand systems

• Ability to communicate clearly in English



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience working with consumer brands

• Experience designing packaging or retail environments

• Ability to think strategically about brand storytelling and design systems



To Apply

Please include the following in your application:

Link to your portfolio (required)

A short introduction about your branding experience

Examples of projects related to food, beverage, retail, or coffee brands

Your expected project rate or design rate



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.

title: Urgent Financial Analyst with General Admin Experience
description:
We are urgently seeking a highly analytical and detail-oriented Financial Analyst to support our CEO and Finance/Accounting Team. This role will work closely with our current Financial Analyst and assist in driving financial insights, forecasting, reporting, and strategic analysis across the organization.



This is a work from home position ideal for a finance professional with strong modeling skills and experience supporting senior leadership.



Key Responsibilities

* Evaluate overall financial performance, including key drivers and KPIs

* Build, maintain, and enhance financial and sales models for budgeting, forecasting, and performance measurement

* Assist in establishing and maintaining financial dashboards for senior management and business partners

* Develop weekly, monthly, and quarterly productivity and realization reports across active engagements

* Manage and analyze the firm’s revenue pipeline (prospective, current, and won engagements) across multiple practice lines

* Conduct ad hoc financial analysis and provide actionable recommendations to address emerging business challenges

* Support the development and maintenance of 3-statement financial models for forecasting, M&A activities, and strategic investments



Qualifications & Experience

* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or related field

* 5+ years of experience in financial analysis, FP&A, corporate finance, or related role

* Strong experience with financial modeling, including 3-statement models

* Experience with budgeting, forecasting, and KPI tracking

* Advanced proficiency in Excel (required); experience with financial planning tools is a plus

* Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills

* Excellent written and verbal communication skills

* Ability to work independently in a remote environment and collaborate with cross-functional teams



Preferred Experience

* Experience supporting executive leadership

* Exposure to M&A analysis and strategic investment modeling

* Experience working with professional services firms or multi-practice organizations



If you're interested in applying, please send your application along with the requirements listed below:



Resume, screenshot of computer specifications, screenshot of internet speed test, and video recording where you introduce yourself and elaborate on your experiences. Thanks!

title: English-fluent Property Sourcing VA (Calls required)
description:
Hi, I'm Terry! I run a team under Invested Escapes, a U.S.-based temporary housing provider that relocates displaced families whose homes are being repaired due to damage (fires, floods, etc.). We receive claims or "leads" from relocation specialists (RSs) at relocation companies and source, confirm, and propose suitable property options to the RS, who in turn present to the family in need of a temporary home. 



We are a top-closing team that is growing fast in workload so we're building a 24/7 network of sharp, reliable property sourcers. 



--- The Structure ---



This is a freelance, on-call role. When a claim comes in, we'll post it in a dedicated Sourcer Slack channel. Any sourcer that is available and can commit to an uninterrupted sourcing window messages to take it -- first come, first serve. 



Lead flow isn't always steady or enough to give a claim to each available sourcer, so this works best for someone who has other work too but is able to commit to a claim(s) when available and most of all, for someone who wants to earn on their own terms. 



--- What You'll Do ---



Once you accept a claim, you're responsible for the full sourcing round which includes:



* initial sourcing round where you find & reach out (via call/text) to a sufficient # of potentially viable property options 

* during/after initial sourcing, responding quickly to any landlords that respond and reviewing all property details to see if the property is a viable option 

* following up with landlords as needed and expanding the search if criteria shifts or all initially sourced options are unviable (i.e. landlord never replies, property doesn't fit critical criteria)

* delivering market research to us if no confirmed options are found within a reasonable time frame / effort 



Initial sourcing windows vary depending on complexity + sourcer speed but generally range 1-3 hours. Full sourcing (including responding to landlords, follow ups, adjusting to family feedback) can span multiple days/weeks but it will be “stop and go” (you come online to respond to landlords or search again, but you don’t have to wait online for hours in the meantime). 



You will use a time tracker for each task i.e. claim you take and are expected to honestly track your time using the “stop and go” feature of the tracker. 



--- What Makes You a Good Fit ---



* Fluent English (written and spoken)

* Extremely detail-oriented, thorough, and fast

* Self-motivated & critical thinker; if there are no perfect options, you figure out ways to make something reasonable work 

* Confident handling questions & objections and able to negotiate/be persuasive, when needed

* Reliable & responsive — when you commit to a claim, you follow through & are reachable

* Tech savvy (comfortable learning new software) & incredible multitasker (i.e. can take calls while also sourcing other options) 

* Quiet + distraction-free environment for calls 

* Available during U.S. hours, ideally some window in the EST day (9AM to 12AM); while we only receive claims during standard workhours, it is efficient to source after-hours as needed 



--- How You Get Paid ---



* Hourly pay for total time worked on a claim 

* Sizable one-time bonus (e.g. $50, potentially more) if the family selects your option



As lead flow grows, top performers will have the opportunity to move into a full-time role with higher pay and deeper involvement in the full claim lifecycle.



--- How to Apply ---



* Written intro — tell us something you do for fun and something that inspires / motivates you!

* Short video or audio intro in English

* Your general preferred availability and time zone

* Any relevant experience (research, sourcing, admin, phone-based roles)

* Include the phrase "water bottle" somewhere in your video or audio intro (not the written one)



--- When You'll Hear Back ---



If we think you're a good fit, we will aim to touch base within 1-2 weeks. 



Due to our workload and the number of applicants, we may not be able to respond to each applicant individually but we genuinely appreciate each application and your
. We know how frustrating it is if you don't hear back at all from a job but we respect any person who puts themselves out there (like you!) and will definitely keep you in mind as we keep expanding the team.

title: Administrator, Group Support Services
description:
Administrator – ADVA Group Support Services



Full-time | Sydney AU hours | Competitive salary + growth opportunities



Applications close Friday, 20 March 2026 (unless filled earlier)



How your role makes a difference?

In your role as Administrator within Group Support Services, you play a critical part in supporting the efficient operation of the Group and its entities. You help ensure that administrative processes run smoothly by managing documentation, coordinating communications, and supporting key operational tasks across the organisation. Your attention to detail and strong organisational skills help maintain accuracy, consistency, and efficiency in day-to-day activities. With strong organisational skills and a self-starter attitude, you support the smooth running of day-to-day operations by ensuring tasks, documentation, and communications are well coordinated and managed efficiently. Your ability to maintain structure and attention to detail helps the team operate effectively, allowing partners and staff to focus on delivering high-quality work and achieving the Group’s strategic objectives.



Key responsibilities you will have :

Practice & Operations Support

• Support the CEO, Practice and Operations Manager, and partners in the day-to-day administration and operation of the Group’s entities.

• Support day-to-day operations by maintaining organised data, filing systems, and accurate record keeping.

• Prepare and maintain internal reports and assist with regular reporting requirements across the Group.

• Maintain key operational trackers and internal calendars to support team coordination and planning.

• Assist with coordinating operational initiatives, internal updates, and process improvements where required.

• Manage client enquiries, schedule meetings, and maintain a professional client experience.

• Assist with client administration processes including file management, document organisation, and maintaining accurate client records.

• Maintain and update practice management systems, templates, and internal documentation.

• Prepare agendas, minutes, correspondence, and briefing materials to support meetings and operational activities.



Administrative & Office Management

• Manage shared inboxes and respond to enquiries from internal and external stakeholders, escalating matters where appropriate.

• Develop and maintain organised filing systems, databases, spreadsheets, and administrative systems.

• Coordinate internal meetings and assist with general team administration and planning activities.

• Provide general administrative support across the team, including assisting with internal priorities, office coordination, and team initiatives.

• Manage office supplies, facilities coordination, and liaise with external service providers where required.



Finance Administration

• Assist with invoice preparation, billing administration, and debtor follow-ups.

• Support month-end reporting processes and general finance administration tasks.

• Monitor work in progress (WIP) reporting and assist with tracking billable activities where required.

• Ensure timesheets are submitted by tea
mbers and maintain accurate timesheet reporting.





Experience and Qualifications

To be successful in this role, the ideal candidate will have the following experience and qualifications:



• Bachelor’s degree in Business, Project Management, or a related field.

• Minimum of 2 years previous experience in an administrative, practice support, or operations support role within a professional services environment (e.g. accounting, legal, consulting, or advisory).

• Strong organisational and time management skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities and meet deadlines.

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to interact professionally with clients and internal stakeholders.

• High level of attention to detail and accuracy in documentation, record keeping, and reporting.

• Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook, PowerPoint) and confidence working with business systems and databases.

• Experience working with business systems and collaboration tools such as Podio, Slack, Asana, and similar workflow or project management platforms.

• Experience managing administrative systems, document management, and internal reporting processes.

• Ability to work proactively, take initiative, and operate effectively in a fast-paced environment.

• Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to collaborate across teams and business units.

• A positive, professional attitude with a strong commitment to supporting team success and operational efficiency.



What it means to work at the adva.group 

Working at adva.group means being part of a dynamic, forward-thinking organization that values innovation and collaboration. Our team is made up of highly skilled and experienced professionals who are committed to delivering exceptional results for our clients. We offer a supportive and inclusive work environment where tea
mbers are encouraged to grow and develop their skills and careers. 



At the adva.group, we are dedicated to making a positive impact on the businesses and communities we serve, and we strive to create a culture of excellence in everything we do.

title: Senior Back-End Developer (Remote)
description:
DelGate Logistics is a rapidly growing Canadian 3PL company specializing in warehousing, fulfillment, and last-mile delivery

services for large and bulky products. 



Position Overview:

We're looking for a skilled Back end Engineer to help evolve and scale our back-end systems, which form the core infrastructure behind our logistics, warehouse, and delivery management platform. This role is ideal for an engineer who thrives in a fast- paced, product-driven environment and is eager to take ownership of impact back-end services used across North America. 



Key Responsibilities: 

- Design, build, and maintain backend services and APIs using Golang (primary) and Node.js (legacy support). 

- Contribute to infrastructure and deployment processes leveraging Docker Swarm and Jenkins CI/CD pipelines . 

- Collaborate with frontend and mobile engineers to ensure seamless integration and data flow across platforms. 

- Lead and support the implementation of new features, services, and third-party integrations. 

- Work with MongoDB and PostgreSQL to design efficient, reliable, and scalable data layers. 

- Support modernization initiatives while maintaining selected legacy systems. 

- Write clean, testable, and maintainable code, adhering to industry best practices and internal standards. 

- Participate in architecture reviews, agile planning, and code reviews across the engineering organization. 

- Contribute to performance monitoring, issue diagnosis, and uptime improvements. 



Qualifications: 

- 3-4 years of backend development experience, ideally within product-focused or high-scale environments. 

- Proven expertise in Golang , with hands-on experience building and maintaining production services. 

- Working knowledge of Node.js is beneficial, particularly for contributing to legacy components. 

- Experience working with MongoDB and PostgreSQL in live, production settings. 

- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and containerized deployments (eg, Jenkins, Docker). 

- Strong understanding of RESTful API development and third-party system integration . 

- Solid grasp of backend architecture, microservices, security principles, and system scalability. 

- Comfortable working with both modern systems and legacy infrastructure. 

- Effective communicator, able to work asynchronously across global teams.

Please send your updated resume and portfolio showcasing relevant experience to

title: Eviction Judgments & Delinquent Rent
description:
About the Role



We are a high-volume eviction services and property management support company that processes thousands of cases annually across Georgia. We're hiring a Collections Specialist to recover delinquent rent and enforce money judgments obtained through dispossessory (eviction) proceedings.



This is a results-driven role. You'll manage a portfolio of outstanding balances and court judgments, working the full collections lifecycle — from initial demand through garnishment, lien recording, and credit reporting. If you understand landlord-tenant debt, know how to skip trace, and can negotiate a payment plan or file a garnishment without being told twice, this role is for you.



You'll work directly with company leadership and coordinate with property managers, attorneys, and court systems to maximize recovery on every account.



What You'll Do



Pre-Judgment Collections (Delinquent Rent)



Contact current and former tenants with outstanding rent balances via phone,
, text, and written demand letters

Negotiate payment plans, settlements, and lump-sum payoffs on delinquent accounts

Skip trace tenants who have vacated — locate forwarding addresses, phone numbers, and employment information using databases and investigative tools



Send formal demand letters and Notices of Intent to pursue legal action on behalf of property owners

Coordinate with property managers to validate balances, ledger charges, and lease terms

Document all collection activity, communications, and payment arrangements in the tracking system

Escalate accounts to legal action when voluntary collection efforts are exhausted



Post-Judgment Enforcement (Eviction Judgments)



Enforce money judgments obtained from magistrate court and state court dispossessory actions across Georgia

Prepare and file wage garnishments, bank account garnishments, and post-judgment interrogatories

Record judgment liens with county superior court clerks to secure interests against debtor property

Submit judgment and collection data to credit bureaus (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion) for credit reporting

Monitor judgment renewal deadlines and file renewals to keep judgments enforceable

Calculate interest, court costs, and attorney fees owed on each judgment and maintain accurate payoff balances

Negotiate post-judgment settlements when appropriate to accelerate recovery



Track and report on recovery rates, aging balances, and collection performance metrics



Compliance & Administration



Ensure all collection activities comply with the Fair Debt Collection Practices Act (FDCPA), Georgia Fair Business Practices Act, and applicable state and federal regulations



Maintain proper documentation for all debtor communications, payment arrangements, and legal filings

Generate weekly and monthly collection reports showing recovery amounts, contact rates, and pipeline aging

Manage account assignments, prioritize high-value and high-probability accounts, and maintain organized case files

Coordinate with attorneys on accounts requiring litigation beyond standard garnishment and lien filings





Required Skills & Experience



2+ years of collections experience, preferably in property management, landlord-tenant, or real estate debt

Direct experience with post-judgment enforcement — garnishments, liens, credit reporting, and judgment renewals

Working knowledge of Georgia landlord-tenant law, dispossessory proceedings, and magistrate/state court processes

Familiarity with the FDCPA and state-level collection regulations



Proven skip tracing skills using tools like TLO, IRB Search, LexisNexis, or similar databases

Strong phone presence — professional, firm, and effective at negotiating with debtors

Highly organized with the ability to manage a large portfolio of accounts with varying statuses and deadlines

Proficient with collection software, CRM systems, Google Workspace, and Excel/Sheets

Self-motivated with a track record of meeting or exceeding collection targets



Bonus / Nice-to-Have



Experience working for or with eviction services companies, property management firms, or landlord-tenant law firms

Knowledge of Georgia county court systems (Fulton, DeKalb, Gwinnett, Clayton, Cobb, etc.)

Familiarity with multi-unit apartment communities and portfolio-level collections

Experience filing in Georgia magistrate court e-filing systems



Bilingual (English/Spanish) is a plus



Background in legal collections, judgment enforcement, or paralegal work

Experience using AI tools for skip tracing research, letter generation, or workflow automation

title: AI Marketing Video - CREATOR
description:
Project: AI-Generated Marketing Video (Short Clip)



Overview

I am looking for a freelancer to create a short, realistic marketing video using AI-generated footage and professional video editing.

The video will be used to promote a lifestyle brand online.

It must be a realistic-looking AI video, not a cartoon or animation style.



Deliverables

1. One video approx. 60 seconds

2. One short version under 30 seconds

The short version can be a condensed edit of the longer video.



Style

• realistic visuals

• modern cinematic look

• smooth editing

• suitable for website and social media



What I need from you

Please include in your reply:

1. Links to 2–3 video samples you created

2. Which tools do you use to generate AI video?

3. Which software do you use for editing and final rendering?

4. A short explanation of your workflow



Optional test

I may ask selected candidates to create a very short sample clip (5–8 seconds).



Future work

If the collaboration works well, we are interested in building a longer-term working relationship. Future projects may include video production, social media content, website visuals, graphic design, advertising creatives, landing page support, and other online marketing and sales activities.

title: Medical Insurance Billing & Patient Communications VA (Optometry Practice – USA)
description:
Senior Medical Insurance Billing & Patient Communications VA (Optometry – USA)



TOP-TIER CANDIDATES ONLY



Position: Full-Time | Long-Term

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Compensation: $5.00 per hour

Schedule (U.S. Pacific Time – REQUIRED):



Tuesday–Friday: 8:25 AM – 5:30 PM

Saturday: 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM



About the Role



We are a high-performing, well-established optometric practice in the United States seeking a senior-level Virtual Assistant to take ownership of insurance billing, reconciliation, data entry, and patient communications.



This is not an entry-level role. We are hiring a highly professional, detail-obsessed VA who can work independently, communicate clearly with U.S. patients, and collaborate seamlessly with our in-office team.



Core Responsibilities



End-to-end insurance billing and follow-up

Reconciliation of EOBs, insurance payments, and patient balances

Accurate and efficient data entry

Patient communications via phone,
, and text

Clear explanation of insurance benefits and balances

Coordination with local office staff to resolve billing discrepancies

Meticulous documentation and record keeping

Delivery of consistently white-glove customer service



NON-NEGOTIABLE REQUIREMENTS



Applicants must meet all requirements below. If not, please do not apply.

Clear, native or near-native English pronunciation (professional phone presence required)

Strong written English

Proven medical insurance billing experience

Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to follow SOPs and meet deadlines without reminders

Fast, reliable internet connection with a backup internet source

Dual-monitor (dual screen) workstation

Backup power supply (UPS or generator) to prevent downtime

Quiet, professional home office environment

Strong work ethic, accountability, and integrity

Must only work for us during our hours



STRONG PREFERENCE (MAJOR ADVANTAGE)



Optometric or ophthalmology billing experience

Hands-on experience with:



VSP

EyeMed

Medicare

Cigna

Aetna

Anthem Blue Cross



Prior experience working with U.S.-based medical practices



What This Role Is (and Is Not)



? Long-term, stable position

title: Insurance Billing, Reconciliation & Phone Support Specialist
description:
Insurance Billing, Reconciliation & Phone Support Specialist



Full-Time | $5/hour | 39–40 hours/week | Tuesday–Saturday | Pacific Standard Time (PST)



A modern, high-level healthcare practice based in Santa Monica, California is seeking a dedicated, EXPERIENCED Insurance Billing, Reconciliation, and Phone Support Specialist to join our professional team. 



This is a serious long-term position for someone who wants stability, growth, and the opportunity to work with an excellent team. We value reliability, professionalism, and exceptional attention to detail.



This role is ideal for someone who is organized, analytical, communicates clearly with American patients, and takes pride in accuracy and excellent service.



Key Responsibilities

Insurance Billing & Reconciliation



• Submit and track insurance claims

• Post insurance payments and reconcile accounts

• Identify and resolve billing discrepancies

• Follow up on unpaid or delayed claims

• Verify insurance eligibility and benefits

• Maintain accurate billing records



Phone Support



• Answer incoming patient calls professionally

• Assist patients with billing questions

• Provide clear explanations of insurance coverage and balances

• Route calls to the appropriate staff when needed

• Maintain a calm, friendly, and professional tone



Administrative Support



• Accurate data entry and documentation

• Maintain organized patient account records

• Assist with back-office administrative tasks



Required Qualifications



Applicants must meet ALL of the following:



• Excellent spoken English with clear American pronunciation

• No noticeable accent when speaking with patients

• Strong listening and phone communication skills

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Able to follow structured systems and processes

• Strong reasoning and problem-solving ability

• Reliable high-speed internet connection

• Quiet workspace suitable for professional phone communication



Employment Requirements



To ensure focus and reliability:



• This must be your ONLY job

• No freelance work or additional employment

• Must be available Tuesday through Saturday

• Must be able to work during Pacific Standard Time (PST) business hours

• Must be committed to long-term employment



Applicants working multiple jobs will not be considered.



Compensation



• $5 per hour

• 39–40 hours per week

• Paid biweekly

Our Team



You will be working with a professional healthcare team that values excellence, integrity, teamwork, and service to patients.



We are looking for someone who:



• Takes ownership of their work

• Wants a stable long-term position with a strong team



Application Instructions (IMPORTANT)

title: Clinic Manager
description:
About Us

We’re building a global talent pool of experienced Clinic Managers to support partner clinics across Australia, the US, the UK, New Zealand, and beyond. These clinics deliver modern healthcare services on-site, often combining general practice with wellness, integrative care, and allied health support.



Our shared mission is simple: make healthcare more human—patient-first service, reliable systems, calm communication, and consistent quality.



If you’re an operations leader who can bring structure to busy clinic workflows (and keep standards high), we’d love to meet you.



Role Overview

As a Clinic Manager (In-Clinic Operations), you’ll oversee day-to-day clinic operations and ensure the front desk, patient flow, and administrative systems run smoothly. You’ll coordinate staff, improve processes, handle escalations, and monitor performance—so clinicians can focus on care and patients feel supported.



This is a pooling / talent pipeline role. Successful candidates may be matched to clinic openings based on:

 • Your operations and people-leadership experience

 • Your clinic setting background (primary care, allied health, wellness, specialty)

 • Tools you’ve used (practice management software, scheduling, billing, CRM/ticketing)

 • Compensation alignment and scope (single site vs multi-site support)



Medical allied licensure is an advantage but not required. Strong clinic management experience is the priority.



What You’ll Do (Key Responsibilities)

 • Run daily clinic operations: reception workflow, scheduling flow, staff coverage, and service readiness.

 • Lead and coach admin/front desk teams (and other support roles as assigned) with clear standards and accountability.

 • Ensure an excellent patient experience: timely communication, accurate bookings, smooth check-in/check-out processes.

 • Manage appointment scheduling processes to reduce gaps and improve utilization.

 • Oversee documentation and admin accuracy in practice systems (patient profiles, consent forms, required documentation).

 • Support billing/admin coordination (invoicing workflows, payment follow-ups, basic reconciliation support) depending on clinic assignment.

 • Handle escalations: complaints, service recovery, and sensitive patient situations with professionalism.

 • Build and maintain SOPs, scripts, and checklists to standardize operations.

 • Monitor KPIs and report weekly: patient volume, cancellations/no-shows, response time, revenue/admin indicators (where applicable), and CSAT/NPS.

 • Coordinate with clinicians for operational needs (rosters, room allocation, prep requirements, follow-ups).

 • Support hiring, onboarding, training, and QA for admin workflows.

 • Ensure privacy-minded operations and secure handling of patient information.



Must-Have Qualifications

 • 5+ years experience in clinic management / healthcare administration / practice operations (or similar).

 • Proven people leadership experience (team supervision, coaching, performance management).

 • Strong English communication (spoken and written); confident working with international stakeholders.

 • Strong operational mindset: workflow design, SOPs, problem-solving, and prioritization.

 • Comfortable with practice management systems and admin workflows (scheduling, patient records, basic billing coordination).

 • Data-driven: able to track KPIs, spot trends, and improve performance.

 • Remote-ready: reliable attendance, proactive communication, and accountability.

 • Reliable home setup: stable internet, quiet workspace, headset, and backup plan.



Nice-to-Haves (Bonus Points)

 • Medical allied health license/background (advantage, not required).

 • Experience supporting multi-site clinics or regional operations.

 • Strong patient experience and complaint handling/service recovery experience.

 • Familiarity with compliance-minded documentation workflows (consent tracking, ID checks, required forms).

 • Experience with clinics in AU/UK/US/NZ systems and service expectations.

 • Advanced Excel/Sheets reporting and dashboarding.



Tools/Systems Familiarity (Examples)

 • Practice management / scheduling: clinic software varies by site (experience with any is transferable)

 • Billing/admin tools: invoicing and payment tools (clinic-specific)

 • CRM/ticketing: HubSpot, Zendesk, Freshdesk (optional per site)

 • Ops: Google Workspace, Slack/Teams, Notion/Trello/Asana, Google Sheets



Work Setup & Scheduling (PH-based)

 • Location: Philippines (remote)

 • Shift options: Vary by clinic assignment based on local clinic hours

 • AU/NZ-friendly (PH day shift)

 • UK-friendly (PH late afternoon/evening)

 • US-friendly (PH night shift)

 • Preference for candidates who can commit to consistent overlap windows and provide clear handoffs and reporting.



Compensation (General Guidance)

 • Starting at USD 15/hour, negotiable based on:

 • team size managed

 • complexity (single site vs multi-site operations support)

 • KPI ownership (utilization, cancellations/no-shows, CSAT, admin accuracy)

 • SOP/process improvement capability

 • Some assignments may include performance bonuses tied to operational outcomes.



How to Apply (Required)

Please submit:

 1. CV / Resume

 2. A short video introduction (1–2 minutes) covering:

 • Your clinic management/operations experience (setting + team size)

 • Tools/systems you’ve used (scheduling/practice management/billing/CRM)

 • Your preferred shift overlap (AU/UK/US)

 • One operational improvement you led and the result (numbers if possible)



Optional but helpful:

 • A sample SOP/checklist you created (remove any sensitive information)

 • Summary of KPIs you’ve managed (utilization, cancellations/no-shows, CSAT/NPS, billing accuracy)



Our Screening Process (What to Expect)

 • Initial screen (leadership + communication + remote readiness)

 • Practical task: propose an SOP + KPI plan for a sample clinic workflow issue

 • Structured interview: scenarios on escalations, coaching, metrics, and process improvement



Join the Pool

If you’re a steady, patient-first operations leader who can bring clarity and consistency to busy clinic workflows, we’d love to hear from you.

title: SEO & Email Marketing Specialist
description:
We are seeking a highly capable SEO specialist to manage and execute our search engine optimization strategy, with a strong emphasis on local SEO in New York City.



Our primary SEO platform is SearchAtlas, an AI-powered SEO system that includes Atlas Brain for content and optimization workflows. Experience with SearchAtlas is preferred, but applicants are welcome to use any professional SEO tools they are comfortable with, provided they can deliver measurable results.



The ideal candidate is highly analytical, comfortable working with AI-driven SEO systems, and capable of consistently improving rankings, traffic, and visibility. In addition to SEO responsibilities, this role will also execute Klaviyo
 campaigns and manage related performance metrics.



Clear KPIs and performance benchmarks will be established. Performance is measured strictly by data.



SEO & Visibility (Primary Focus)



• Execute ongoing SEO strategy using SearchAtlas and Atlas Brain

• Continuously identify and implement opportunities to improve organic rankings

• Optimize content for both traditional search engines and LLM-driven discovery (AI search visibility)

• Publish and refine SearchAtlas-generated content weekly

• Optimize meta titles, descriptions, headings, schema, and on-page structure

• Implement and expand internal linking strategy

• Monitor keyword movement, impressions, crawl health, and page performance

• Improve entity relevance and topical authority for LLM indexing

• Draft weekly Google Business Profile posts

• Provide measurable SEO performance reporting with clear growth metrics



Klaviyo
 Execution



• Execute a minimum of 2
 campaigns per week

• Maintain and optimize core automated flows

• Perform list segmentation and list hygiene

• Track revenue attribution and engagement metrics



Operations & Organization



• Use ClickUp to manage all tasks and documentation

• Organize internal company documents and marketing assets

• QA booking links, forms, and tracking systems



Reporting Requirements (Mandatory)



Daily End-of-Day Report



• Hours worked

• Tasks completed

• Systems used

• Work in progress



Bi-Weekly KPI Report (Submitted Before Payroll)



• SEO metrics (keyword movement, impressions, content published)

•
 metrics (campaigns, sends, opens, clicks, revenue)



Performance is measured strictly by data.



Brand Standards



Forbidden Well operates with a defined luxury brand identity.



Strict adherence to brand voice, presentation, and positioning is required.



Strategic direction and final decision-making remain with the Founder.



Application Requirements (Read Carefully)



To be considered for this role, applicants must include the following in their application.



1. A brief summary of your SEO experience, specifically related to local SEO and Google Business Profile optimization.



2. A list of the SEO tools you are most experienced with (examples: SearchAtlas, Ahrefs, SEMrush, Surfer, Screaming Frog, etc.).



3. Links to at least 2 websites you have worked on where you helped improve rankings or traffic.



4. A short explanation (3–5 sentences) describing how you would improve the local SEO visibility of a business located in New York City.



5. Your experience with Klaviyo
 marketing, including campaigns, flows, and segmentation.



The phrase "Atlas SEO Candidate" at the very top of your application so we know you read this entire job post.

title: Healthcare Onboarding Specialist
description:

title: eClinicalWorks (eCW) Implementation Expert / Workflow Architect – Pain Management
description:
JOB OVERVIEW:

We are a U.S. Pain Management Clinic looking for a true eClinicalWorks (eCW) implementation expert.



This is NOT a trainee role and NOT a basic eCW user role.



We are looking for someone who has personally built eCW workflows from scratch and can think like an architect — not someone who only follows an existing workflow.



You must have real hands-on experience with:

- Smart Forms

- templates

- order sets

- workflow design and optimization

- eCW v11 or v12

- improving clinic efficiency and reducing clicks



Strong preference for candidates who have experience with:

- Pain Management templates (HPI, Physical Exam, Assessment/Plan)

- procedure order sets

- mid-office workflow design

- referral and schedule workflow improvements

- CPT explosion

- mandatory diagnosis rules

- claim scrubbing / denial prevention rules



Ideal candidate:

- has done real eCW implementation or optimization work before

- can design the workflow, not just follow it

- can explain exactly what they personally built

- can show redacted/de-identified examples or do a live walkthrough

- has worked for eClinicalWorks, an implementation team, or a specialized RCM/consulting firm



DO NOT APPLY IF:

- you only used eCW as a front desk staff member, MA, scribe, scheduler, or biller

- you need someone else to tell you what to build

- you have never created Smart Forms, templates, or order sets from scratch

- you cannot clearly describe your implementation experience



PROJECT DETAILS:

- Less than 30 hours/week

- 1 to 3 month project to start

- Ongoing work possible for the right person

- Paid working interview / test task required



HOW TO APPLY:

Put ECW ARCHITECT in the first line of your application and answer ALL of these:



1. How many years of hands-on eCW implementation experience do you have?

2. What Smart Forms, templates, order sets, or workflows have you personally built?

3. Have you built anything for pain management or procedure-based clinics?

4. Which eCW versions have you worked in?

5. Have you worked for eClinicalWorks, an implementation firm, or an RCM company?

6. Can you show redacted/de-identified examples of your work?

7. Are you willing to do a paid working interview or test task?

title: Google Ads & Meta Ads Specialist – Lead Generation Agency | Part-Time Remote (15-30 hrs/week)
description:
We are looking for a Digital Marketing Specialist based in the Philippines to take full ownership of paid advertising for our clients across Google Ads and Meta Ads 
 & Instagram). This is a part-time remote role with an Australian lead generation agency specialising in service-based businesses. If you enjoy data-driven marketing, improving campaign performance, and genuinely care about the results you deliver, this could be a great opportunity.



About Us



We are an Australian lead generation agency focused exclusively on helping service-based businesses grow through paid advertising. Our team is small and focused, and we take pride in delivering real results for our clients.



About the Role



This role is focused on paid search and paid social advertising for lead generation clients. You will take full ownership of campaigns across Google Ads and Meta Ads, with the goal of driving high-quality leads for service-based businesses. This is not a support role — we want someone who owns their campaigns, spots problems early, and is always looking for ways to improve performance. The role starts at 15 hours per week, primarily across Monday and Tuesday, with a clear path to 25-30 hrs within 3 months based on performance. Starting rate is $8 USD/hour with performance reviews at 3 and 6 months.



Key Responsibilities



You will manage and optimise Google Ads campaigns end to end, including search campaigns, retargeting campaigns, and Performance Max where applicable. This includes keyword research, writing and testing ad copy, bid and budget management, and identifying new opportunities. You will also manage Meta advertising campaigns across
 and Instagram, including audience setup, creative testing, ad copy, and ongoing optimisation to drive lead volume and quality. You will monitor performance across both platforms and communicate clearly on what is working, what isn't, and what you plan to do about it.



Skills and Experience



We are looking for someone who has hands-on experience managing Google Ads campaigns with a focus on lead generation, solid experience running Meta Ads campaigns, strong written English, and the ability to analyse data and make decisions based on it.

It is a bonus if you have experience with GoHighLevel including CRM, workflows, automations or landing page builds, GA4 and conversion tracking setup, or creating Meta ad creatives.



How to Apply



Please send a short description of your Google Ads experience, a short description of your Meta Ads experience, examples of campaigns or results you have achieved if available, and your availability and timezone. Please include the word BOOMERANG at the start of your application so we know you have read the full post.



Please also include an answer to the below questions within your application:



- Describe a Google Ads campaign you managed that wasn't performing. What did you diagnose and what actions did you take?

- What's your process for the first 2 weeks when taking over an existing account?



We'll review applications rolling and aim to schedule interviews within 5 business days.

title: Search Engine Marketing Specialist
description:
About Us: VetShopGroup is Australia's largest, oldest and most awarded online retailer of pet health products. We have customers all over the world (majority in Australia and USA/Canada). 



We're a privately owned business, founded by our head vet and CEO Dr Mark Perissinotto and his brother Steven in 1999. Mark and Steven continue to be active in the day to day operation of the business and our team (currently 20 people) is customer focused, motivated and fun to work with. We treat our staff, our suppliers and our customers and their pets as if they were our own family.



We operate multiple  websites serving pet owners in Australia and North America



Role Overview



We are seeking an experienced Part-Time Search Engine Marketing Specialist to join our Manila based team and manage, optimise, and scale our Google Ads and paid search performance. You will play a key role in driving qualified traffic, improving conversion rates, and maximising return on ad spend (ROAS), while ensuring compliance with advertising policies for veterinary and pet pharmacy products.



Key Responsibilities



You will be responsible for:



Managing and optimising Google Ads and Microsoft Ads campaigns, including:



Search campaigns

Shopping campaigns

Performance Max (where appropriate)

Remarketing / retargeting campaigns



Conducting keyword research and ongoing optimisation to improve:



Click-through rate (CTR)

Quality Score

Cost per click (CPC)

Conversion rate

Return on ad spend (ROAS)



Writing and testing ad copy that aligns with brand tone and compliance requirements.



Analysing campaign performance and providing clear, monthly reporting on:



Spend

Revenue

Conversions

Key insights and recommendations



Identifying new opportunities for growth in paid search, including:



New product categories

Seasonal campaigns

Competitor gaps

Audience targeting strategies



Working closely with the marketing team on:



Promotions and campaigns

Landing page improvements

Conversion rate optimisation (CRO) ideas



Ensuring all ads comply with Google’s policies regarding:



Veterinary products

Prescription items

Pet pharmacy advertising standards in Australia



Required Skills & Experience



The ideal candidate will have:



2+ years’ experience managing Google Ads (especially eCommerce accounts)

Strong experience with Google Ads Search, Google Shopping and Google Analytics / GA4

Demonstrated ability to improve ROAS and reduce wasted ad spend

Experience with eCommerce businesses (retail, pharmacy, or pet industry a bonus)

Strong analytical skills and comfort working with data

Excellent spoken and written English communication skills



Desirable (but not essential)



Experience with Magento 2

Experience with Microsoft Ads and other SEM platforms

Experience in pet industry, veterinary, or pharmacy marketing



 This position is Part Time (2 days per week or 4 mornings or afternoons per week) and Work From Home. Hours will match Australian business  hours (i.e. 6am to 3pm or 7am to 4pm Philippines time). You will be engaged directly by us as an Independent Contractor.



A love of pets is essential.



How to Apply

Please send your resume and a brief cover letter outlining:



Your experience with Google Ads

Examples of eCommerce results you’ve achieved

Your availability (hours per week available to work)



to 
 by 4pm on 16 march  2026.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist

 & Instagram).

VetShopGroup is one of the largest and longest-running online retailers of pet health products, serving pet owners across Australia and North America.



The business was founded in 1999 by veterinarian Dr Mark Perissinotto and his brother Steven, and today we serve over one million pet owners through our online stores.

 and Instagram ads

 by 4pm on 16 February 2026. include:

title: Video Editor (Real Estate & Social Media) - Full Time (Contracted)
description:
Are passionate about Video Editing and all things Social? Come join our amazing team of creators at one of Australians premiere real estate brand!



Job Overview: 

We are seeking a high-speed, high-quality Video Editor to join our premier Australian real estate team at Ray White Erskineville. You will be a core part of our in-house marketing team, producing cinematic property films and high energy social media content (Reels/TikToks). You can find examples of our work here:

Youtube - 

Instagram - 



Your daily responsibilities include: 

- Property Film Editing: Transform raw footage into polished, professional walkthroughs.

- Social Media Content: Cut trendy, fast-paced vertical videos for Instagram and TikTok.

- Colour Grading: Manage LOG footage to ensure a premium, consistent brand aesthetic.

- Pipeline Management: Ensure all property videos are delivered within our 2 business day (48h) turnaround period.

- Quality Control: Maintain a high level of detail to ensure all videos meet Ray White brand guidelines.





Required Technical Skills & Experience: 

- Experience: 1–3 years in video editing (Real Estate or Social Media experience preferred).

- Software: Proficiency in Final Cut Pro (preferred), DaVinci Resolve, or Adobe Premiere.

- Technical Mastery: Demonstrated ability in colour grading, beat cutting, masking, and use of SFX/VFX.

- Hardware: Must own a professional setup capable of handling 4K footage (Mac preferred).

- Connectivity: A stable, high-speed internet connection for large file transfers.





Soft Skills: 

- Attention to Detail: Maintaining high quality under tight deadlines.

- Creative Eye: Ability to think "outside the box" to create engaging content.

- Communication: Conversational English skills for seamless team collaboration.





Work Schedule: 

- This is a full-time (contracted) position.

- Hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM AEST (Sydney Time).

- Reliability: You must be comfortable working strictly during Australian business hours.



Perks and Benefits (What We Offer)

We believe in rewarding our team and providing a stable, high performance environment, including:

 - Consistent Full-Time Work: No more chasing freelance gigs; join a stable, high-performing team of creative professionals.

 - Modern Workflow: Work with the best creative tools, including 
, MotionVFX, and ClickUp, in an organised,   streamlined environment.

 - Creative & Career Growth: Ongoing training and the opportunity to learn from highly skilled creatives who are always looking to push the boundaries of real estate and social content.

 - Supportive Culture: A friendly, energetic, and dynamic workplace within a well-respected real estate company.

- Leave Credits: You will qualify for vacation and sick leaves after the initial 6-month probation period.



Salary: 

P32,200 starting (to be discussed based on experience).



How to Apply: To make sifting through applications easier, please use the subject heading: "Ray White Video Editor Application".



Please submit the following:

- Your resume.

- A link to your portfolio or showreel showcasing property or social media work. 

- An English proficiency score/test result. (If available)



The Recruitment Process: Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete a Paid Test Edit of a property video with a 48-hour turnaround.

title: Ad Copy Speacilist
description:
Direct Response | Part-Time | Remote



We’re looking for someone who understands direct response advertising, not just writing nice captions.



Your job is to help us develop winning ad angles, hooks, and scripts for
 & Instagram ads.



You’ll work collaboratively with our team to create ad concepts based on:

• what’s already working

• our customer avatar

• real ad performance data.



This role sits between strategy and execution, helping shape ads that convert.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Writing scroll-stopping hooks

• Developing ad angles and concepts

• Writing short video ad scripts

• Helping plan creative tests

• Reviewing what ads are working and suggesting improvements

• Collaborating with our creative editor who produces the ads



This role is not about long-form copy.



It’s about creating short, punchy, direct-response ad creatives.



You’re a Good Fit If You

• Understand direct response marketing

• Know how to write hooks that stop the scroll

• Understand customer avatars and pain points

• Can turn ideas into clear ad scripts

• Think in tests, angles, and iterations

• Can collaborate with a creative team



Bonus Experience

• Meta /
 ads

• Fitness or coaching brands

• Local business marketing

• UGC-style ads

• Hormozi style direct-response marketing



Workload



This is a part-time role (5hours per week).



The goal is quality ideas and strong ad concepts, not busy work.



Pay Structure

• Hourly rate

• Long-term opportunity for the right person



 How to Apply (IMPORTANT)



Please include:



1-Examples of ad copy or scripts you’ve written

2-A short explanation of how you approach ad hooks

3-A 2–3 minute video introducing yourself



Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.



Why This Role Is Different



You’ll be working with a team that:

• actively tests ads

• understands its avatar

• produces high volumes of creatives

• wants to improve performance constantly

title: Email Outreach for Influencers/Creators
description:
Virtual Assistant (Influencer & Brand Partnerships)



Industry: Influencer Marketing, UGC, Creator Management



Hello! My name is Charlene and I run a digital marketing agency focused in content creation and influencer/creator management. 



We are seeking a highly skilled Assistant to pitch to UGC/influencer marketing to potential clients. Below is more about the company and what we are looking for from you!:)



Noshen Projects is a growing influencer marketing and creator management agency founded by a UGC creator and influencer. We specialize in connecting brands (beauty, women’s apparel, tech/software, travel, and lifestyle) with high-performing creators.

We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant who loves social media, understands digital culture, and takes initiative.



This role is perfect for someone who naturally enjoys scrolling through brands, discovering new products, analyzing marketing campaigns, and staying up to date with trends.



You will play a key role in growing the agency and supporting daily operations. 



Your responsibilities will include:



- Lead generation for brands across beauty, fashion, tech/software, travel, and lifestyle



- Sending cold
s and managing follow-up
s



- Responding to inbound
s and organizing inbox communications



- Maintaining organized CRM systems and file structures



- Sourcing and logging UGC creators/influencers into Google Sheets 



- Supporting overall
 management and administrative tasks





We’re looking for someone who thinks critically, spots opportunities, and takes initiative when needed.



5% bonus on initial onboarding of each brand client you help secure. (This bonus structure rewards performance and growth contribution to the company.)



What We’re Looking For:



- Written and spoken English (non-negotiable)

- Strong communication skills

- Passion for social media, influencer marketing, and digital trends

- Naturally curious about brands, products, and online culture

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Ambitious and proactive — someone who doesn’t wait to be told what to do

- Comfortable working independently

- Ability to work in fast paced environments and meet deadlines





If you enjoy researching brands, discovering creators, sending strategic
s, and being part of a growing agency in the influencer space, this role is for you.



To apply for this position, please send resume, your contact information answering the following questions...



- Describe your past experience as a virtual assistant?



- Describe your past job experiences?



- What is your favorite animal?



- Put a picture of a pineapple or write pineapple at the bottom of your resume
