title: Senior Property Accountant
description:
We are seeking a Property Portfolio Accountant in the real estate and property management industry. The ideal candidate will manage full-cycle accounting for a multifamily property portfolio, ensuring accurate reporting, operational efficiency, and strong alignment with U.S.-based stakeholders. This role requires hands-on experience with property accounting workflows, month-end close processes, reconciliations, and owner-facing financial reporting. Candidates should be comfortable working with property management systems and handling complex real estate accounting tasks including CAM reconciliations, lender draws, and escrow tracking.



Job Responsibilities:

Manage full-cycle accounting for a portfolio of multifamily properties.

Perform accrual-based accounting and oversee month-end close processes.

Handle bank and credit card reconciliations, journal entries, and general ledger maintenance.

Coordinate AP/AR processes with on-site property management teams.

Validate rent rolls, track collections, and ensure invoice matching accuracy.

Prepare and deliver monthly financial packages including:



Profit & Loss statements

Balance Sheets

Rent Rolls

Aging Reports (Receivables & Payables)

Vendor expense summaries

Cash flow statements



Conduct CAM reconciliations, CAM true-ups, and CAM recons.

Manage lender draws and escrow accounting related to property transactions.

Track property-related expenses such as commissions, marketing costs, and operational expenses.

Assist with budget preparation, variance analysis, and financial forecasting.

Support year-end audits, tax preparation, and regulatory compliance.

Communicate with U.S.-based property owners and leadership regarding financial reports and discrepancies.

Contribute to process improvements, reporting automation, and workflow optimization.



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

5+ years of professional accounting or bookkeeping experience.

3+ years of U.S. property management accounting experience.

Experience handling multifamily portfolios with 1,000+ units is highly preferred.

Strong understanding of accrual-based accounting and monthly close cycles.

Experience preparing financial reports for property owners or asset managers.

Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel.

Strong analytical skills and exceptional attention to detail.

Excellent communication skills with the ability to explain financial data to non-finance stakeholders.



Requirements:

Experience with property management and accounting platforms such as Yardi, AppFolio, QuickBooks, Buildium, Caliber, or similar tools.

Proven experience with:

CAM reconciliations / CAM true-ups

Lender draws

Escrow accounting

Updated Resume/CV.

Reliable internet connection and personal computer.

UPS/battery backup to ensure work continuity during blackouts.

Willingness to work in a dynamic, fast-paced remote environment.



Benefits:

Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses.

Remote work flexibility.

Career growth opportunities in a high-energy environment.

HMO coverage for the employee and immediate family members.



Join our team now and be part of the top 1% talent in the Philippines! ????

title: Business Funding & Government Contracts Specialist
description:
Remote | Contract or Full-Time | U.S.-Based Preferred

We help businesses access capital and win contracts. If you know your way around SBA loans, business credit lines, and 
 — we need you on the team.



About the Role

We are a growing business services firm that helps entrepreneurs, small businesses, and organizations secure funding, build business credit, and win government contracts. We're looking for a Business Funding & Government Contracts Specialist who can manage the full lifecycle of capital access — from business loan applications and credit card approvals to identifying, writing, and submitting government bids.

This role is ideal for someone with hands-on experience navigating SBA lending, commercial credit products, and federal/state/local procurement portals. You'll work directly with the CEO to help clients and internal ventures secure the capital and contracts they need to grow.



What You'll Do

Business Loan & Credit Applications



Prepare and submit business loan applications (SBA 7(a), SBA 504, microloans, term loans, lines of credit, equipment financing)

Research and match clients with the best lending products from banks, credit unions, CDFIs, and alternative lenders

Complete business credit card applications for high-limit cards (Chase Ink, Amex Business, Capital One Spark, etc.) and manage approval strategies

Build and optimize business credit profiles — EIN credit, Dun & Bradstreet (PAYDEX), Experian Business, Equifax Business

Prepare financial packages including P&L statements, cash flow projections, business plans, and personal financial statements for lender submissions

Track application status, manage follow-ups with underwriters, and handle document requests through closing

Maintain a pipeline tracker of all active loan and credit applications with status updates



Government Bids & Contract Procurement



Monitor and identify relevant government contract opportunities on 
, GovWin, BidNet, Georgia Procurement Registry, and local municipality portals

Prepare and submit bid proposals, RFP/RFQ/IFB responses, and capability statements

Manage 
 registration, UEI numbers, NAICS code selection, and entity renewals

Research set-aside programs (8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB) and determine eligibility for clients

Write compelling past performance narratives, technical approaches, and pricing schedules

Track bid deadlines, manage submission calendars, and ensure compliance with solicitation requirements

Build and maintain a government contracts pipeline with win/loss tracking and post-award follow-up



General Business Development Support



Assist with grant research and application support for nonprofit and for-profit programs (federal, state, foundation)

Support business entity compliance (annual filings, registered agent, business licenses, state registrations)

Help prepare investor-facing documents and data room materials when needed

Provide regular reporting on funding pipeline, approval rates, and contract wins





Required Skills & Experience



2+ years of hands-on experience with business loan applications (SBA, commercial, alternative lending)

Proven track record of successful business credit card approvals and business credit building

Direct experience with government bid writing and proposal submissions (federal, state, or local)

Working knowledge of 
, 
, FPDS, and government procurement portals

Understanding of SBA lending programs, CDFI funding, and commercial underwriting criteria

Strong written communication skills — ability to write clear, persuasive proposals and financial summaries

Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple applications, deadlines, and client accounts simultaneously

Proficient with Google Workspace, Excel/Sheets, CRM tools, and document management systems

Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision in a remote environment



Bonus / Nice-to-Have



Experience as a loan broker, loan officer, or SBA lending specialist

PTAC (Procurement Technical Assistance Center) training or certification

Knowledge of Dun & Bradstreet credit building, 
, or Credit Suite methodologies

Familiarity with Georgia state procurement and local county/municipal bid portals

Experience with nonprofit grant writing (federal grants, foundation proposals)

Background in real estate, property management, legal services, or housing-related industries

Experience with AI tools for research, writing, and workflow automation



Work Setup & Compensation

DetailInfoLocationRemote — U.S.-based preferred (Georgia a plus)TypeContract (with potential full-time conversion)HoursFull-time (40 hrs/week) or Part-time (20+ hrs/week)ScheduleU.S. Eastern business hours with flexibilityCompensationCompetitive base + performance bonuses on funded deals and awarded contractsTools ProvidedCRM access, document templates, lender network, bid portal logins



How to Apply

Submit your application with the following:



Your resume or CV highlighting experience with business lending, credit building, and/or government contracting

A brief cover letter explaining your relevant experience and what types of funding or contracts you've successfully secured

Examples of past wins — funded loan amounts, approved credit lines, awarded contracts, or successful bid proposals (redacted for confidentiality is fine)

Answer this question: "Walk us through your process for taking a client from initial application to funded deal or awarded contract. What's your system?"





Capital. Credit. Contracts. We help businesses win.

If you can make it happen, apply now.

Equal Opportunity Employer • Remote-First • Results-Driven Culture

title: VA specializing in Data Entry; Social Media is a plus!
description:
We are seeking a hardworking, committed, and responsible team player to grow in their role within our company. Initially, your duties will include simple admin tasks such as: setting appointments and scheduling them in the calendar, setting up new orders, research, data entry, etc. As you grow in our company, you’ll also learn to support client relations, online marketing, social media, and other fun and fulfilling tasks. And YES, training will be provided to the right candidate.



This job is NOT for everyone!



This is a unique employment opportunity to be a part of a team with great people in a fun-family type environment. You will have the opportunity to contribute your ideas, grow in your role, and enjoy a long and prosperous career.



Excellent English speaking/typing skills are a MUST and we’re looking for someone trustworthy, responsible, passionate, motivated, eager, and excited to learn and be part of our company. Knowing minor Wordpress tasks, simple video editing, Google docs, Excel, Send Out Cards, or anything related to real estate, lead generation and/or social media is also a plus, but NOT required as long as you’re eager and willing to learn.



It is important that you understand that is a PART TIME opportunity with a 20HOUR PER WEEK COMMITMENT at the beginning. As time goes on and you show that you can responsibly handle the requirements, it will evolve into a full time position. You’ll be expected to provide daily reports for the work you have completed. You will also be expected to be available at all times during your shift. Some of the benefits provided include: Health insurance, 13 month pay, bonus pay, and vacation days. These will be provided after you have passed your initial probationary period.



We are ONLY interested in hiring an individual looking for a part time (to start), lasting employment. The type of position where a self starter, such as yourself, will have an opportunity to excel at learning new skills while increasing your responsibilities with our company. We’re seeking someone who will NOT be working another job or have any school conflicts that would interfere with this position. We can assure you, the person hired will be very happy working in this position, and will be treated as a true tea
mber. This is a potential lifetime job opportunity with an employer who really and truly cares.



When applying, please answer the following questions in order:



1. What is you
 name/contact info?

2. Are you available full-time? How soon can you start?

3. Will you have another job? Are you going to school?

4. What is your desired HOURLY rate (In U.S. dollars)?

5. What kind of computer do you have? Do you have dual monitors?

6. What is your internet speed? Do you have backup internet?

7. Please provide links to your personal website if you have one. Also provide links to your
 and/or YouTube profiles.

8. On a scale of 1-10 with 10 being the highest, how would you rate your English speaking skills?

9. On a scale of 1-10 with 10 being the highest, how would you rate your English writing skills?

10. On a scale of 1-10 with 10 being the highest, how would you rate your typing skills?

11. List the TOP 3 work related items you enjoy doing the most AND list the TOP 3 work related items you least enjoy. Both of these items are required in your response.

12. Provide your most recent resume with past experience/skills.

13. Provide contact information for references, recommendations, and any endorsements you have. Please note, REACHABLE references are a MUST, as we will not interview or hire anyone without references that can be verified, contacted, and spoken to.



****IMPORTANT: IF YOU ARE A “COMPANY” OR A “GHOST VA” - DO NOT APPLY FOR THIS POSITION!!!****



If you’re interested in this position, please type the words, “You’ve Got The Right One! I can handle this for sure!”, into the subject line of your
 response. Remember, you must be hardworking, passionate, and have EXCELLENT communication skills. This means you must speak great English and be diligent about sending in daily updates on your work. In this way, if something is not understood or if you are having difficulty with an assignment we can help you work your way through it.



Thank you for your interest in this position.

title: TikTok Slideshow Assistant
description:
We are a Norwegian digital marketing company managing TikTok accounts for multiple creators. We need a reliable assistant to post daily slideshows across several accounts using content and instructions we provide.



What you will be doing:

You will receive a list of videos with links and ready-made captions every day. Your job is to recreate each post as a slideshow — use the same audio from the linked video, add the photos, and copy-paste the provided text. No creativity required, just accuracy and consistency.

Requirements:



Experience posting on TikTok

Comfortable creating slideshows in TikTok with custom audio

Reliable internet and available daily

Detail-oriented — posts must match the provided format exactly

Fast worker, this is straightforward daily posting work



To apply, send a short intro about yourself and any TikTok accounts you have managed. Applications without a personal message will not be considered.

title: Influencer & Partnerships Coordinator (E-commerce Specialty Coffee Brand) *Part Time | Remote (Asia Time Zone)
description:
Innovative global coffee brand inventing one-of-a-kind tools redefining how coffee is experienced. We are looking for an Influencer & Partnerships Coordinator to build meaningful relationships across the coffee industry that support global campaigns and product launches.







ABOUT ICOSA BREWHOUSE:

ICOSA Brewhouse is a globally recognized specialty coffee brand reshaping coffee culture around the world. (
  / 
 )



We design one-of-a-kind tools that elevate everyday rituals and introduce new ways of enjoying coffee.



From record-breaking Kickstarter launches to collaborations with world-class coffee professionals, our products are used by champions, top cafés, and homebrewers across 100+ countries.



We are a design-led, innovation-driven brand operating in a niche we are actively shaping. We build thoughtfully, test deliberately, and care deeply about quality — in both product and execution.



As we continue to innovate, launch new products, and grow, we are looking for someone who will support in building and nurturing meaningful partnerships across the specialty coffee industry.



You will work directly with the founder and play an active role in shaping how ICOSA connects with competitors, industry leaders, and the coffee community globally.







YOUR ROLE AND OPPORTUNITY ON THE TEAM:

This is not a generic influencer outreach role.



You will be responsible for identifying, reaching out to, and developing relationships with coffee champions, competitors, industry leaders, and key opinion leaders (KOLs) within the specialty coffee community.



??You will help us:

• Identify and research relevant coffee professionals, coffee competitors, brands, and collaborators aligned with ICOSA’s Mission

 • Initiate thoughtful, personalized outreach on a daily basis in a way that fosters long-term relationships (not transactional exchanges)

 • Maintain a structured partnership pipeline and track all conversations inside our CRM system

 • Follow up proactively and ensure promising conversations are never lost

 • Coordinate collaboration discussions and next steps with clarity and organization

 • Provide weekly structured updates summarizing active conversations, progress, and upcoming opportunities

Over time, as trust and capability are demonstrated, there may be opportunities to expand scope into broader partnership coordination and system development.



What success looks like:

 • High-quality industry relationships are initiated and nurtured on a daily basis

 • Communication with KOLs is clear, thoughtful, and aligned with brand positioning

 • Regular improvements are made to the communication flow and strategy to improve engagement

 • Outreach efforts are organized and accurately tracked in a CRM

 • Promising conversations do not get lost or forgotten

 • Founders are supported daily update reports 



This role sits at the intersection of relationship-building and structured execution.



What this role is NOT:

• Not a sales quota-driven position

• Not limited to short-term campaign outreach

• Not a purely social media engagement role

• Not a transactional affiliate outreach or mass-DM automation role



This is relationship building inside a growing global brand.







ABOUT YOU / WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

You are someone who:

 • Communicates clearly and confidently in written English

 • Understands how to build rapport without being pushy

 • Is socially intelligent and able to read tone and context

 • Is organized and follows through consistently using established processes

 • Can represent a premium brand professionally

 • Is comfortable working directly with founders in a small, fast-moving team



Must have skills or experience:

• 1–4 years experience in outreach, influencer marketing, partnerships, or community roles

• Strong, fluent written communication skills in English

• Is comfortable initiating conversations with high-level industry professionals

• Is naturally organized and detail-oriented

• Comfortable tracking multiple conversations and follow-ups without being reminded

• Takes pride in clear, polished communication

• Comfort working directly with founders in a small, fast-moving team

• Enjoys relationship building, but approaches it with structure

• Curious about how partnerships are built inside growing companies



Big pluses:

 • Familiarity with specialty coffee culture (ex. you know what makes Panama Geisha special)

 • Experience engaging with Instagram creators or industry experts in a niche

 • Experience building CRMs or improving existing workflows







WHY JOIN US:

At ICOSA Brewhouse, you will:

• Work directly with founders who are deeply involved in product design and global campaigns.

• Contribute to campaigns that reach a global coffee audience.

• Operate close to innovation. See products and launches before they are introduced to the world.

• Be part of a team that is pioneering global coffee culture.



ou’ll be joining a close-knit team focused on building something meaningful through collaboration.



We care deeply about growth,not just as a company, but as individuals. As we expand, there are real opportunities to take on broader ownership based on performance and initiative.



If that sounds exciting to you, you will feel at home here.







COMPENSATION AND WORKING STRUCTURE

• Hours: Begins as Part Time (10-15 hours per week), with potential to expand based on performance and ownership

• Fully remote. Asia time zone working hours required.

• You will collaborate directly with one of the founders

• Compensation range: $3.50-$6.00/hour (based on relevant experience and demonstrated capability)





HOW TO APPLY



Are you ready? 



If you’d like to join us on our journey and grow together with us, we’re looking forward to meeting you.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our application process easy to follow. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Complete the quick application: 
 

2. In the first question of the application start it with: "I’m (insert your name) from (insert your city/town) and my favourite food is (insert your favourite food). Then introduce yourself and why you think you’ll be a good fit for this position. 

3. We’ll be in touch with next steps for the interview once we receive it. 



We look forward to reviewing your application.

ABOUT ICOSA BREWHOUSE:

  / 
 )

From record-breaking Kickstarter launches to collaborations with world-class coffee professionals, our products are used by champions, in top cafés, and in homes in 100+ countries around the world. 



We are a design-led, innovation-driven brand operating in a niche we are actively shaping. We build thoughtfully, test deliberately, and care deeply about quality — in both product and execution.



As we continue to innovate, launch new products, and grow, we are looking for a Senior Social Media & Marketing Manager to take ownership of how our work is brought to life across channels.



You won’t just publish content.

YOUR ROLE AND OPPORTUNITY ON THE TEAM:

You will work directly with our Marketing Lead to:

• Own day-to-day marketing delivery across core channels

• Structure and execute campaigns from planning through rollout

• Translate ideas into clear, executable briefs

• Coordinate creative production across internal, outsourced, and AI-assisted workflows

• Strengthen how our marketing engine operates over time

You will contribute to campaign discussions before launch.

You will help shape how innovation is presented to a global audience.



Execution is central to this role — but so is judgment, ownership, and the ability to think in campaigns rather than isolated posts.





What you’ll own:



(1) Marketing Execution Across Channels

• Own social media execution (Instagram and
).

• Manage inbox and community engagement, including partnership or influencer communication if required.

• Execute
 campaigns aligned with launches, promotions, and collaborations.



You ensure marketing execution remains structured, timely, and dependable.



(2) Campaign Rollout & Launch Execution

• Translate marketing objectives into structured creative briefs.

• Oversee cohesive cross-channel rollout so messaging, visuals, and timing align across social,
, and paid efforts.

You think in campaigns — not just content pieces.



(3) Creative Briefing & Quality Control

• Create clear, structured briefs for design and content production.

(4) Growth & Operational Development

• Lead or contribute to structured testing and rollout of new channels or initiatives as capacity allows.

• Over time, take increasing ownership of campaign structuring, cross-channel coordination, partnership campaign oversight, and creative alignment across performance-driven efforts.

What success looks like:

• Social and
 channels operate smoothly with consistent execution and strong brand alignment.

• Marketing execution no longer bottlenecks leadership attention.

Over time, you become a trusted execution leader within the marketing team.





What This Role Is Not:

• Not a pure content creator role.

• Not a brand strategist role.

• Not a paid media buyer role.

• Not an administrative coordinator role.



This is a senior marketing operator position inside a growing global brand.







ABOUT YOU / WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

You are someone who:

• Understands how structured marketing campaigns come together.

• Can translate ideas into clear execution plans.

• Is comfortable owning delivery without hand-holding.

• Is comfortable reviewing performance data and using insights to inform execution decisions.

• Is strategic enough to think ahead — but practical enough to execute consistently.



You are strategic enough to think ahead — but practical enough to execute consistently.



Must have skills or experience:

• Experience executing structured marketing campaigns.

• Experience within D2C or product-based brands strongly preferred.

• Comfortable operating inside e-commerce environments.

• Strong creative judgment and ability to assess content quality and brand alignment.

Big pluses:

• Experience creating, implementing, and refining marketing processes or building SOPs.

• Experience coordinating freelancers or creative collaborators.

• Familiarity with Klaviyo or similar
 platforms.

• Exposure to AI-assisted marketing workflows.







WHY JOIN US:

At ICOSA Brewhouse, you will:

• Operate close to innovation — seeing products and launches before they are introduced to the world.

We are a fully remote team — but we operate with structure and discipline.



You’ll be joining a close-knit group focused on building something meaningful with collaboration and accountability. There is no office politics. No unnecessary hierarchy. Just people committed to high standards.



We care deeply about growth — not just as a company, but as individuals. As we expand, there are real opportunities to take on broader ownership, lead initiatives, and shape how our marketing evolves.



If you want a role where:

mbers that work remotely (2 off-shore in Philippines).



Our cloud-based systems are:

*
:

 campaign management

Our goal is to achieve top of mind awareness for consumers by displaying our expertise with residential thermal efficiency, renewable energy and energy storage in our target markets. Our desired outcome is to reach new customers and have existing customers being awareness of our full range of products/services, ultimately generating a steady flow of sales leads.



What We Need

We currently have a disjointed approach to our social media, often limited due to poor time resources due to continued business growth.  We need someone with multi-disciplinary skills that can schedule and coordinate cohesive social media and online advertising campaigns to become number one in our chosen fields, including:

title: Social Media Marketer
description:
ABOUT US



Commoner Apps is a boutique mobile and web development company based in Texas, USA. We build Trackara — a multi-tier automotive platform serving car enthusiasts, mobile mechanics, and auto repair shops.



Trackara is a beautifully designed app for car enthusiasts to track maintenance, mods, and vehicle history. Trackara Pro is a powerful business platform built for mobile mechanics to manage clients, jobs, and invoicing on the go.





THE ROLE



We're looking for a creative and driven Social Media Marketer to build and grow our brand presence across multiple platforms. You'll be responsible for creating engaging content, growing our audience of car enthusiasts and mobile mechanics, and driving awareness for both Trackara and Trackara Pro.



This is a part-time, remote position — perfect for someone who loves cars and social media and wants to be part of a growing startup from the ground floor.





PLATFORMS YOU'LL MANAGE



- YouTube — Long-form and Shorts content, tutorials, product demos, and automotive culture videos

- TikTok — Short-form viral content, trending audio, car culture and behind-the-scenes clips

- Instagram — Reels, Stories, feed posts, and community engagement

-
 — Page management, community building, and group engagement

- LinkedIn — Professional brand presence, thought leadership, and B2B content for Trackara Pro





WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Create, schedule, and publish content across all five platforms on a consistent cadence

- Develop a content calendar aligned with product launches, automotive events, and trending topics

- Write compelling captions, scripts, and copy tailored to each platform's audience

- Engage with followers, respond to comments and DMs, and grow community interaction

- Track analytics and report on key metrics (reach, engagement, follower growth, conversions)

- Collaborate with the founder on brand voice, campaign ideas, and growth strategy

- Stay current on social media trends, algorithm changes, and automotive community culture

- Follow and apply our established brand kit (fonts, colors, logos, tone) consistently across all platforms





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Experience managing social media accounts (personal or professional) with demonstrable growth

- Strong understanding of YouTube, TikTok, Instagram,
, and LinkedIn best practices

- Ability to create engaging short-form video content (filming and basic editing skills a plus)

- Excellent written communication — you can write punchy captions and longer-form copy

- Interest in or knowledge of the automotive space (car culture, mechanics, restoration, etc.)

- Self-starter who can work independently and manage their own schedule

- Experience with Buffer for content scheduling (this is what we use)

- Basic graphic design skills (Canva, Figma, or similar) are a plus — we provide a full brand kit with style guidelines, fonts, colors, and logos





WHY JOIN COMMONER APPS?



- Get in on the ground floor of a growing automotive tech brand

- Creative freedom — your ideas will directly shape our brand voice and presence

- Work alongside a passionate founder who lives and breathes cars and technology

- Flexible schedule that fits around your life

- Opportunity to grow into a larger role as the company scales

title: Senior Front-End Developer (Vue.js) - REMOTE
description:
We’re looking for a Senior Front-End Vue.js Developer to support key initiatives in our company. This role is ideal for someone who can quickly ramp up, work within established codebases, and make an immediate impact.



What You’ll Do:

- Build and maintain scalable front-end applications using Vue.js (Vue 2)

- Develop high-traffic e-commerce platforms with modern JavaScript and CSS

- Integrate front-end applications with RESTful APIs and backend systems

- Ensure performance, accessibility (ADA/WCAG), and responsive design

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams in an Agile environment



What We’re Looking For:

- 5+ years of Front-End Development experience

- Strong Vue.js (Vue 2), JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, and CSS3 skills

title: Sales Representative
description:
The Sales Representative is responsible for generating new clients for MOG Industries by reaching out to potential customers such as real estate agencies, builders, property managers, and commercial businesses.

The role involves making outbound calls, sending
s or messages, and following up with potential clients to introduce our cleaning and property services and generate quote requests.

All leads and outreach activity should be recorded so client relationships and follow-ups can be managed effectively.

This position is paid at a flat hourly rate and requires consistent daily outreach to identify and secure new business opportunities.

title: Q/A Tester
description:
Overview:

Looking for expert to review a talent platform and fix anything missed. You should have experience in marketplace applications (preferably job boards) who can advise on what’s missing, what should be improved, and which best practices or technologies to integrate ahead of launch.



Task List:



Review the entire platform and identify anything that may be missing



Make recommendations for additional features to enhance the user experience



Conduct QA testing: go through every flow, attempt to break functionality, test edge cases, and test across different browsers and devices



Deliver a detailed bug report that I can work through



Fix any critical issues you identify



Requirements:



Experience building and testing job boards or similar SaaS marketplaces



Experience with Next.js and Supabase



Experience with QA testing



Experience with Claude Code

title: CAD Drafter/Renderer
description:
We’re seeking a detail-oriented CAD Drafter/Renderer to produce accurate shop drawings and high-quality 3D renderings for custom millwork, cabinetry, and kitchen projects. This role supports the design and production process by translating concepts, field measurements, and designer markups into clear, buildable drawings (plans, elevations, sections, and details), coordinating revisions, and preparing visuals for client presentations and internal approvals. 



The ideal candidate is highly organized, strong in drafting standards and dimensioning and able to collaborate closely with designers, project managers, and the shop to ensure drawings are accurate, complete, and aligned with fabrication requirements. Experience in millwork/cabinetry drafting and rendering is required, along with excellent attention to detail.



Must apply using this link,

title: Online Elementary Tutor  (Math, Science, English - Full-time)
description:
FULL-TIME ONLINE ELEMENTARY TUTOR

Stable Salary + Lesson Bonuses | Long-Term Position



A for Effort is a premium tutoring center based in Jakarta, Indonesia. We support students from international schools studying programs such as IB, IGCSE, and other international curricula.



We are expanding our online tutoring team and are looking for a reliable full-time Elementary Tutor based in the Philippines. All lessons are in English.



This is a full-time long-term position, not freelance tutoring. We are looking for serious long-term tutors who can commit to completing the academic school year to ensure continuity for our students.



WORKING HOURS

Tutors must be available during our teaching hours:



Weekdays

12:00 PM – 8:30 PM Jakarta time (GMT+7)



Saturdays (if lessons are scheduled)

9:00 AM – 4:30 PM Jakarta time



Schedules may vary slightly depending on lesson bookings.



When tutors are not teaching, they will participate in:



• lesson preparation

• tutor workshops

• academic training

• tea
etings



LESSON FORMAT

Lessons are conducted one-on-one or in small semi-private sessions (maximum 2 students).



COMPENSATION

Base salary: PHP 26,000 per month.



Class bonus: Tutors also receive additional bonuses per class, based on the number of lessons taught.



Tutors are guaranteed the base salary at all times. In addition, tutors receive additional monthly bonuses according to the number of lessons they teach.



Full compensation details will be discussed during the interview.



ROLE

You will teach elementary to early middle school students in one-on-one online lessons. All lessons are in English.



Subjects may include:

• Math

• Science

• English (general English, not ESL)



Tutors should be comfortable teaching multiple elementary subjects, and math up to early middle school level.



REQUIREMENTS

Strong English communication skills

Comfortable teaching elementary students across multiple subjects

Reliable internet connection

Quiet teaching environment

Professional and punctual

Interested in long-term stable employment



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



We only consider personalized applications that clearly respond to this job posting. Please include the following information in your message:

 • Your teaching experience

 • Subjects and grade levels you are comfortable teaching

 • Availability for full-time teaching role

 • A short introduction about yourself



Please include the word AFETUTOR in the first line of your message so we know you read the full job description.



OPTIONAL DEMO LESSON

Applicants may include a short 5–10 minute demo teaching video explaining a simple concept to an elementary student (for example fractions, multiplication, or basic science). This is optional but helps your application stand out.



NOTE

If you specialize in middle school or high school mathematics, please check our Math Tutor position also listed.

title: YouTube Long-Form Video Editor (Entrepreneurship / Business Content)
description:
I run a growing YouTube channel focused on entrepreneurship, online business, and eBay automation. I'm looking for a video editor to help turn raw recordings into polished long-form YouTube videos.



This will typically be 1–2 videos per week.



Videos are usually 8–15 minutes long and include screen recordings, talking segments, and tutorials.



Responsibilities:



• Edit long-form YouTube videos

• Cut mistakes and improve pacing

• Add zooms, graphics, captions, and transitions when helpful

• Add background music when appropriate

• Deliver clean, engaging YouTube videos ready to upload



Requirements:



• Experience editing YouTube videos

• Good sense of pacing and storytelling

• Familiar with modern YouTube editing styles

• Reliable communication and ability to meet deadlines



Compensation:



This will be paid per video.



Please include your rate per video in your application.



Typical workload is 1–2 videos per week.



Opportunity for long-term work as the channel grows.



To apply



Please send:



- Examples of YouTube videos you have edited



- Your rate per video



- Your typical turnaround time for a video



I look forward to talking with you!

-based)

title: Realestate & Construction Virtual Assitant - Austin Texas
description:
Hours: Full-time (30-40 hrs/week, Austin, TX time zone CST)

Salary: Competitive, based on experience





About the Company



We’re a high-end residential design-build and real estate firm based in Austin, Texas, focused on remodeling, flipping, and selling homes. We pride ourselves on craftsmanship, integrity, and efficiency. We’re looking for a dedicated, detail-oriented, and trustworthy Virtual Assistant to become a key part of our growing team.





Your Core Responsibilities

• Manage and organize the owner’s schedule, coordinating between contractors, clients, and vendors

• Follow up on invoices, payments, and vendor bills

• Track project timelines, budgets, and document deadlines

• Assist with real estate listings, scheduling showings, and coordinating closings

• Maintain files, folders, and updates in Google Drive, QuickBooks, and shared project management tools

• Anticipate upcoming tasks — plan ahead and proactively suggest next steps





Ideal Candidate

• Trustworthy, highly organized, and self-starting

• Excellent English communication (written & spoken)

• Strong skills in Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive) and QuickBooks

• Experience in real estate, construction, or property management is a plus

• Able to work independently and think two steps ahead

• Detail-oriented with excellent follow-through

• Values honesty, confidentiality, and accountability





Requirements

• At least 3 years of experience as a Virtual Assistant or Operations Assistant

• College degree preferred (Business, Accounting, or Admin-related fields a plus)

• Reliable internet connection and strong daily availability

• Comfortable working in CST time zone (Austin, Texas)





To Apply



Please send:

1. A short introduction about yourself and your background

2. A 1-minute video introduction (optional but preferred)

3. Your resume (PDF format)

4. Your expected monthly salary (in PHP)



Subject line: “Virtual Assistant – [Your Name] – [Your Years of Experience]”

title: Email Marketing & Community Manager (Klaviyo)
description:
We are hiring a Part-Time
 Marketing & Community Manager to oversee our
 campaigns and marketing announcements across our gaming marketplace.



This role will focus primarily on Klaviyo
 marketing, including campaign management, flow improvements, and promotional planning for events such as new game releases, seasonal sales, and special promotions.

You will also assist with community announcements, helping promote new product launches, giveaways, and updates across our platforms.



Initially, you will work alongside our existing
 marketing agency by reviewing campaigns, proposing improvements, and helping manage the
 marketing calendar. Over time, this role will gradually transition into fully managing our
 marketing in-house.



This is a long-term role starting part-time, with the potential to grow into a full-time marketing position.



Responsibilities

 Marketing (Primary Focus)

• Manage and review
 campaigns using Klaviyo

 • Update and optimize
 flows (welcome flows, abandoned cart flows, etc.)

 • Plan promotional campaigns for events such as seasonal sales, game releases, and special promotions

 • Analyze
 performance metrics (open rates, click rates, revenue performance)

 • Suggest improvements to campaigns and
 automation

Initially, you will work with our existing marketing agency to review and approve campaigns before they are sent.



Campaign Planning

• Help maintain an
 campaign calendar

 • Suggest campaign ideas for product launches, sales, and promotions

 • Coordinate promotional messaging with product launches and new services

 • Typically we send one campaign per week, though during busy periods such as major sales or BFCM this will temporarily increase.



Community Announcements

• Create announcements for new product packs and services

 • Help promote giveaways and special promotions

 • Assist with marketing updates posted to our community channels

 Design & Coordination

Ideally you can do either one, or a mix of both of the following:

• Design high-quality
 layouts using tools such as Klaviyo, Canva, Figma, or similar tools

OR

• Coordinate with designers to ensure
s are visually polished, well-structured, and aligned with campaign goals

 campaigns should maintain a high standard of design and presentation, similar to leading ecommerce brands.



Requirements (Mandatory)

Applicants MUST have experience with Klaviyo.

You should be comfortable with:

• Managing
 campaigns

 • Updating
 flows

 • Understanding
 performance metrics

 • Basic
 design or coordination with designers

• Experience with ecommerce
 marketing



Additional requirements:

• Strong written English

 • Organized and detail-oriented



Bonus Experience (Not required but helpful)

 • Canva, Figma, or basic design skills

 • D(i)scord or community management experience

 • Experience working with marketing agencies



How to Apply

Please include the following:

1) Introduction

A short introduction about yourself and your
 marketing experience.

2) Klaviyo Experience

Describe your experience working with Klaviyo, including:

• campaigns you have managed

 • flows you have worked on

 • any results you helped achieve

3) Example

Provide one example of a Klaviyo campaign or flow you have worked on. Finally, include the word “CACTUS” at the beginning of your application so we know you read this job post.

*

pany page growth

title: Admin Assistant (Construction)
description:
We are seeking a strong, highly organized Administrative Assistant to support the daily operations of our construction company. This role will handle a wide range of administrative tasks including scheduling, coordinating office activities, managing emails and documents, preparing quotes and estimates, assisting with customer and vendor communication, and providing light bookkeeping support such as invoice tracking, data entry, and basic account follow-up. 



The ideal candidate has excellent verbal and written communication skills, is professional, detail-oriented, and able to keep multiple priorities organized in a fast-paced environment. Experience in construction or a similar industry is a plus. Strong graphics, marketing, and social media skills are a major advantage, as this person may also assist with creating simple visual materials, updating company content, and supporting the company’s online presence.



Must apply using this link,

title: Full-Time Remote Bookkeeper / In-House Accountant
description:
We are a Marketing and Sales organization company based in United States. We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented In-House Accountant/Bookkeeper to join our team full-time and take ownership of our day-to-day financial operations.



Work Schedule:



Full-time (40 hours/week)



Working Hours: 1PM - 9PM PST



Key Responsibilities:



Manage day-to-day accounting operations, including Accounts Payable (AP) and Accounts Receivable (AR).



Perform weekly and monthly bank and credit card reconciliations.



Maintain an accurate and up-to-date General Ledger.



Prepare monthly financial statements (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow).



Assist with processing payroll and managing vendor payments.



Ensure data accuracy and flag any financial discrepancies to management.



Assist with year-end tax preparation by organizing documents for our CPA.



Requirements:



Bachelor’s Degree in Accountancy, Finance, or a related field (CPA is a plus, but not required).



3+ years of bookkeeping/accounting experience, preferably working with [US/UK/AU] businesses.



Strong proficiency in QuickBooks Online and Google Sheets.



Excellent written and spoken English.



High attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines without micromanagement.



Technical/Workspace Requirements (Strictly Enforced):



A quiet, dedicated home office space.



A reliable computer/laptop with a working webcam for tea
etings.



Stable high-speed internet (Minimum 25 Mbps) with a backup connection.



Backup power source in case of local power outages.



What We Offer:



Competitive salary of $350/wk Plus 14 Days Vacation, All USA Federal Holidays off 



Standard [US/UK/AU] holidays off.



A respectful, communicative, and long-term work environment.



How to Apply:

If you are confident you are the right fit for this role, please apply with your updated resume. To ensure you have read this entire post, please change the subject line of your application/email to: "Detailed Accountant: [Your Favorite Color]". Applications without this subject line will be ignored.

title: CAD

title: YouTube Channel Manager
description: We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented YouTube Channel Manager to support and grow The Nonprofit Guy brand on YouTube. The Nonprofit Guy is a leading platform that teaches nonprofit founders and leaders how to start, fund, and scale their organizations. This role will be responsible for reviewing long-form video content for quality assurance, uploading and scheduling videos, writing engaging and SEO-optimized titles, creating strong show notes and descriptions, ensuring thumbnails are created and uploaded, and organizing playlists and channel structure. The YouTube Channel Manager will help ensure every video is properly prepared and positioned to reach nonprofit leaders, entrepreneurs, and change-makers who follow our content. The ideal candidate understands YouTube best practices, is highly organized, and is passionate about helping educational and mission-driven content grow and reach a larger audience.

title: AI Content Production Assistant (HeyGen + Google Flow Experience Required) – Hiring ASAP
description:
About The Role



I run growing social media pages in the beauty and haircare niche creating AI generated UGC style short form videos for TikTok, Instagram, and
.



We are expanding production immediately and I am looking to fill this role ASAP.



I am specifically looking for someone who already has hands on experience using:



• HeyGen

• Google Flow (Nano banana Pro, Veo 3)

• AI image generation tools

• Prompt driven content workflows



This is not a beginner role.



You should already be comfortable generating AI avatar videos, managing prompts, rendering clips, and organizing assets.



What You’ll Be Doing



• Generate AI avatar videos using HeyGen

• Run AI video generations in Google Flow (Veo 3)

• Generate supporting images when needed

• Source b-rolls/clips to enhance edit

• Manage prompt adjustments for consistent results

• Edit final 60–120 second vertical videos in CapCut

• Stitch together AI clips and hook variations

• Maintain clean Drive organization

• Prepare multiple hook variations per body



This role requires both technical execution and attention to short form content pacing.



Compensation Structure



Trial Period (First 1–2 Weeks)



Part time

4–5 hours per day

5 days per week

$3 per hour



If performance is strong and you can independently manage full AI production:



Compensation transitions to a flat $550 monthly structure.

8 hours/day



This is long term work for the right person.



Required Experience



• CapCut/Video editing experience (short form vertical content)

• Hands on experience with HeyGen

• Hands on experience with Google Flow / Veo 3

• Understanding of AI prompting for consistent outputs

• Organized file management

• Reliable internet and stable computer

• Good English communication



Important:

It is strongly preferred that you already have access to these AI tools. I am not looking to fund new tool subscriptions during the trial period.



Ideal Candidate



• Calm and structured

• Comfortable with repetitive production workflows

• Understands short form retention and hooks

• Can follow clear systems

• Interested in long term growth



Work Structure



• Flexible hours, deadlines matter

• Clear production expectations

• Organized workflow via 
 + Google Drive

• Long term growth opportunity in AI content production



How To Apply



To be considered:



Send links to 3 short form vertical videos you’ve created using AI tools.



Confirm which AI tools you currently have access to (HeyGen, Google Flow, etc).



Include the word “FLOW” in your message.



Tell me your internet speed.



Tell me how many full AI generated videos (including generation + edit) you can realistically produce in 5 hours.



Briefly explain your experience using HeyGen or Google Flow.



I am looking to hire immediately.



About Me



I’m a Vietnamese American entrepreneur originally from California, currently building and scaling digital media brands in the beauty niche.



I value autonomy and results. I don’t micromanage, but I do expect consistency and communication.



If you take pride in your work and want to grow in the AI content space long term, this could be a strong fit.

title: Experienced Client & Event Coordinator
description:
Authority On Demand is the premier authority-building firm for founders, CEOs, and category leaders who refuse to be ordinary. Recently recognized on the 2025 Inc. 5000 as #146 nationally and #1 in Public Relations & Publishing, we engineer "Category of One" status for the world’s most influential voices.



We are looking for a Client & Event Coordinator to join our elite team and manage the seamless execution of these high-stakes opportunities.



Role Overview:



As a Client & Event Coordinator, you will be the vital link between our high-profile clients (CEOs, entrepreneurs, and thought leaders) and global event organizers. You will manage professional logistics, coordinate keynote details, and ensure smooth communication so that our clients experience a world-class journey from the green room to the main stage.



This role requires working in the EST time zone to align with our North American clients and media partners.



Key Responsibilities



1. Conduct professional calls with clients and event organizers.

2. Coordinate event details, schedules, and requirements between both parties.

3. Act as the primary point of contact for updates, queries, and clarifications.

4. Maintain detailed records of communication and provide status reports to the management team.

5. Ensure smooth client experiences by proactively resolving coordination issues.

6. Uphold a high standard of verbal and written English communication at all times.



Requirements



- Excellent command of spoken and written English.

- Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

- Prior experience in client coordination, event management, or customer-facing roles preferred.

- Ability to multitask, prioritize, and stay organized under pressure.

- Professional phone etiquette and ability to handle calls confidently.

- Proactive, detail-oriented, and reliable.

- Must be available to work during EST working hours.



What We Offer



- Competitive compensation package.

- Opportunity to work with international clients and global event organizers.

- A dynamic, mission-driven work environment.

- Growth opportunities within a fast-scaling company.



How to Apply



If you are passionate about communication, coordination, and client success, we’d love to hear from you!



Apply by sharing your CV and a short cover letter and A SHORT VIDEO INTRO.

title: Financial Accountant (Fully Qualified Only CPA/ACCA etc)
description:
As our Financial Accountant, you'll be the backbone of our financial health, ensuring accuracy and compliance across all financial operations. You'll be responsible for managing financial records, preparing detailed reports, and overseeing budgets and forecasts. This role requires a meticulous eye for detail and a proactive approach to financial planning and analysis. You’ll work closely with various departments to provide insights and ensure our financial practices align with industry standards. A proven track record in accounting, a deep understanding of financial regulations, and the ability to navigate complex financial data are essential for this position



Responsibilities:

- Financial Record Keeping: Maintain and update accurate financial records, including ledgers, journals (including payroll, accruals, prepayments, deferrals), and bank reconciliations.

- Financial Reporting: Prepare and present monthly, quarterly, and annual management accounts to provide insights into the company’s financial performance.

- Financial Statements Preparation: Work closely with the external accountant to prepare the year end financial statements in compliance with accounting standards and regulations.

- Budgeting and Forecasting: Develop and manage budgets, forecasts, and financial plans to support strategic business decisions.

- Accounts Payable and Receivable: Manage the AP and AR functions including raising invoices, posting bills, PO system (Spendesk) managing the month end payment to suppliers and chasing customers for payments.

- Cash Flow Management: Maintain accurate monthly cash flow forecasts.

- Expense Tracking: Analyze and control company expenses to ensure alignment with budgetary constraints and financial goals.

- Payroll Processing: Manage payroll activities, including salary calculations, benefits administration, employee expenses, and compliance with employment laws.

- Internal Controls: Implement and maintain internal controls to safeguard company assets and ensure accurate financial reporting.

- Financial Software Management: Utilize and manage financial software tools for accounting, reporting, and data analysis.

Team Collaboration: Work closely with other departments to provide financial insights and support strategic planning and operational efficiency.



Your Authentic Self

Ceartas values diversity, authenticity, and innovative thinking. We encourage you to bring your unique self to work, where you can share your passion, ideas, and personality in a vibrant and inclusive workplace





Must-Haves

Relevant Qualification: A recognized accounting qualification such as ACCA, ACA, CIMA, or equivalent.

Proven Experience: At least 5 years of experience in financial accounting or a related field.

Software Proficiency: Fully adept at using Xero and Stripe for financial management and reporting.

Work hours: 1pm Philippine Standard Time to 9.30pm Philippine Standard Time

Financial Reporting: Strong skills in preparing and analyzing financial statements, including balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements.

Accounts Management: Experience in managing accounts payable and receivable, invoicing, and payment processing.

Attention to Detail: Exceptional accuracy and attention to detail in financial data handling and reporting.





What We Offer:

Supportive leadership committed to your personal and professional development.

Fully remote role

15 paid days off per year, plus public holidays, and your birthday!

A culture of innovation and learning.

A vibrant startup environment with a supportive diverse team

Company-sponsored health insurance - fully paid.

Employee recognition and reward program.

An inclusive workplace that celebrates diversity and equal opportunity

title: Creative Agency Project Manager
description:
Pivot Studios | Phoenix, AZ (Remote-Friendly)



About Pivot Studios



Pivot Studios is a production studio and creative agency helping modern brands, entrepreneurs, and service-based businesses turn content into authority and growth. We sit at the intersection of storytelling, strategy, and execution and we move fast.



We’re growing, and we’re looking for a Creative Agency Project Manager who can bring structure to creativity and help keep our clients, team, and strategies aligned.



?



The Role



This role is the hub of the agency. You will oversee multiple client accounts, manage timelines, guide creative strategy, and ensure execution stays sharp while the founder focuses on sales and growth.



You’re not here to micromanage. You’re here to orchestrate. A players like to work with A players and we are looking for our next talented PM. DO NOT APPLY IF YOU CRACK UNDER PRESSURE



?



What You’ll Be Responsible For

 • Managing all active client accounts and project timelines

 • Translating creative strategy into clear action steps for editors, designers, and media staff

 • Overseeing short-form, long-form, podcast, ad, and social media deliverables

 • Ensuring content aligns with brand voice, platform best practices, and performance goals

 • Coordinating with paid ads and funnel teams to align content with campaigns

 • Running internal check-ins and keeping the team aligned and moving forward

 • Proactively identifying bottlenecks, risks, or misalignment before they become issues

 • Acting as a bridge between leadership vision and day-to-day execution



?



What We’re Looking For

 • Strong understanding of video production, social media, and digital marketing

 • Working knowledge of paid ads (Meta, short-form creative, hooks, CTAs)

 • High emotional intelligence and strong cognitive resonance (you “get” people and ideas quickly)

 • Organized, calm under pressure, and able to juggle multiple projects at once

 • Clear communicator who can give direction without ego

 • Proactive problem solver you don’t wait to be told

 • Experience managing creative teams or agency workflows is a big plus



?



What Success Looks Like

 • Projects move on time without constant follow-ups

 • Clients feel confident, informed, and excited

 • The creative team knows exactly what’s expected of them

 • Leadership is freed up to focus on growth instead of daily fires



?



Why Pivot Studios

 • You’ll work with ambitious brands and high-performing clients

 • You’ll help shape creative strategy, not just execute tasks

 • You’ll have real ownership and impact as the agency scales

 • No corporate red tape just clarity, trust, and high standards

title: Amazon PPC & SEO Specialist
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented Amazon PPC & SEO Specialist to help grow our lip balm brand on Amazon. This role focuses on improving product visibility, optimizing listings, and managing advertising campaigns to increase sales and profitability. The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with Amazon Seller Central, keyword optimization, and PPC campaign management.



Key Responsibilities:

 Amazon PPC Management

 - Create, manage, and optimize Amazon Sponsored Ads campaigns.

 - Conduct keyword research and implement high-performing keywords in campaigns.

 - Monitor and adjust bids, budgets, and targeting to maximize ROAS and reduce ACoS.

 - Perform search term analysis and add negative keywords to improve efficiency.

 - Test new campaign structures and strategies to scale profitable ads.



Amazon SEO & Listing Optimization

 - Optimize product titles, bullet points, descriptions, backend keywords, and A+ content.

 - Improve product rankings and organic visibility on Amazon search results.

 - Monitor keyword rankings and adjust strategies to maintain or improve positions.



Performance Monitoring & Reporting

 - Track key performance metrics including CTR, conversion rate, ACoS, TACoS, and organic ranking.

 - Provide reports on campaign performance and listing improvements.

 - Identify growth opportunities and recommend strategies to increase sales.



Competitor & Market Research

 - Analyze competitor listings, pricing, keywords, and ad strategies.

 - Identify opportunities to differentiate and improve product positioning.

title: Bookkeeper & Administrative Assistant
description:
*** Applicants must have experience working with Australian businesses ***



We are a small family run grocery store in New South Wales, Australia. 



We are looking to recruit a highly experienced part-time employee (20 hours per week, with some flexibility) that will do Bookkeeping and Administrative tasks for the day to day running of our business. 



Tasks include: 

* Bookkeeping including use of Xero (must be highly skilled in use of Xero) 

* Administrative tasks including: 

-
 management 

- Document writing 

- Supplier communication e.g. requesting refunds

- Developing & updating spreadsheets using excel 

- Using a cloud based management software for our grocery store e.g. updating prices 

- Other administrative projects as needed



TO APPLY FOR THIS ROLE…. Please do not
 us directly. Please only use the onlinejobs.ph platform. 



Pleas note: The person we communicate with and interview, must be the person that we employ to undertake this work. Please do not apply if you are not going to be the person we employ and have working directly with us. 



Please answer the following questions: 



1. Have you worked with Australian businesses before? If yes, please answer the next 6 questions. If no, please do not apply. 



2. Do you have Bookkeeping experience with Australian businesses? If yes, please answer the next 5 questions. If no, please do not apply. 



3. Describe your specific experience using Xero for Australian grocery or retail businesses, including managing GST compliance, BAS preparation and Australian payroll compliance. Please include how many years of Xero and bookkeeping experience you have.   

 

4. Describe your experience providing administrative support to a remote Australian business.   

 

5. Have you worked with grocery store or retail cloud-based inventory management systems before?  

 

6. Given that this is a family-run grocery store, how do you approach communication and reporting with business owners who may not have extensive accounting knowledge?  



7. This is a part time role of 20 hours per week. What is your availability throughout the week to undertake this work.

title: Admin / Executive Assistant role
description:
Company: Metro Deco Construction

Location: Remote

Work Hours: Sydney 8am–5pm

Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

Salary: $1000 AUD per month

Start Date: ASAP



About Us



Metro Deco is a leading commercial fitout company based in Sydney with over 20 years of experience. We specialise in retail, hospitality, and shopping centre fitouts. We have an in-house joinery factory and work across major shopping centres in NSW.



We are now expanding our remote team to streamline operations and grow sustainably.



About the Role



You will work closely with the director and project team to assist with administration, documentation, and communication tracking across multiple construction projects.



Your role is to keep project information organised, log communications, and maintain structured documentation so the team can operate efficiently.



This is an administration and documentation role, not a project management or client-facing position.



Responsibilities



• Log and organise project communications from WhatsApp,
, and internal chats

• Maintain structured project folders (Google Drive / Dropbox)

• Save and organise drawings, contracts, quotes and variations

• Track updates and decisions discussed within the team

• Assist with preparing
s and simple documentation

• Maintain project logs, trackers and notes

• Assist the director with general administrative tasks

• Help ensure the latest documents and drawings are correctly saved



Requirements



• At least 1–2 years experience as an Administrative Assistant, Executive Assistant, or Personal Assistant

• Strong English communication (written and spoken)

• Highly organised and detail oriented

• Ability to follow instructions carefully

• Reliable internet connection, own PC or laptop

• Comfortable using Google Drive,
, and messaging platforms



Nice to Have



• Experience supporting construction, architecture or engineering companies

• Experience organising project documentation

• Familiarity with project tracking systems such as Notion, Trello, or similar tools

• Experience working with international teams



Perks



• Work-from-home, flexible environment

• Long-term stability (we’re not hiring for short gigs)

• Work with a tight-knit team who value clarity and quality

• Room for career growth as we scale



Application Process



To apply for the Executive Assistant / Administrative Assistant position, please follow the steps outlined below:



1. Prepare Your Application



Compile your resume, cover letter, and any relevant documents that showcase your experience in administration or executive support.



2. Submit Your Application



 your application materials to 



Please include "Admin VA Application" in the subject line to ensure proper routing.



Required Documents



Resume / CV



Qualifications (if applicable)



References



Screenshot of your Internet Speed Test



English Test Results which can be completed here:


/english-test/



Typing Test Results which can be completed here:





Short Written Response



Please also answer the following question in your application
:



Why do you believe strong organisation and documentation are important when working on construction projects?



Review Process



Our recruitment team will review applications on a rolling basis. Qualified candidates will be contacted for an initial screening interview.



Interviews



Selected candidates will be invited to participate in one or more interviews. This may include interviews with the Owner or other key tea
mbers and may include practical assessments relevant to the role.



Decision and Offer



Final candidates will be selected based on their interviews and reference checks. An offer will be extended to the chosen candidate, including a detailed overview of the compensation package.



Onboarding



Upon acceptance, the new tea
mber will undergo an onboarding process to become familiar with our team, systems, and workflow.



We appreciate your interest in joining Metro Deco and look forward to reviewing your application.



For any inquiries regarding the application process or the position, please
 us at

title: Customer Success Specialist
description:
Do you find joy in building meaningful client relationships, supporting their success, and being a trusted guide as they reach their goals? If you’re someone who thrives on connection and collaboration, we’d be delighted to welcome you to our team!



About Us:



Kalicube is a premium Digital Branding Consultancy for entrepreneurs in the AI era. Leveraging 9.4 billion data points, Kalicube gives entrepreneurs unprecedented control over how they're represented to decision-makers online through visible, influential personal brands that open doors rather than close them. Kalicube is the powerhouse of Knowledge Panel and Brand SERP services.



Job Summary:



At Kalicube, our clients’ success is at the heart of everything we do. As a Customer Success Specialist, you’ll be their trusted advocate, helping them achieve their Brand SERP and Knowledge Panel goals. This role is all about building lasting relationships, providing proactive support, and guiding clients so they gain the full value of Kalicube’s services and the Kalicube Pro SaaS platform.



Your Key Responsibilities:



Be the primary point of contact for a portfolio of Kalicube clients, fostering trust and strong relationships.

Lead onboarding for new clients, ensuring they feel confident and supported from day one.

Proactively connect with clients to understand their goals and help them get the most out of Kalicube’s services and software.

Manage essential account setup and maintenance tasks, such as accurately classifying page types in the Kalicube Pro platform.

Create and adapt client-specific playbooks (using company templates) to provide clear, tailored roadmaps.

Respond promptly and helpfully to client questions via
, chat, and video calls.

Share best practices on Brand SERPs and Knowledge Panels using Kalicube’s proven methodology.

Monitor client health and platform usage to identify and address potential issues early.

Collect and share client feedback to support continuous improvement of our products and services.

Keep accurate, detailed records of client interactions and progress in our CRM.



Skills and Traits:



Excellent written and spoken English with proactive and clear communication.

Strong interpersonal skills with a genuine passion for relationships, empathy, and helping others succeed.

Highly organized with the ability to balance client-facing and internal tasks effectively.

Careful attention to detail, especially in process-driven work like data classification and documentation.

Professional maturity and resilience — able to stay composed and positive in a fast-paced environment.

Logical, objective approach to solving problems and making decisions.

Comfortable learning and working with new software platforms quickly.

Previous experience in customer service, customer success, or account management is a plus, but not required.

Genuine interest in digital marketing, SEO, or online brand management.



What Kalicube Offers:



Work Arrangement: 100% remote, 40 hours a week

Starting Salary: 91USD/week, paid weekly

Salary Review: After 3 months subject for salary increase

Internet Subsidy: Paid monthly, after 3 months

Paid Vacation: 2 weeks of paid vacation after 12 months

SSS, Pag-ibig and PhilHealth: Contributions paid monthly, after 3 months

Bonus: 13th-month bonus, prorated

Career Growth: Opportunities for long-term growth within the company

Work Atmosphere: Courageous, smart, fun, family-friendly, and diverse.



You won’t just join a team—you’ll be part of a supportive family that truly cares about your growth and success. If you’re ready to share your Customer Success expertise with a company that values people as much as client outcomes, we’d be excited to receive your application!



Important links to visit before applying:













How to Apply: 



To maximize your chances of moving forward, please review the full job details and ensure you read and follow the application instructions provided in this document:

title: Executive Assistant
description:

title: Legal Operations Specialist
description:
We are a growing legaltech company helping internationally mobile individuals and families prepare estate-planning documents across jurisdictions. We are preparing for our next phase of growth in Singapore and are looking for Legal Operations Specialists to join our operations team and help deliver a smooth customer experience.



This is a full-time remote role for someone with strong attention to detail, ideally some prior legal, paralegal, court, or compliance-related experience, and availability to start immediately.



What you’ll do



You will help manage customer cases from draft to completion as part of our operations team.



Your work will include reviewing customer information and legal documents against internal checklists and SOPs, identifying missing or inconsistent information, coordinating revisions and translations, following up on outstanding items, and helping prepare files for court submission.



You will also help guide clients through submission-related steps, keep internal records accurate, and escalate issues when needed.



You should be comfortable working in a structured, process-driven environment where SOPs, internal systems, and AI tools are part of day-to-day work.



The initial focus of the role will be on UAE-related cases, with scope to support additional markets over time.



You may be a good fit if you have experience in:



- legal or paralegal support

- court or case support work

- compliance, onboarding, or KYC



A law degree is welcome but not required.



We are looking for someone who:



- writes clearly and professionally in English

- has very strong attention to detail

- is comfortable reviewing formal documents carefully

- can follow SOPs and structured processes reliably

- is comfortable using AI tools as part of day-to-day work

- is comfortable communicating with clients 

- can work hours with meaningful overlap with Gulf business hours

- is available to start immediately



Working arrangement



- Full time

- Fully remote

- Working hours should overlap meaningfully with Gulf business hours

- Immediate start preferred



Compensation



USD 1,400 to 1,600 per month, depending on experience and fit.



There is also a monthly performance bonus tied to quality, turnaround time, and customer satisfaction.



Application process



To apply, please send your CV and answer the short questions below.



1. A brief description of any legal, paralegal, court, compliance, or other document-heavy operations experience you have

2. Why you think you would be a good fit for this role

3. Your availability and earliest possible start date

4. Start the first line of your application with: Atlas



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to an interview. Candidates may also be asked to complete a paid work sample involving review of a sample case, identification of issues, and drafting of a short customer message based on provided SOPs and templates.

title: Local SEO Specialist + Website Editor (Framer)
description:
Local SEO Specialist + Website Editor (Framer)



Entertainment Agency | $7–$8 USD/hr | 10–15 hrs per week



About Us



We are a Melbourne-based entertainment agency providing performers and event experiences for private functions, parties, and corporate events.



Our website is already established, however our Google search optimisation is not fully complete, and we are looking for an experienced SEO specialist to properly structure and optimise the site.



Our goal is to improve local search visibility, Google rankings, and booking enquiries from organic search traffic.



Our website is built using Framer, so applicants must be comfortable editing and implementing SEO changes inside Framer.



?



Role Overview



We are looking for someone who can both plan and implement SEO improvements, not just provide reports.



You will work directly on the website to improve search visibility and complete the optimisation work that has not yet been fully implemented.



This role focuses on local SEO and search performance in Melbourne and surrounding areas.



?



Hours & Pay



First 3 months:

• 15 hours per week

• $7–$8 USD per hour



After the first 3 months (ongoing for 6-12 months +):

• 10 hours per week

• Same hourly rate



This role is ongoing if results and communication are strong.



?



Responsibilities



• Perform a full SEO audit of the website

• Complete the remaining Google search optimisation work

• Keyword research focused on Melbourne and surrounding suburbs

• On-page optimisation (meta titles, descriptions, headings, alt text)

• Create and optimise location-based landing pages

• Improve internal linking structure

• Implement structured data where relevant

• Optimise Google Business Profile visibility

• Build Australian business citations and directories

• Analyse competitor search strategies

• Track keyword rankings and organic search growth

• Provide simple monthly updates on progress



Tools such as Google Search Console, GA4, Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar may be used to monitor performance.



?



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



• Proven experience with Local SEO for service-based businesses

• Must know how to work inside Framer and implement SEO changes directly on the website

• Experience improving Google search rankings and Maps visibility

• Strong understanding of keyword research and search intent

• Strong written English for editing website pages

• Ability to clearly explain what work is being done and why



?



Important – Please Read



We are not looking for sales pitches or SEO packages.



We are hiring someone to do the SEO work, not sell services.



Do not apply if you:



• Send sales messages or SEO packages

• Send agency presentations or generic proposals

• Cannot show real results from past SEO work



Applications that ignore these instructions will not be considered.



?



How to Apply



Please send one recent SEO project from the last 12 months where you personally handled the work.



Include:

	1.	Website URL

	2.	Primary keywords targeted

	3.	Ranking position before you started

	4.	Current ranking position

	5.	Screenshot of organic traffic or ranking improvement

	6.	Bullet points explaining what you personally implemented



If you cannot provide before-and-after data, please do not apply.
