title: AI Automation Engineer, OpenClaw and Agent Systems
description:
7 Leaves is expanding its technology capabilities to build intelligent systems that improve operations, customer experience, and decision making across our growing café network. We are looking for a builder who can design, deploy, and continuously improve AI agents powered by OpenClaw and Claude.



This role focuses on creating practical AI systems that automate workflows, connect our business platforms, and help our teams move faster with better information.



If you enjoy building real systems, experimenting with new AI tools, and turning ideas into working automation, this role will give you the space to do that.



What You Will Do



- Build and Operate AI Agent Systems

- Design, deploy, and maintain OpenClaw based AI agents that automate tasks across departments such as operations, marketing, supply chain, and finance.



- Develop AI Automations

- Create AI driven workflows using Claude, APIs, and internal data systems to reduce manual work and improve operational visibility.



- Integrate Business Platforms

- Connect systems such as POS, inventory, HR, loyalty platforms, and internal tools through APIs and automation frameworks.



- Improve AI Agent Performance

- Monitor agent behavior, optimize prompts and workflows, reduce API costs, and improve reliability of automated systems.



- Prototype New AI Capabilities

- Experiment with new AI tools and models to develop solutions for reporting, forecasting, training, analytics, and customer engagement.



- Maintain Secure Infrastructure

- Deploy and manage AI services on Linux servers or VPS environments while protecting API keys, data access, and system security.



- Collaborate Across Teams

- Work closely with Operations, Marketing, Finance, and IT to identify opportunities where AI agents and automation can improve speed, accuracy, and insight.



What You Bring



- Strong Development Skills

- Experience with Python or JavaScript for building automation, APIs, and backend systems.



- AI Agent Experience

- Hands on experience building or deploying AI agents using tools such as OpenClaw, Claude APIs, LangChain, AutoGen, or similar frameworks.



- Systems Integration Skills

- Experience working with APIs, webhooks, and automation platforms to connect multiple systems.



- Linux and Server Environment Experience

- Comfortable working with Linux environments, VPS servers, containers, and command line tools.



- Curiosity for Emerging Technology

- Actively explores new AI tools, models, and frameworks to continuously improve systems.



Alignment With 7 Leaves Culture

Interest in helping a growing café brand use technology to create better experiences for customers and teams.



Why Join 7 Leaves



This role gives you the opportunity to help shape how AI is used inside a growing company. You will work on real operational challenges, build intelligent systems that teams rely on daily, and develop cutting edge AI automation skills.



You will collaborate with leadership, experiment with modern AI technologies, and build systems that directly improve how the company operates.

title: ADMIN EXECUTIVE (B2B, WATSONS, GUARDIAN, WELCIA, BIGSELLER, URSTORE)
description:
Join our team as part of a dynamic, global team of 40 across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia and Philippines.

In this role, you’ll collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of Korean brands such as Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir and other top of trend Korean brands.

We are looking for a driven, and detail-oriented tea
mber to support our brand’s growth across digital and offline channels. You will play a key role in processing POs, coordinating marketing campaigns, managing events, and driving strategies that connect with our beauty brand presence.



Key Responsibilities:



- Work closely with the Channel Lead Manager to support marketing initiatives for key retail accounts (e.g., Watsons, Guardian, DONKI etc.).

- Regularly check the B2B portal system and compile new Purchase Orders (POs).

- Perform data entry of PO details into the internal databases.

- Monitor PO fulfillment and non-fulfillment status.

- Generate Sales Orders in the Bigseller or Urstore and create corresponding Delivery Order forms.

- Coordinate with the warehouse team for all Purchase Orders.

- Support the end-to-end execution of offline activation events, including preparation of marketing collaterals, ensure timely delivery and accuracy of all promotional content across platforms.

- Coordinate new product launches and ensure smooth operations for stock replenishment, product creation, and promotion setups.

- Organize and maintain critical documents, contracts, and records related to channel activities.

- Assist in planning and executing effective marketing campaigns aligned with brand strategy and objectives.

- Collaborate with other departments for adhoc tasks.



Qualifications:

- at least 1-3 relevant working experience in channel admin, channel marketing, or any related field.

- Proficient in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables).

- Experience working in the retail, Korean brands retail, marketing, B2B or ecommerce sector.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel opportunity in Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.

title: All Rounder Acountant (Australian Accounting Firm Experience Preferred)

title: AI Video & E-Learning Content Creator (AI Human Presenter Videos)
description:
Job Description 1



AI Video & E-Learning Content Creator (AI Human Presenter Videos)



About the Role



We are looking for an AI Video & E-Learning Content Creator to help produce high-quality training videos and e-learning modules using AI video tools.



The content will support training programs delivered to clients. After workshops, videos and learning modules are shared with participants to reinforce key concepts and help anchor the knowledge.



Scripts will be provided. Your role will be to transform scripts into professional videos and structured e-learning modules.





Key Responsibilities:

AI Training Video Production

Create professional training videos using human-like AI presenters.



Tasks include:

• Producing videos using tools such as Synthesia, HeyGen, or similar platforms

• Creating AI presenter videos from scripts

• Ensuring natural lip synchronization

• Editing videos and improving pacing

• Adding subtitles

Videos will typically be short learning segments designed to reinforce training content.



E-Learning Module Development

Transform training content into interactive learning modules, including:



• quizzes and knowledge checks

• structured learning paths

• SCORM-compatible content

Modules should be compatible with standard Learning Management Systems (LMS).



Typical tools may include:

• Articulate 360

• Easygenerator

• similar e-learning authoring tools

 



Video Editing & Learning Experience

Improve the overall learning experience by:

• adding simple visuals or slides when relevant

• structuring content clearly for learning

• delivering clean and professional final videos

 



Tools You May Use

Candidates may use tools such as:

• Synthesia

• HeyGen

• Veo / Sora / other AI video tools

• Articulate 360

• Easygenerator

• CapCut / Premiere / Descript

Equivalent tools are acceptable if they achieve similar results.



Required Skills

• Experience creating AI human presenter videos

• Experience building e-learning modules

• Strong video editing skills

• Ability to structure content for learning and engagement

• Good written English

 

Application Requirements

Please include the following in your application:



1?? Links to AI videos you created using human presenters

2?? Links to e-learning modules you built (if available)

3?? The tools you use for AI video and e-learning creation

4?? Your hourly rate

5?? Your estimate of the time required to produce:



- a 2–3 minute training video (situation before the tool presented, presentation of the tool, same situation with participants using the tool: example: 1. A manager provides random feedback to a staff member, since this is not prepared, it is not working well, and both get angry; 2. We introduce the SBI model: Situation, Behavior, Impact; 3. The manager provides the same feedback to the same staff, using the SBI model introduced in 2. And the situation is getting a lot better

- a short e-learning module



Applications without examples of previous work will not be reviewed.



Questions to Answer in Your Application

1. What tools do you use for AI video creation?

2. Please share links to at least 2 AI videos you created.

3. What tools do you use for e-learning creation?

4. Include the word “Red” in the subject of your application to show your attention to details

5. Please share examples of e-learning modules you built.

6. How long does it usually take you to produce:

    o a 2–3 minute training video

    o a short e-learning module?

title: GHL Specialist for Real Estate
description:
READ THIS ENTIRE POST BEFORE APPLYING — TEMPLATED OR AI-GENERATED APPLICATIONS WILL BE DECLINED IMMEDIATELY



POSITION: GoHighLevel Developer & Automation Specialist

Company: Automize

Pay: Monthly Recurring (Long-Term Role)

Platform: GoHighLevel (GHL)

Industry Focus: Real Estate Investing (Wholesaling, Flipping, Rentals)



ABOUT US



Automize REI is an AI-powered real estate investment CRM and automation platform built on GoHighLevel. We serve wholesalers, flippers, and rental property investors with a fully built-out system that includes AI voice integrations (Assistible.ai), AI SMS follow-ups, lead data integrations, disposition automations, and more. We have paying customers, a live WordPress website, and we are actively scaling into new industries beyond real estate. We are operational and growing.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING



This is a hands-on, backend development and operations role. Your responsibilities will include:



- Building, updating, and maintaining GHL automations, workflows, pipelines, custom fields, and sub-accounts

- Setting up and managing A2P 10DLC registration and compliance for new clients, ensuring SMS campaigns are properly configured and compliant

- Onboarding new clients onto the platform — walking them through setup, configurations, and getting them fully operational

- Providing ongoing support to existing users through calls, troubleshooting, and follow-up

- Collecting user feedback and translating it into actionable automation updates and platform improvements

- Researching and implementing new AI tools — including voice, SMS, and conversational AI — to continuously improve our system

- Writing and refining AI prompts for lead qualification, follow-up sequences, and disposition bots — must understand real prompt engineering, not copy-paste from ChatGPT

- Building and improving disposition bots that understand seller motivation, seller psychology, and real estate deal flow

- Researching cost-saving opportunities across SMS, phone, and data usage within GHL

- Updating UI/UX elements within GHL sub-accounts and snapshot configurations to improve user experience

- Helping curate and improve our WordPress website, including SEO and design updates

- Creating visual workflow diagrams and documentation of automations

- Staying ahead of GHL platform updates and proactively recommending improvements

- Supporting our data provider integration for automated lead delivery and property research within GHL





WHO THIS IS FOR



This role is for you if:



- You have hands-on GHL development experience — not theoretical, not surface-level

- You understand real estate investing: wholesaling, seller motivation, ARV, deal disposition, skip tracing, and lead follow-up

- You have experience with A2P 10DLC registration, SMS compliance, and carrier vetting

- You know how to write and engineer AI prompts from scratch — not copy-paste

- You have built disposition bots, lead qualification bots, or AI follow-up sequences

- You are comfortable on calls with clients and can communicate clearly and professionally in English

- You can onboard new users, explain complex systems simply, and provide reliable support

- You can do deep research independently and bring back concrete recommendations

- You take initiative and do not need to be micromanaged



This role is NOT for you if:



- You have never worked in real estate or with a real estate CRM

- Your GHL experience is limited to basic funnels or simple
 automations

- You have no experience with A2P compliance or SMS campaign setup

- You cannot write a real AI prompt and rely on generic ChatGPT outputs

- Your English communication skills are not strong — this role requires clear, professional written and spoken English

- You submit a copy-paste application — it will be declined without review



TRIAL PERIOD



The first phase of this engagement will be a paid trial to assess fit, communication quality, work output, and ability to hit the ground running. If you perform well, this becomes a long-term monthly recurring role.



HOW TO APPLY — REQUIRED QUESTIONS



Do NOT send a generic cover letter. Do NOT use ChatGPT to write your application. I will know, and your application will be declined immediately.



Instead, answer all of the following questions in your own words, thoroughly and specifically:



1. Why do you want this specific job? Not a generic answer — explain why Automize REI and this type of work interests you personally.



2. Describe your real estate experience. Have you worked with wholesalers, flippers, or investors? Do you understand seller motivation, disposition, ARV, or the acquisition-to-close process? Be specific.



3. Describe your GoHighLevel experience in detail. How many clients or accounts have you built in GHL? What types of automations have you built? Have you worked with sub-accounts, snapshots, custom fields, or pipelines? Give real examples.



4. What is your experience with A2P 10DLC registration and SMS compliance? Have you set up campaigns for clients? What challenges have you run into and how did you resolve them?



5. What is your experience with AI tools and prompt engineering? What AI platforms have you integrated into GHL or used for real estate? Give a specific example of a prompt you built from scratch and what it was designed to do.



6. Have you built any chatbots, disposition bots, or AI follow-up sequences? Describe the logic and flow of one you have built.



7. What is your experience with client onboarding and support? How do you handle a client who is frustrated or confused during setup?



8. What is your experience with WordPress, web design, or SEO?



PORTFOLIO REQUIREMENT



You MUST attach screenshots of GHL automations or workflows you have personally built. These must be actual screenshots from inside GoHighLevel — no planning documents, no Notion pages, no Loom previews. Real screenshots only. I will review every one of them.



If you have read this far and you are serious — we want to hear from you. This is a growing platform with real customers, real traction, and a real opportunity to be part of building something long-term. High-caliber applicants only.

title: CONTENT RESEARCH EXPERT (CRE): $800 a month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, flexible time

- Salary: $800 a month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise. (direct to your bank account, almost no fees, no waiting for payday!)

- Full work-from-home flexibility

- A young, supportive team that values your output without micromanagement

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role

- Join our international team working with established content creators and brands

- Work with the latest AI tools and social media platforms



TASKS



TASK #1: Research and Curate Viral Content



- Research 30-50 viral short-form videos on Instagram Reels and TikTok

- Strategically select content ideas that will help specific clients go viral

- Organize all content ideas in the "Client Master Sheet"

- Copy/paste links to each content piece

- Write out the hook of each content piece

- Categorize content (Hero Story, Educational, Entertaining, Promotional)

- Add precise video instructions on how each piece can be replicated



TASK #2: Provide Strategic Content Direction



- Analyze client information (niche, target audience, personality, content style)

- Identify and recommend 3 inspirational accounts for clients to follow in their niche

- Create detailed instructions for content replication tailored to the client's abilities

- Think strategically about what will help each client succeed

- Maintain a content library categorized by niche for efficient future use

- Complete daily End-of-Day Reports (EOD)

- Attend multiple meetings with your manager each week

- Continuously improve content recommendations based on what works



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above - non-negotiable!)

- Previous experience in content creation is a MUST

- Experience in content research and trend analysis

- Strong understanding of what makes content go viral

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts features

- Strategic thinking and attention to detail

- Ability to provide clear, actionable instructions

- Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup

- 100% say-do ratio and commitment to deadlines



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Complete our application form and record a personal introduction:



Fill out the form: 
/to/QRoz4WLV



Note: Put "CRE" + [Your Name & Family Name] in the "Name" field in the form.



Record a 3-minute Loom video introducing yourself (instructions in form)



Important: Please provide genuine, personal responses (no AI-written answers). We want to get to know YOU!



ROUND 2: Qualified candidates will be invited for an interview.



MORE ABOUT US



We've been in the industry since 2019 and have worked with over 3000 clients. We currently receive around 80-100 new clients per month. We provide an "80% done-for-you content & monetization system" that helps creators go viral and turn views into income using short-form content, AI, and proven strategies.



MORE ABOUT US

title: Remote VA Receptionist (Immediate Hire | 24-Hour Review)
description:
Important: Our application process moves quickly. If you are selected to proceed to the next interview stages, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist to manage inbound calls and book spa appointments. This is a long-term, performance-based position. Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement in this role depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Social Media Marketing VA
description:
Social Media & Marketing Virtual Assistant – Real Estate Buyer’s Agency (Sydney, Australia)



We’re looking for a creative, reliable, and self-driven Social Media & Marketing Virtual Assistant to join InvestorAid, a leading Buyer’s Agency based in Sydney, Australia.



If you love creating content, running campaigns, and seeing your work directly grow a business, this is the opportunity for you!



Position Details:

Type: Full-time (40 hours per week, 8 hours/day)

Commitment: Long-term, stable role with room to grow



Main Responsibilities:

Create and schedule engaging content across multiple social media platforms

Design flyers, social posts, and marketing materials using Canva

Edit and repurpose videos for social media content

Manage and schedule posts consistently across all channels

Run and monitor
 campaigns (GoHighLevel) and paid ads 
/Instagram)

Assist with engagement, comments, and audience growth strategies



Skills & Qualities We’re Looking For:

Proven experience in social media marketing and content creation (non-negotiable)

Skilled with Canva, video editing, and social media scheduling tools

Bonus: Experience using GoHighLevel (GHL) or any CRM/email marketing platform

Strong English communication skills, written and verbal

Proactive, creative, and detail-oriented mindset

Ability to work independently while being accountable for results

Eagerness to learn, grow, and improve systems as the business scales



Assessment Requirement:

Shortlisted applicants will be asked to complete a content creation and marketing skills test to demonstrate capability and creativity.



Why Join InvestorAid?

You’ll be part of a fast-growing Australian property business making real impact for clients every day. You’ll work directly with the Director and Marketing team, helping shape our brand voice and digital presence. This is a career-building opportunity for someone who wants to learn, grow, and stay long term.



If this sounds like you, please start your application with the word “InvestorAid” so we know you’ve read this post carefully.

We look forward to having you on our team!

title: Fleet Operations Coordinator – Insurance, Violations & Client Support
description:
Fleet Operations Coordinator



Turn n Go LLC

Remote Position



Shift: 4:00 PM – 12:00 AM EST



Turn n Go LLC is a growing vehicle rental company serving gig-economy drivers. We are seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Fleet Operations Coordinator to assist with after-hours operations, documentation management, and insurance compliance.



This role helps keep our fleet organized while ensuring clear communication with clients and vendors.







Responsibilities



Mail & Violation Management

 • Organize incoming mail such as toll notices, tickets, and violations

 • Review violations and determine eligibility for appeal

 • File appeals with toll agencies and vendors

 • Maintain organized documentation and records of violations



Insurance Compliance

 • Add renters to insurance policies

 • Verify renter insurance coverage and documentation

 • Ensure required insurance policies are active and paid

 • Monitor insurance compliance and report missing or expired policies



Fleet Compliance & Maintenance Tracking

	•	Maintain a tracker for vehicle registrations and renewal deadlines

	•	Track annual vehicle inspections and notify management when renewals are approaching

	•	Monitor maintenance schedules based on mileage such as oil changes, tire replacements, and general service intervals

	•	Keep accurate records of vehicle service history and maintenance documentation







Client & Fleet Coordination

 • Communicate with clients to ensure clear communication during after-hours operations

 • Assist clients with documentation and insurance questions

 • Dispatch roadside assistance in case of a
 or emergencies

 • Maintain organized records of fleet documentation and client files



Administrative Support

 • Track operational activity using spreadsheets and logs

 • Maintain organized digital filing systems

 • Ensure fleet documentation is accurate and up to date



?



Ideal Candidate

 • Strong attention to detail

 • Highly organized and process-driven

 • Professional communication skills

 • Comfortable handling documentation and compliance tasks

 • Works well in a team environment and follows the chain of command

 • Able to work 4 PM – 12 AM EST consistently



Experience working with insurance claims, documentation, or compliance is strongly preferred.



?



How to Apply



To apply for this position:

 1.
 your resume to



 2. CC:



 3. Use the subject line:

Fleet Coordinator Application

 4. In your
 include:



 • Your resume

 • A short introduction about your experience

 • Confirmation that you can work 4 PM – 12 AM EST



 5. To confirm you read the entire job description, please include the word Dispatch in your
.



Applications that do not follow these instructions may not be reviewed.



?



Application Questions



In your
, please answer the following questions:



1. Organization

Describe how you would organize and track toll notices or violation tickets for a fleet of vehicles.



2. Insurance Verification

What steps would you take to verify that a renter’s insurance policy is active and valid?



3. Communication

How would you communicate with a renter if their car breaks down during your shift?

title: Part-Time Bookkeeper / CPA – US Hours Required (Architecture, Construction & Tech Startup)
description:
We are a US-based company operating across three businesses — an architecture practice, a general contracting business, and a construction tech startup. We are looking for a detail-oriented Filipino CPA or experienced bookkeeper to help us keep clean, separate books across all three entities.



This is a part-time remote role, approximately 10–15 hours per month to start, with potential to grow.



**What You'll Do**



- Monthly bookkeeping and reconciliation for three separate businesses



- Categorize and track expenses per entity



- Track contractor payments, invoices, and receipts



- Maintain clean P&L for each business



- Coordinate with our US CPA at tax time



- QuickBooks experience is a must



**What We're Looking For**



- CPA or accounting degree strongly preferred



- Experience working with US-based clients



- Familiar with US business accounting (not required to know US tax law)



- Strong attention to detail and organized



- Good written English communication



- Reliable and responsive



**Work Hours**



- Required availability: 5:00pm – 9:00pm Pacific Time (PT)



- Actual working hours approximately 2 hours per day within that window



- You do not need to be online the full 4 hours — but must be reachable and active during this window



- We use 
 for communication, quick questions, and screen sharing



**Details**



- Remote, work from home



- Part-time, flexible schedule within required window



- Rate: open to discussion, looking for long-term relationship



- Payment via EasyPay or Wise — whichever works best for you



If you have experience supporting US small businesses or startups please mention this in your application. Please include your resume and a brief note about your bookkeeping experience.

title: CRM Engineer & Automation Architect (AgentCRM / GoHighLevel Specialist) | Insurance | Financial Service
description:
We are a fast-growing financial services and employee benefits firm in New York. We are transitioning our infrastructure to AgentCRM (GoHighLevel) and need a technical powerhouse to build, manage, and optimize our sales and implementation machine.



This is not a "basic VA" role. We are looking for a CRM Architect who understands logic, workflows, and system organization.



Salary & Schedule



Hourly Rate:  $5 – $11 USD based on experience + Bonus based on results



Schedule: Part-time to start ( 20 -25 hours/week]) with a path to full-time.



Timezone: Must be available for at least 3-4 hours overlap with US Eastern Standard Time (EST).



Key Responsibilities

Pipeline Management: Build and maintain 10+ complex, multi-stage pipelines for different business verticals.



Database Architecture: Configure Contact and Opportunity-level custom fields and organize them into clean, collapsible folders.



Automation (Workflows): Build visual automations for lead response, internal team alerts, and post-sale implementation hand-offs.



AI Management: Configure and train Voice AI Agents and Conversation AI using our Knowledge Base.



Technical Compliance: Manage Branded Tracking Domains



Data Integration: Handle CSV data imports and assist in tracking onboarding progress for platforms like Employee Navigator 



Required Qualifications

Proven GoHighLevel (GHL) / AgentCRM Experience: You must be an expert in Opportunity-level logic and visual workflow triggers.



Folder/Group Logic: You understand how to maintain a highly organized CRM environment.



Flawless English: Excellent written communication for drafting
 and SMS templates.



Bonus: Experience in the Insurance/Employee Benefits industry.



How to Apply

Please send your resume and a brief summary of the most complex GHL workflow you have ever built. IMPORTANT: To ensure you have high attention to detail, your first sentence must include the word "Proof." Applications without this will be automatically disqualified.

description:

title: MARKETING LEAD - Online Jobs - (Part time Ongoing)?
description:
Marketing Lead



20 hours per week | Ongoing | Remote



We’re looking for a mid-level Marketing Lead who is equally comfortable building strategy and executing hands-on, and who thrives in regulated, detail-driven environments.



This role supports three related but distinct brands operating in the medical and wellness space:

 • Dripclub – premium IV and wellness clinics

 • Dripclub Mobile – licensed mobile healthcare services

 • Evolve Medical Solutions – medical devices and B2B clinical supply



Each brand has its own audience, compliance boundaries, and tone — and your role is to bring cohesion, clarity, and 
ntum across all three.







ABOUT THE ROLE



This is not a “post and boost” marketing role.



You’ll be:

 • Translating leadership direction into clear, compliant marketing strategy

 • Executing campaigns end-to-end (content, channels, optimisation)

 • Monitoring real performance data, not vanity metrics

 • Acting as the first point of contact between marketing and the leadership team

 • Providing real-time reporting and insights to inform decisions



You’ll work closely with leadership, operations, and clinical stakeholders — so confidence, discretion, and precision matter.







WHAT YOU’LL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR



Strategy & Execution

 • Develop and execute marketing strategies aligned to regulated healthcare environments

 • Plan and manage campaigns across social,
, and digital platforms

 • Balance short-term traction with long-term brand positioning

 • Ensure brand voice and visual alignment across all channels



Performance & Analytics

 • Track social and campaign performance using meaningful metrics (reach, ?engagement, conversion, lead quality)

 • Maintain real-time visibility of marketing performance for leadership

 • Adjust campaigns based on data, not assumptions

 • Contribute to performance-based bonus outcomes tied to measurable traction and growth



Collaboration & Leadership Interface

 • Act as the primary marketing contact for the leadership team

 • Translate business objectives into marketing actions

 • Provide clear updates, insights, and recommendations

 • Work confidently within a highly structured, compliance-aware organisation







TOOLS YOU’LL USE



You must be confident working with:

 • GoHighLevel (campaigns, workflows, funnels, tracking)

 • Trello (planning, execution, collaboration)

 • Canva (brand-aligned assets)

 • Blaze AI (content support and optimisation)

 • 
 (supporting integrated clinic systems and operational workflows)



You should also be able to demonstrate successful campaign management, not just theory.







WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



Essential

 • Mid-level marketer with hands-on execution experience

 • Proven ability to build and execute marketing strategies

 • Exceptional written and conversational English

 • Experience working in highly regulated industries (medical, healthcare, legal, finance, or similar)

 • Strong understanding of brand positioning and audience alignment

 • Confidence working directly with senior leadership

 • Comfortable being accountable for outcomes, not just outputs



Highly Regarded

 • Experience in medical, wellness, or compliance-heavy environments

 • Exposure to legal frameworks or compliance-led marketing

 • Ability to explain performance data clearly to non-marketers

 • Calm, professional communication style under pressure







PERFORMANCE & BONUSES



This role includes performance-based bonuses linked to:

 • Measurable social media traction

 • Campaign engagement and growth

 • Quality of leads and audience alignment



This means:

 • Clear expectations

 • Transparent metrics

 • Shared wins when campaigns perform







HOURS & STRUCTURE

 • 20 hours per week

 • Ongoing, long-term role

 • Flexible scheduling with accountability for delivery and reporting







HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT)



To apply, please include:

 1. A short note explaining why this role appeals to you, and why working across multiple brands in a regulated environment is of interest.?

 2. Examples of campaigns you’ve managed, including:

 • The objective

 • Your role in the campaign

 • The outcomes or results achieved?

 3. Confirmation of your experience working in regulated or compliance-heavy environments (e.g. medical, healthcare, legal, finance).?

 4. A brief outline of how you would think about the target audience for each of the following brands:

 • Dripclub

 • Dripclub Mobile

 • Evolve Medical Solutions?

This does not need to be a formal strategy. We are interested in how you approach demographics, decision-makers, and messaging differences rather than a prepared campaign.?

 5. Your availability and preferred working hours, noting that availability must align with ACST.



Applications that do not address these points will not be considered.

title: Manager, Management Accounting and Business Services
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW



In this role as Manager of the Management Accounting and Business Services team in Manila, you will be responsible for overseeing the team and ensuring that high-quality financial accounting, business advisory, and business management services are provided to our institutional and corporate clients. Your expertise and leadership will be integral in driving the success of the team and delivering tailored, specialized outcomes for our clients. By effectively managing the team and providing guidance and support, you will be making a significant impact on the success of Corporate Advantage and the satisfaction of our clients.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



• Lead and manage the Accounting and Finance Services team in Manila to ensure that high-quality financial management services are provided to clients in a timely and efficient manner.

title: Hiring: Sales/Marketing Strategist with appointment-setting skills
description:
1 spot available for Sales/Marketing Strategist with appointment-setting skills 



We are searching for committed, focused, and disciplined people who are responsible, reliable, honest, and dependable. You must be able to manage a CRM, generate new leads, opportunities, and follow up with leads to book appointments.



With great Base pay, bonuses, and upside earning potential, this role will not last long.



But the money is just a bonus for those who can work alongside the high-performing team.



Please do not reach out unless you are the best and can prove it. (This role isn't for everyone)



The type of people we are looking for:

1. You must be driven

2. Coachable & adaptable

3. Takes initiative & Works Hard

4. Have previous experience 

5. Knows how to use marketing technology well and is a self-starter. (you know how to work  and with minimal supervision)

6. Knows our brand and what we stand for, and is experienced and enjoys constant improvement in the sales/ marketing department 

7. Must be able to work 9+ hours per day, for 6 days a week, with an obsessive focus on high-quality campaigns and improvement

8. You must be able to speak fluent English, Type well, keep up with a high pace, and have great people/ communication skills

9. You’ll need to be able to take on responsibilities in an already successful operation.

10. Must have no other commitments on the side. (A.k.a side hustles)



This position is an “ALL-IN” position. 



You must be HUNGRY to Learn and earn as well as be coachable.



If we see you have the potential to become a valuable asset to the team, you would become a right-hand. You will be treated like family, invested in, and given invaluable information 



We are a lean team only looking for the top 1% of talent ready to take on a new opportunity and a unique set of challenges and receive mentorship fro
, along with other successful business owners/ investors.



If this sounds like you, then reach out saying "ALL IN"



The sooner you apply, the sooner we can send you the questionnaire. 



Once approved, either I or someone on my team will reach out to you immediately and book you for a prescreening with my assistant or me to see if it's a good fit. 



To apply, send a short 1-2minute video about your appointment setting skills and or relevant experience, and answer this question 'What is the most difficult challenge you encounter as a marketer, and how did you solve it?



All the best,

Daniel & The Elite Team

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant
description:
Remote | Real Estate Operations & Sales Support



We are a growing husband-and-wife real estate team based in Northern California. Our team currently consists of four agents and we are continuing to expand. Our business focuses on helping buyers and sellers throughout the region while maintaining a strong reputation built on honesty, integrity, and transparency.



We are looking for a highly proactive, organized, and coachable Virtual Assistant to support our daily operations, marketing, and lead management.



This role requires someone who is resourceful, adaptable, and takes initiative. You will play a key role in helping our team stay organized, nurture leads, and support business growth.



This is not a task-only position. We want someone who thinks proactively, solves problems, and takes ownership of their work.



FULL-TIME POSITION REQUIREMENT

• This is a full-time remote position (8 hours per day)

• Candidates must be available to work consistent full-time hours

• We are looking for someone who wants to grow with our team long-term, not someone seeking short freelance projects

• The role requires strong commitment, reliability, and daily availability during agreed working hours

• We are looking to hire as soon as possible and ideally bring someone onto the team within the next week

• Applicants must be ready to start quickly if selected



-Must have above average internet connection. 

-Computer must be able to handle the work below 



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

• Provide administrative and operational support to the real estate team

• Manage and update contacts within our CRM

• Assist with lead management and database organization

• Call past leads and prospects to re-engage and set appointments

• Manage and maintain CRM systems (primarily Follow Up Boss)

• Create and organize reports and spreadsheets

• Assist with marketing materials using Canva

• Support social media content preparation and scheduling

• Assist with
 marketing campaigns

• Manage task tracking platforms such as Asana or Trello

• Maintain calendars and coordinate appointments

• Help organize systems and workflows for the team



Cold calling will occasionally be required to reconnect with older leads and schedule appointments, but this will not be an everyday task.



Include "Dear Prevail RE," on your message.



BIG PLUS (NOT REQUIRED)

• Experience in the real estate industry?• Knowledge of California real estate processes?• Experience working with Follow Up Boss CRM?• Experience with lead generation and appointment setting



HOW TO APPLY?



• Your resume?• A short video introduction about yourself?• Any experience working with real estate or CRM systems?• Any Canva or marketing work samples if available

:

What does this job include?

- Talking to guests: Respond promptly to guest messages and inquiries, ensuring high levels of satisfaction and prompt resolution of any issues.

- Airbnb Cases, Reviews & Claims: Monitor and manage Airbnb cases and guest reviews, including removing invalid or untrue negative reviews and handling claims or guest charges for broken, damaged, stained, or missing items.

- Operations Coordination (Cleaners, Supplies & Maintenance): Coordinate with cleaners on supply ordering and Amazon deliveries, and communicate with handymen and the project coordinator to ensure maintenance issues are addressed in a timely manner.

- Invoice & Document Management: Cross-check cleaning invoices against the Airbnb calendar to ensure accurate billing, and organize all receipts and invoices into designated Google Drive folders for proper record-keeping.

- Prospect List Building: Create and maintain prospect lists of short-term rental owners using defined internal criteria.

- Prospect Research & Enrichment: Add basic background details to prospect lists (number of listings, pricing range, reviews, etc.) to support sales outreach.

- Follow-Up List Management: Maintain organized follow-up lists for prospects requiring future outreach. Please include the word Apples to your subject line to prove you’ve read the job post.

- Social Media Research (Non-Creative): Identify high-performing Airbnb, short-term rental, and real estate social media videos, save links, and note simple, observable patterns such as topic, hook style, or format.

- Operations-Based Content Ideas: Pull recurring guest or operational issues fro
ssage logs and note them down for the team to use when creating content.



Company Introduction Video: 
 



All applicants must
 us their resume and a 1-minute video explaining specifically what they have learned from the company introduction video above and why they would be a good fit for our company. 



We are looking for a full time VA (7 hour shifts (12 PM to 7 PM EST), 6 days per week + 3 hour shift (1 PM to 4 PM EST) 1 day per week.) so do not apply if you currently have another job. You cannot have another job and work for us.

title: Civil Engineer/Estimator/QS
description:
Position Overview



IMDG is seeking a Part-Time Civil Engineer with strong Quantity Surveying and construction planning experience to support site development and infrastructure projects. This role focuses on detailed quantity takeoffs, engineering interpretation of construction documents, and early-stage project planning to support bidding, budgeting, and execution.



The ideal candidate will be experienced in civil site development plans, earthwork calculations, and infrastructure quantities, and comfortable working with engineering drawings, geotechnical reports, and contractor bid documents.



This role is ideal for an engineer who enjoys technical analysis, estimating, and construction planning and wants flexible part-time work.



Key Responsibilities

Quantity Takeoffs



Prepare detailed quantity surveys and material takeoffs including:



Earthwork / Dirt Takeoffs



Cut and fill calculations



Mass grading quantities



Subgrade preparation



Over-excavation and structural fill



Wet Utilities



Water lines



Sanitary sewer



Storm drainage systems



Manholes, inlets, structures



Pipe trench excavation and backfill



Erosion & Sediment Control



Silt fence



Inlet protection



Sediment basins



Construction entrances



Stabilization measures



Demolition



Pavement removal



Structure demolition



Site clearing



Existing utility removal



Engineering Interpretation



Review and interpret technical project documents including:



Civil engineering construction drawings



Site grading plans



Utility plans and profiles



Specifications



Survey information



Geotechnical engineering reports



Responsibilities include:



Identifying soil conditions and earthwork requirements



Determining undercut, structural fill, and stabilization needs



Reviewing groundwater and drainage considerations



Translating technical reports into construction quantities and scope



Project Planning Support



Assist with early-stage construction planning, including:



Site development sequencing



Utility installation phasing



Erosion control planning



Preliminary construction schedules



Identifying potential construction risks



Required Qualifications:



Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering



3+ years experience in civil construction, estimating, or quantity surveying



Strong understanding of site development and infrastructure construction



Experience reading and interpreting civil engineering plans and specifications



Experience performing earthwork and infrastructure quantity takeoffs



Preferred Qualifications



Experience with commercial site development projects



Familiarity with geotechnical engineering reports



Experience working with contractors or construction teams



Proficiency in quantity takeoff software such as:



Bluebeam



Google Sheets



Kubla Cubed



Civil 3D



Excel-based takeoff systems



Skills:



Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities



High attention to detail



Ability to interpret complex engineering documents



Excellent organizational and documentation skills



Ability to work independently on project assignments



Work Schedule:



Part-Time / Project-Based



Flexible schedule depending on project workload



Remote work possible depending on candidate location



About IMDG:



IMDG provides engineering analysis, project planning, and technical support services for civil construction and infrastructure projects. Our work focuses on helping project teams understand scope, quantities, and constructability before construction begins, improving cost accuracy and project efficiency.

title: Outbound Sales/Appointment Setter (A-Players ONLY)
description:
Overview:

You’ll be the first point of contact for potential clients, responsible for booking qualified appointments for our Sales Team. Your job is to engage leads through chat, phone calls, and follow-ups to fill our calendar with prospects who match our ideal client profile.



Key Responsibilities:

• Make daily outbound calls to cold and warm leads.

• Use our 9-word “Chat-to-Sell” strategy to convert inbound messages into booked calls.

• Follow up with leads from YouTube,
, Google, and other sources.

• Qualify prospects via triage calls to determine program fit.

• Offer lower-ticket products to leads who aren’t ready for coaching.

• Track sales activity, follow scripts, and maintain metrics in our CRM/project management tools.

• Collaborate with Marketing to ensure seamless lead handoff.

• Attend internal sales meetings and contribute to team success.



Expected Results:

• Sales and lead metrics are updated and accurate.

• Calendar is consistently filled with high-quality prospects.

• Chat and call strategies are effectively converting leads.

• KPI improvement and process scalability are clearly visible.

title: Front-End Developer | Shopify / React / JavaScript / .NET
description:
Join our incredible software team and help create innovative applications that support our internal Sales, eCommerce, Logistics, and Accounting operations. A successful candidate in this role will be a critical thinker, a professionally kind collaborator, and a proven problem solver who works well in teams and under pressure with often competing deadlines. This is an opportunity to apply your existing front-end development, Shopify, React, JavaScript, 
 skills in an Agile and collaborative team environment. We are excited to welcome you to our growing team!



Job responsibilities include:



* Design and develop responsive, high-performance front-end experiences for our eCommerce storefronts and internal web applications.

* Build and maintain custom Shopify themes, apps, and integrations that connect with our order, inventory, and fulfillment systems.

* Develop interactive UI components using React and JavaScript to support our global Sales, Customer Service, and Logistics teams.

* Collaborate with back-end developers to integrate front-end applications 
 APIs and services.

* Identify and resolve bugs across our web applications, ensuring consistent cross-browser and cross-device functionality.

* Analyze current front-end solutions and build enhancements to improve performance, usability, and maintainability.



Basic Requirements:



* Verifiable English language and writing skills.

* Available to work 8:00am – 5:00pm (PST/PDT).

* A minimum of 2 years professional work experience in front-end web development.

* Strong proficiency with React, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, and CSS3.

* Hands-on experience building or customizing Shopify themes and/or Shopify apps (Liquid, Storefront API, or Shopify Functions).

* Working knowledge 
 Core and C# for API integration and full-stack collaboration.

* Experience with relational databases such as MS SQL or MySQL.

* A deep desire to resolve complex problems with creative and organized technical solutions.

* Understanding of RESTful API design, version control (Git), and modern front-end build tools.

* Familiarity with responsive design principles and cross-browser compatibility best practices.



Accessory Power is a consumer electronics manufacturer dedicated to providing a diverse range of high quality products for over 30 years. We manufacture and market thousands of products under our four main brands: GOgroove® | ENHANCE® | ReVIVE® | USA Gear® along with a handful of other lines and various accessory products. We are growing and we need your help.



Visit 
/about to learn a little more about our incredible past and our bright future ahead.

title: Virtual Assistant - Community & Operations Support
description:
This is a Virtual Assistant Role with focus on Community & Operations support.



Sponge is an untypical branding agency based in Brisbane Australia and proudly working to build the Business for Good community. We believe that awesome is no longer enough; businesses must also do good to achieve the success they truly want.



We work exclusively with purpose-led and purpose-ready business owners to help them become ElectroMagnets for top talent and dream clients. Our goal is to help 1 million people live their lives to the fullest by helping create cultures where people shine, building impact models that inspire greatness, and crafting brand stories that ripple meaning through the market.



We are fanatical about culture and this role must be a culture fit. Check out what that means for us at our website (which you will have to find). 



If you're obsessed with order, thrive on structure, and love making things run smoothly, this might be your dream role.



THE ROLE: WHY WE NEED YOU



We are looking for a highly meticulous Community & Operations Assistant to manage the heartbeat of our outreach and events.



Note: This role will begin strictly as part-time (up to 20 hours/week), but has the potential to evolve into a Full-Time position based on the relationship built and the value you provide.



This is not a creative marketing or project management role. This is a pure execution role. You will be running established Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) to ensure our community members are invited, engaged, and nurtured consistently. If you are a stickler for detail, love following a proven process, and take pride in making sure no one falls through the cracks, this is for you.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



COMMUNITY RELATIONSHIP MANAGEMENT & OUTREACH

- Execute daily LinkedIn outreach and messaging on behalf of the founder using proven SOPs and scripts

- Manage follow-ups based on established outreach cadences to ensure the right frequency of touch

- Track engagement and maintain accurate records of conversations and interactions



CLIENT COMMUNICATION

- Draft and send weekly client project updates

- Keep CRM data current and accurate

- Support professional, friendly communication with clients on behalf of the founder



EVENT COORDINATION & OPERATIONS

- Set up and update regular events across multiple online platforms

- Coordinate with our design team to ensure event graphics are published correctly

- Invite curated "A-list" guests to events following specific guidelines

- Track RSVPs, monitor attendance, and ensure the correct follow-up messages are sent



 COMMUNICATION & CAMPAIGN SUPPORT

- Assist with ongoing
 communications and campaign execution via Mailchimp

- Manage segmented lists and execute scheduled communications

- Support specific follow-ups based on community engagement or event attendance



DATA, REPORTING & ADMINISTRATION

- Keep our CRM and community contact lists meticulously clean and updated

- Send daily "End of Day" (EOD) reports detailing completed tasks, blockers, and next steps

- Run established Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) reliably to ensure no one falls through the cracks



REQUIREMENTS



- Extreme Attention to Detail: Small mistakes compound quickly in community operations. You must be highly accurate.

- Process Discipline: You must be comfortable and happy executing repetitive, structured SOPs daily without needing to "reinvent" them.

- Tech Comfort: Experience with LinkedIn (outreach/messaging), Mailchimp, CRM management, and event platforms.

- Relationship Awareness: A professional, warm tone and an understanding of how to treat high-value community members.

- Availability: Up to 20 hours/week, spread across the week and aligning with the founder’s time.

- Hunger: A hunger to learn better ways to do things. You always want to optimise, simplify, and improve.



BONUS SKILLS (Not Required, but Great to Have)

As this role has the potential to grow into a full-time position, candidates with the following additional skills will be highly regarded:

- Experience with social media posting and platform management

- Account management experience

- Light account management and client relationship building



TO APPLY



Your application must include:

1. Write a short intro about why you're applying for this role and why it fits you.

2. Share a specific example of how you’ve managed events via event platforms.

3. Share an example of how you organised chaos into clarity, i.e. a system, checklist, routine, or tool that made something easier and more efficient.

4. Confirm your availability for 20 hours/week and your ability to work with a start time of around 9:30am AEST most week days.

5. Use the word "Connection" in your subject line and your 4th sentence.

6. Tell us what our culture means to you.

7. Use exactly 7 app points.



We’ll only consider applicants who follow all instructions.



This position is long-term, stable, and highly valued. If you love structure, take pride in being the one who keeps the community humming, and want to work with a business that’s doing good in the world, we look forward to hearing from you.

title: Amazon Listing Graphics Designer
description:
Read fully before applying.



Crep Therapy is an urban-luxury sneaker care brand built on culture, quality, and visual storytelling. Our ASMR sneaker cleaning content has generated millions of views, and we are now expanding onto Amazon with the goal of building listings that stand out immediately in search and convert at a high level.



We are looking for an Amazon Listing Graphics Designer who specialises in creating elite-level listing visuals — not basic Canva templates.



Your work should be scroll-stopping, premium, and conversion-focused, designed to outperform the average Amazon listing in both clarity and visual impact.



If your graphics look like typical marketplace templates, this role is not for you.



---



Your Mission



1. Design high-converting Amazon listing graphics for a sneaker cleaning kit.

2. Create visuals that immediately communicate product value, transformation, and benefits

3. Produce premium infographics, lifestyle visuals, and product explanation graphics.

4. Help structure the listing visuals to increase click-through rate and conversion.

5. Deliver designs that look modern, premium, and visually superior to competing listings



This role is about visual persuasion, not simply decorating product photos.



---



What We’re Looking For



1. Strong experience designing Amazon product listing graphics

2. Ability to create premium infographic layouts and visual storytelling

3. Experience producing lifestyle images and product benefit graphics.

4. Strong understanding of Amazon buyer psychology and visual hierarchy.

5. Ability to make graphics that stand out in search results and improve conversion.



Designers who rely heavily on templates or generic styles will not be a good fit



---



Deliverables



You will design a complete Amazon listing visual set, typically including but not limited:



1. Main Amazon product image

2. Product benefit infographic

3. Product feature graphic

4. “What’s included” kit breakdown

5. Before / after transformation graphic

6. Lifestyle image showing product usage

7. Instructional / how-to graphic



All visuals must be clear, premium, and designed specifically for Amazon conversion.



---



Hiring Timeline



We are hiring quickly and looking to make a decision within 24 hours, so applicants who can demonstrate strong work immediately will be prioritised.



---



To Apply



Send the following:



1. A Google Drive link to your best Amazon listing graphics work

   (include infographics, lifestyle images, and product listing visuals).



2. Examples of listings where your graphics are currently being used if available.



3. Your mobile number or WhatsApp number for direct communication.



4. A short explanation of your design process for creating high-converting Amazon listing graphics



5. Your compensation expectation for 9 graphics. 



Please only send your strongest work



---



We are looking for someone who can create premium Amazon listing visuals that immediately stand out from competitors



If your designs stop scrolling and communicate value instantly — apply.

title: Experienced Direct Response Copywriter ($2,000 – $4,000 Per Month)
description:
Work Hours: Full-time, Monday to Friday, normal Philippine working hours



Young Publisher | 



We’re an international digital publishing company hiring from the Philippines for over 5 years.

We have 50+ tea
mbers worldwide and 200+ verified reviews with a 4.9 average rating.

We build long-term partnerships, not short-term gigs.

We don't disappear, we pay on time



We’re looking for an experienced direct response copywriter who can:

- Take full ownership of performance-driven campaigns

- Write
s that get opened, read, and clicked

- Create Ads that stop people from scrolling.

- Craft persuasive copy that drives readers to act.



This is a full-time remote role with clear growth opportunities. You’ll start with
s and ads, and as you prove yourself, move into sales pages and VSLs.



What you’ll do



- Write broadcast
s and automated sequences

- Create Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Help produce ebooks and lead magnets using AI tools

- Progress into sales pages and VSL scripts for launches



Why is this role different?



- You’ll receive direct feedback from an 8-figure copywriter. This is a serious opportunity to sharpen your skills fast.

- You’ll also get access to premium courses and AI communities. We invest in our team because we want long-term growth.

- We encourage AI tools — but only with strong critical thinking. This is not a beginner role.



Essentials



- Full-time, Monday to Friday, Philippine standard working hours

- Long-term position with growth into sales pages and VSLs

- $2,000–$4,000 USD per month, depending on experience

- Fully remote

- Reliable, on-time payments every two weeks via Wise



Requirements



- At least 2 years of direct response copywriting experience (not blog or content writing)

- Proven results: open rates, CTR, conversions, ROAS

- Experience writing for coaches, course creators, or info product businesses

- Native-level English for US, UK, or Australian audiences

- Strong understanding of hooks, emotional triggers, objection handling, and CTAs

- Experience with Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Ability to adapt to different brand voices

- Comfortable using AI tools with critical thinking

- Strong communication skills and independence

- Reliable, responsive, proactive, and coachable



Hiring process



#1: Paid test task

#2: Interview

#3: Paid test month at 50% salary



We’re looking for professionals who know their craft and want long-term growth.



How to apply



Apply via our Typeform here: 



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Young Publisher



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Outbound Appointment Setter (Melbourne Hours)
description:
We are currently running a high-quality lead generation program that is feeding us around 100 fresh leads every month. We need a motivated individual to pick up the phone, talk to real people, and fill our calendar with qualified appointments.



- Minimum 25 hours per week guaranteed (Part-time or Full-time available).

- Base pay + a $10 AUD bonus for every qualified appointment that shows.

- Set hours between 8:00 AM and 7:00 PM (Melbourne Time).



We are looking for:

A clear communicator with excellent spoken English.

Someone comfortable with outbound calling who isn't afraid of rejection.

Reliable and able to work independently.



If this sounds like a role you’d enjoy and succeed in, apply now by filling out the short form below -




/jobs/17033.64053.59877.1



Once you apply, we will send you more information.



IMPORTANT NOTE.



We will ONLY consider candidates who submit their application to our candidate management system through the link above.

title: Real Estate Cold Caller (Dayshift, Remote)
description:
About the Role:

We’re on the lookout for confident and driven Cold Callers from the Philippines to join our growing real estate sales team. You'll be helping connect with homeowners, identify motivated sellers, and book appointments directly for our agents in Australia.



What You’ll Do:

• Call potential homeowners and start genuine conversations

• Identify qualified leads and pass them to our real estate agents

• Clean and manage call lists and CRM entries

• Build rapport, handle objections, and follow scripts effectively

• Scrape data and generate call lists from public sources

• Achieve daily targets (2 leads + 1 appointment per day)

• Submit a simple daily report (EOS format)



What We’re Looking For:

• Proven cold calling or sales experience (real estate background a bonus)

• Great spoken English and strong people skills

• Driven, self-motivated, and goal-oriented

• Knows how to use Google Workspace and CRM tools (or quick to learn)

• Must be able to work Australian business hours (AEST)

• Must use screen/time tracking software during shifts



What You’ll Get:

• Monthly salary up to PHP 40,000

• Commissions up to $500 AUD per closed sale

• Paid Australian Public Holidays

• Bi-Weekly pay

• No graveyard shifts



How to Apply:

Do not reply to this post.

Job Code: AACC

Apply directly through this link:



**Incomplete applications or those not following instructions will not be reviewed.

**Due to the volume of applications, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Client Success Manager (Giving Feedback): $1,100 USD START RATE
description:
Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Client Support (maintaining 40-50 total clients):



- Run kickoff calls with new clients using our proven script

- Review client content and give actionable feedback

- Answer client messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 coaching sessions

- Help clients overcome content blocks and limiting beliefs



Progress Tracking:



- Update daily/weekly reports

- Track client progress and next steps

- Join daily team check-ins

- Ensure clients follow strategies consistently



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken) with no accent

- Strong communication skills

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment



IMPORTANT



When recording a Loom video as part of your application:



- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Content creation and social media experience

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

- Regular usage of AI tools (ChatGPT, CapCut)



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)

Note: More experienced CSMs earn between $1,800 and $2,500 after 6-12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $900+ additional monthly based on:

- Client retention rates

- Task completion metrics

- Quality of feedback

- Team collaboration

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise directly to your bank

- Tools access: We'll cover all the needed tools

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Regular feedback and skill development



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CSM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with client management.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio.



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: CONTENT RESEARCH EXPERT (CRE): $800 a month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, flexible time

- Salary: $800 a month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise. (direct to your bank account, almost no fees, no waiting for payday!)

- Full work-from-home flexibility

- A young, supportive team that values your output without micromanagement

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role

- Join our international team working with established content creators and brands

- Work with the latest AI tools and social media platforms



TASKS



TASK #1: Research and Curate Viral Content



- Research 30-50 viral short-form videos on Instagram Reels and TikTok

- Strategically select content ideas that will help specific clients go viral

- Organize all content ideas in the "Client Master Sheet"

- Copy/paste links to each content piece

- Write out the hook of each content piece

- Categorize content (Hero Story, Educational, Entertaining, Promotional)

- Add precise video instructions on how each piece can be replicated



TASK #2: Provide Strategic Content Direction



- Analyze client information (niche, target audience, personality, content style)

- Identify and recommend 3 inspirational accounts for clients to follow in their niche

- Create detailed instructions for content replication tailored to the client's abilities

- Think strategically about what will help each client succeed



TASK #3: Administrative Responsibilities



- Maintain a content library categorized by niche for efficient future use

- Complete daily End-of-Day Reports (EOD)

- Attend multiple meetings with your manager each week

- Continuously improve content recommendations based on what works



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above - non-negotiable!)

- Previous experience in content creation is a MUST

- Experience in content research and trend analysis

- Strong understanding of what makes content go viral

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts features

- Strategic thinking and attention to detail

- Ability to provide clear, actionable instructions

- Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup

- 100% say-do ratio and commitment to deadlines



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Complete our application form and record a personal introduction:



Fill out the form: 
/to/QRoz4WLV



Note: Put "CRE" + [Your Name & Family Name] in the "Name" field in the form.



Record a 3-minute Loom video introducing yourself (instructions in form)



Important: Please provide genuine, personal responses (no AI-written answers). We want to get to know YOU!



ROUND 2: Qualified candidates will be invited for an interview.



MORE ABOUT US



We've been in the industry since 2019 and have worked with over 3000 clients. We currently receive around 80-100 new clients per month. We provide an "80% done-for-you content & monetization system" that helps creators go viral and turn views into income using short-form content, AI, and proven strategies.



MORE ABOUT US



- About Young Publisher:

title: Remote Appointment Setter (Philippines-Based)
description:
Job Description:

We are seeking a highly motivated and reliable Virtual Assistant from the Philippines to join our fast-growing team as an Appointment Setter. Your role will be to engage with warm leads, build rapport, and book qualified appointments for our sales team. If you are hungry to grow, coachable, and results-driven, this is an incredible opportunity to earn great commissions and bonuses while working from home.



Responsibilities:

- Reach out to prospects through messaging platforms,
, and follow-ups

- Qualify leads and schedule appointments for our sales team

- Maintain clear records of conversations and updates in our CRM as well as KPI Tracker

- Meet daily and weekly booking targets

- Collaborate with team leads to improve scripts and conversion rates



Requirements:

- Excellent written and spoken English (near-native level)

- Strong communication and interpersonal skills

- Organized, detail-oriented, and consistent

- Reliable internet connection and home office setup

- Able to work during U.S. business hours



Compensation: Make up to $1750 a month! 

- Base Salary: $250/month (paid $125 bi-weekly)

- Commission: $50 per closed deal

- Bonuses:

5 closes: $100 bonus

10 closes: $200 bonus

15 closes: $300 bonus

20 closes: $500 bonus



Example Earnings:

5 deals: $600/month total

10 deals: $950/month total

15 deals: $1,300/month total

20 deals: $1,750/month total



Payment Method: TransferWise or PayPal



Why Join Us:

- Work from home and earn competitive pay in USD

- Generous bonuses and commissions

- Supportive and growth-focused team

- Long-term career opportunities for high performers



How to Apply: Send us your application with:

- A short introduction about yourself

- Your relevant experience

- Why you think you’d be a great fit for this role



To prove you read this entire job post, please include your favorite color somewhere in your application.

We’re looking for someone who is eager to learn, self-motivated, and ready to grow with us. If that sounds like you, we want to hear from you!

title: Marketing Automation & CRM Specialist (GoHighLevel)
description:

We are seeking a highly skilled GoHighLevel specialist to help build and manage our marketing automation systems to generate leads, nurture prospects, and convert tours into memberships.



This role is ideal for someone who understands funnels, CRM automation, and lead generation and can turn systems into measurable business growth.



What You’ll Do



establish from ground up a new GoHighLevel System Setup

Configure and optimize our GoHighLevel CRM

Create landing pages for lead generation

Create calendar and booking systems

Build pipelines and opportunity stages

Integrate phone, SMS,
, and lead capture tools

Set up reporting and tracking
