title: Marketing Assistant (Social Media Strategist), Australia focus
description:
We're looking for a senior Social Media Strategist to help us build and run repeatable content systems for our clients. This is not a posting scheduler role. We need someone who can take a brief, think strategically, and turn it into a clear plan that’s easy to execute.



You’ll own the strategy side, guide the content direction, and manage the workflow with our internal editors so content actually ships on time, on brand, and with purpose.



What you’ll be doing

 • Take a brand brief and build a strong social strategy, including:

 • Avatars and audience breakdowns

 • Content pillars and topics

 • Video ideas and series concepts

 • Frameworks, hooks, angles, and messaging direction

 • Clear filming guidance so content is easy to capture

 • Competitor research and positioning analysis, Australian market awareness matters here

 • Idea generation and topic research, strong judgement over chasing trends, focus on what’s worth filming

 • Create polished strategy decks and content plans in Canva, presented like a proper client-ready deck

 • Manage content delivery end-to-end:

 • Maintain content calendars

 • Brief editors and coordinate edits, you won’t be editing yourself

 • Manage feedback loops, approvals, and version control

 • Reporting and optimisation:

 • Track performance, pull insights, recommend improvements

 • Identify what to double down on and what to kill



You’re a fit if you have

 • 5–10+ years experience in social media strategy, content marketing, and scripting

 • Proven ability to write social strategies that actually translate into content people can film

 • Strong creative instincts and structured thinking, you can generate ideas fast without losing quality

 • Great taste, you understand brand, tone, and consistency, and you can keep content aligned

 • Confidence working autonomously and making calls without being micromanaged

 • Strong working knowledge of the Australian market, audiences, and competitive landscape

 • Comfortable collaborating with editors, managing deadlines, and keeping projects moving



Deliverables you’ll own

 • Strategy decks in Canva, structured, clear, client-ready

 • Monthly content plans and filming guidance

 • Editor briefs, feedback notes, and approval workflows

 • Performance reporting with practical recommendations



Working style and expectations

 • Remote role, async-friendly, but responsive

 • Fast turnaround is important, we move quickly and keep momentum

 • You’ll be working closely with Steven, Director at Ivory Media, and coordinating with our editing team



To apply



Send through:

 • A short intro

 • 2–3 examples of social media strategy decks you’ve built (Canva or PDF links)

 • One example of competitor research you’ve done, even if anonymised

 • Your hourly rate or monthly retainer range, and your weekly availability

 • Any brands you’ve worked with that are relevant to the Australian market

title: Influencer Marketing Role | Direct Client |Morning Shift
description:
Who Are We?

Nordic Quality is an extremely awesome, up-and-coming, online-based company selling physical products under several of our brands. The main one of which is in the gym and fitness category.



Who are we looking for?

We are looking for an Influencer Marketing Manager with some familiarity in Social Media Management to play a crucial role at Nordic Quality, a company specializing in gym equipment and weight-lifting products. This role involves managing and expanding partnerships with fitness influencers, as well as overseeing the brand’s social media presence across platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and
. The ideal candidate is passionate about health and fitness, stays up to date with social media trends, and has experience building engaging content and communities in the gym and weightlifting space.



WHAT WOULD THE TASK BE?



-Build all processes for acquiring new digital influencers, as well as maintaining existing ones.

-Identifying the most relevant influencers in the industry on major and minor social media channels such as YouTube,
, Instagram, Slickdeals, etc., by doing research and/ or using tools.

Form relationships with influencers before asking them to advocate for the products or the company in general.

- Persuade digital influencers to promote our products with little to no upfront cost;

- Ensure that all possible measures have been taken to retain existing influencers.

- Establish a Sponsored Athlete Program, affiliate programs, and partnerships with influencers, and manage everything related to these.

- Set up and take charge of activities surrounding the Influencer page on the company website;

- Boost the brand's online presence on relevant forums/message boards by responding to comments and subtly promoting our products.

- Lead the department dedicated to influencer marketing, once set up, and collaborate with other tea
mbers of other departments whenever necessary.

- Come up with a marketing plan/strategy on a weekly/monthly basis  (work alongside the marketing manager to do this, especially for our product promotions); 

- Tally UGCs for content posting on social media, including Instagram,
, YouTube, and TikTok.

- Social Media Management: Plan, coordinate, and schedule social media content on
, Instagram, and TikTok at least two weeks (14 days) in advance while also managing real-time updates and promotional posts in collaboration with the Marketing team/Marketing Assistant to keep calendars accurate, timely, and aligned with campaign priorities.

- Manage some Amazon Ads or work on other Amazon-related tasks in Amazon US, Amazon UK, and Amazon Japan (using ChatGPT whenever needed);

- Create an attribute link for promotions and influencers and analyze them as part of the KPI every month.

- Create and manage campaigns and influencers on Amazon Creator Connections on a regular basis.

- Create and maintain updated SOPs for the Influencer Team.

- Regularly review existing SOPs and make adjustments as needed.

- Other related tasks or tasks in the marketing department.

- Slack (communication tool) visibility during the contractor’s working hours. 



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in lead generation, influencer outreach, and social media management. Preferably in the e-commerce or fitness industry (but not necessarily)

- Familiarity with lead generation tools and CRM systems (is a plus!)

- Strong written and verbal communication skills.

-Has experience with Canva

- Has an interest in creating compelling social media posts

- Ability to multitask, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines.

- Knowledge of basic marketing principles and techniques.

- Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.



You must also have the following;

- With a perfectly working device (additional backup is a plus)

- With a reliable internet connection (additional backup is required)

- Headphones/earphones (for meetings)



HOW TO APPLY?

Congratulations on making it this far in the job application process! Interested? We'd be delighted to hear from you.

Please carefully follow all of the instructions below to send an application:



1. Use the following as the subject of your message:

Influencer Marketing - (Insert Your Full Name Here)

Example: Influencer Marketing - Maria Santos



2. Cover Letter - The body of your message will serve as your cover letter, so discuss your experience and persuade me to add you to the team while highlighting your writing abilities.



3 The link to your CV/ resume (strictly with your picture)



4. IMPORTANT NOTE: Type at least one of Nordic Quality's MAIN BRAND on the very first line of your cover letter. Here's a hint: Google is your best friend.





Thank you & Best of luck!

title: Automation & Process Analyst and Engineer – Bookkeeping & Accounting Agent (OpenClaw or Similar Tools)
description:
Position Purpose  

Begin as a **bookkeeping and accounting automation agent**, using OpenClaw or similar tools to systematise and streamline core financial workflows (invoices, receipts, bank feeds, basic reporting), then progressively expand into wider business and personal process automation across the organisation. [tencentcloud](
)





Role Evolution Overview  



- Phase 1 – Bookkeeping & Accounting Agent  

  - Implement and operate automation for invoice intake, expense/receipt handling, basic reconciliations, and recurring accounting routines using OpenClaw or comparable tools. [openclawdir](
)

  - Coordinate data flows into existing accounting systems (e.g. Xero, QuickBooks, other ledgers) and maintain clean, review?ready data for the external accountant or finance lead. [inkle](
)



- Phase 2 – Finance Operations & Reporting  

  - Build workflows for management reports, recurring cashflow snapshots, variance checks, and exception alerts (e.g. unusual transactions, overdue invoices). [virtualworkforce](
)

  - Introduce human?review gates and audit trails for high?value or ambiguous items to keep control and compliance while increasing automation coverage. [tencentcloud](
)



- Phase 3 – Broader Business & Personal Automation  

  - Extend the same automation stack (OpenClaw or similar) to non?finance processes: client onboarding, reminders, document collection, internal reporting, personal admin, and calendar/e?mail triage. [sidsaladi.substack](
)

  - Act as the internal lead for process discovery, workflow design, and automation engineering across business and personal workflows.



Key Responsibilities (with phased emphasis)  



1. Bookkeeping & Accounting Automation (Initial Focus)  

- Map current bookkeeping flows: invoice intake, approvals, coding, bank feeds, month?end routines, and compliance tasks.  

- Design and configure OpenClaw (or similar) workflows for:  

  - Invoice processing (extraction, validation, duplicate checks, approval routing, archiving). [openclawdir](
)

  - Receipt and expense processing with confidence thresholds and human review queues. [virtualworkforce](
)

  - Daily/weekly “sweep” routines that move documents through intake ? processing ? client or entity folders, and generate summary reports. [openclawdir](
)

- Integrate automations with existing accounting software and file structures, ensuring exports/imports are in the right formats (e.g. CSV for Xero/QuickBooks). [inkle](
)



2. Operations, Controls, and Support  

- Monitor automated bookkeeping workflows, manage exception queues, and escalate edge cases where judgement is required.  

- Maintain an auditable trail for all automated accounting actions (inputs, transformations, approvals) in line with agreed practice and adviser requirements. [tencentcloud](
)

- Document “how things work” for each financial workflow so an external accountant or auditor can follow the process.



3. Process Analysis and Expansion Beyond Finance  

- Run structured discovery sessions with the business owner to identify non?finance processes suitable for automation (client intake, recurring reporting, reminders, personal admin).  

- Design and implement these workflows in OpenClaw or similar tools, leveraging existing patterns (intake, validation, routing, reporting). [reddit](
)

- Maintain a roadmap of proposed automations, with estimated impact and dependencies.



4. Engineering & Tooling  

- Configure and maintain the OpenClaw (or alternative) environment, including directories, integrations, environment variables, and basic CLI or UI operations. [reddit](
)

- Implement API calls, webhooks, or light scripting where necessary to connect systems or transform data, while keeping the bulk of logic in visual workflows.  

- Continuously evaluate whether to keep a use case on OpenClaw or use a more specialised AI bookkeeping tool or platform where that makes sense. [layernext](
)







Skills and Experience  



Essential  

- Practical bookkeeping or accounting operations experience (or close collaboration with bookkeepers/accountants), including familiarity with invoices, receipts, reconciliations, and basic reporting. [dualentry](
)

- Experience with automation tools (OpenClaw, n8n, Make, Zapier, AI accounting tools, or similar) in a finance or operations context. [rightworks](
)

- Strong process analysis skills: able to turn informal “this is how we do it” into clear, repeatable steps with decision points and controls.  

- Basic technical literacy (APIs, webhooks, JSON, file?based workflows, environment variables).



Desirable  

- Direct experience with AI?assisted bookkeeping tools or AI accounting assistants (e.g. Xero/QuickBooks addons, AI reconciliation tools). [aiaccountant](
)

- Experience setting up file?based or pipeline?style workflows for accounting data (e.g. intake folders, processing queues, flagged items, reports). [openclawdir](
)

- Light scripting capability (e.g. Python/JavaScript) for custom transformations or integrations when needed.



Personal Attributes  

- Comfortable starting “hands?on in the books” and then gradually stepping back via automation.  

- Detail?oriented with a strong sense of control and auditability in financial processes.  

- Curious and systems?minded, keen to extend successful patterns from finance into broader business and personal workflows.

title: E-Commerce Customer Service Representative
description:

Work with RingCould as a Customer Service Representative. Gain hands-on experience, support fast-growing online brands, work fully remotely, and build a long-term career in eCommerce.



What You Will Be Doing

What We Offer

Submit your application here:





Who We Are

RingCould connects talent with global brands through smart home and AI solutions. Join a community where you can grow your career and thrive from home.

title: Amazon PPC Manager
description:
Urgent Hiring: Amazon PPC Manager 

Reports To: CEO / Amazon Optimization Manager 

Work Hours: Philippines Daytime Work Hours  



ONLY APPLICANTS WHO WILL APPLY THROUGH THE LINK WILL BE ENTERTAINED.



Company Vision 

We want to work with you to grow our company while helping you to become a superstar in your field. We value problem solvers, go-getters, and people with opinions who want to make an impact. You will be on the leading edge of Amazon and online strategies, continually improving your knowledge in the pursuit of helping us grow our business. 



At the same time, you will be working with a company that values community & family—both internally and customer-facing. Our mission is to delight kids & parents with creative craft kits and related products. We are 100% focused on that mission and want you to be there on the ride with us! 



That’s where you come in as our next Amazon PPC Manager. 



 Role Purpose 

The Amazon PPC Manager owns the performance of all paid advertising on Amazon across our catalog. This person leads the strategy, execution, and optimization of all Sponsored Product, Sponsored Brand, and Sponsored Display campaigns to drive discoverability, revenue growth, and profitable scaling. 



You will leverage Scale Insights daily—using advanced features like automation flows, keyword scoring, search term mining, and campaign-level rule logic—to drive high-impact decisions. Your ability to move beyond manual optimization and harness automation for scale is critical to success in this role. 



What Success Looks Like 

You consistently drive performance improvements using both manual and automated techniques, with Scale Insights as your core control panel. You own automation flows that intelligently adjust bids, pause underperforming targets, surface search term goldmines, and scale winners. You don’t just use Scale Insights—you master it. 



You maintain a proactive and adaptive PPC strategy aligned with the catalog lifecycle, launch timing, and seasonality. Through frequent reporting, experimentation, and coordination with SEO, creative, and ops, you ensure campaigns support profitable, long-term growth. 



Primary Objectives 

Maximize profitable growth through advanced automation using Scale Insights 

Own and optimize campaign architecture to drive ROI across all product stages 

Partner cross-functionally for ad-aligned launches, creatives, and keyword strategy 

Test, measure, and iterate to continuously improve CTR, CVR, and ROAS 



Regular Work Activities 

Monitor and refine SP/SB/SD campaigns daily through Scale Insights dashboards 

Execute bid adjustments, search term mining, negative pruning 

Build and optimize automation rules and flows in Scale Insights 

Audit underperforming ad groups and apply automated corrective logic 

Set up rule-based triggers for seasonal budget shifts and event-based bidding 

Conduct A/B testing for headlines, images, placements 

Weekly reporting with commentary using Scale Insights and custom dashboards 

Work with SEO to align ad keyword targeting with organic ranking efforts 

Collaborate with creative to ensure ad assets match campaign goals 

Track budget utilization and reallocate funds based on real-time data 

Maintain documentation and SOPs for all Scale Insights workflows 

Guide PPC Assistants on implementing and QA’ing automation rules 

Troubleshoot disapproved or underperforming ads 

Flag inventory and pricing concerns affecting campaign viability 

Maintain performance calendars for launches, promos, seasonality 



Key Skills 

Advanced knowledge of Scale Insights (automation, keyword scoring, flows) 

Deep understanding of Amazon Ads (SP, SB, SD) 

Strategic and analytical mindset with strong Excel/Google Sheets skills 

Mastery in keyword match types, campaign structure, and budget management 

Proven record of improving CTR, CVR, and ROAS 

Excellent reporting and data storytelling skills 

Detail-oriented with strong project tracking ability 

Comfortable owning results, fixing issues, and moving fast 

Strong communication across SEO, creative, and leadership teams 

Passionate about learning and applying new ad techniques 



People Contacts and Interactions 

SEO Manager: Weekly coordination for keyword and ranking overlap 

Creative Team: Weekly/as needed for ad assets, testing needs 

Operations: Weekly or ad-hoc for stock, pricing, launch strategy 

CEO / Leadership: Weekly/monthly reporting, performance reviews 



Role Requirements 

3+ years managing Amazon PPC campaigns 

Experience using Scale Insights (must demonstrate real automation flow use cases, not just dashboards) 

Proven success managing TACoS, ACOS, ROAS in high-SKU environments 

Experience launching campaigns for new products and scaling mature ones 

High proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets 

Familiarity with keyword research, ranking tools, and performance reporting 

Experience with automation strategy, not just manual optimization 

Self-starter with high personal accountability and ownership 

Bonus: Experience in creative ad testing and headline writing 



How to Apply:

Click the link - 

ONLY APPLICANTS WHO WILL APPLY THROUGH THE LINK WILL BE ENTERTAINED.

title: AU Accountant
description:
About You

You’re someone who brings positive energy to your work and enjoys being part of a collaborative, purpose-driven team. You’re friendly, approachable, and people feel comfortable coming to you with questions.



You care about doing things properly, you’re happy to jump in, help out, and figure things out as you go. You enjoy ticking things off a list, improving how things work, and knowing your work genuinely helps others.



Details

Reports to: Management Accountant

Employment Status: Full-time, permanent employee

Working Hours: AU Standard business hours and additional time as required by the role



Role Purpose

The Finance Support Officer is responsible for the end-to-end delivery of core transactional finance processes, including accounts payable, bank reconciliations, corporate cards, payroll processing, and financial data administration. This role is critical to the smooth running of the finance function, ensuring accurate, timely, high-quality financial processing that supports strong reporting, compliance, and organizational decision-making.



Role Responsibilities

A. Accounts Payable:

Process all supplier invoices, employee & volunteer expense claims, ensuring correct coding, approvals, GST treatment, currency, and documentation.

Manage the AP inbox and triage queries.

Maintain accurate supplier records, including bank details and documentation checks.

Prepare AP batches in line with cut-off timelines and approval workflows.

Conduct first-pass AP review before Management Accountant review (accuracy, completeness, coding).

Reconcile AP accounts and investigate variances.



B. Accounts Receivable:

Prepare and send invoices to partners, funders, and internal stakeholders.

Maintain AR schedules and follow up on outstanding amounts.

Reconcile AR balances and ensure all receipts are allocated.



C. Corporate Credit Cards:

Manage card issuance, cancellations, limits, and user onboarding.

Review monthly card claims, ensuring receipts, coding, and notes are provided.

Follow up late claims and unresolved discrepancies.

Reconcile company card accounts and ensure accurate EOM processing.



D. Payroll:

Prepare and process fortnightly payroll in line with contracts, and organisational policies.

Maintain employee master data with Xero, ensuring accuracy of bank details, tax information, superannuation, and entitlements.

Process new starters, changes, terminations, and pay adjustments.

Reconcile payroll reports, checking for variance and anomalies.

Prepare workpapers for superannuation payments, payroll journals, and leave reconciliations.

Work with P&E to ensure payroll accuracy, and timely updates to employee records.



E. Bank Reconciliation:

Complete daily and monthly bank reconciliations across all accounts.

Investigate and resolve unreconciled transactions.

Ensure all receipts, payments, and transfers are accurately recorded.



F. End of Month Processes:

Draft prepayments, accruals, apportionments, and routine journals.

Prepare EOM workpapers to a standard ready for first review.

Ensure all transactional processing is complete before close deadlines.

Maintain high-quality data hygiene to support forecasting, reporting, and analysis.



G. Data Entry and Record Keeping:

Maintain accurate, organised financial files and documentation for audit readiness.

Ensure data entry is correct, complete, and aligned with financial policies and accounting standards.

Support system updates, automation improvements, and process changes.



H. General Administrative Support:

Provide customer-focused support to internal stakeholders on finance and payroll queries.

Assist the Finance Team during peak periods (audit, EOFY, EOM, etc).

Participate in continuous improvement projects.

Contribute to team discussions on process optimisation, automation, and better ways of working.



Key Skills and Experience

-Experience in a finance support, accounts, or payroll role.

-Solid understanding of accounts payable, accounts receivable, and payroll processes.

-Proficient with Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets.

-Experience with accounting software (Xero preferred).

-Strong numeracy and data-entry accuracy.

-Understanding of basic accounting and payroll principles.

-High attention to detail and ability to deliver consistent accuracy.

-Excellent time management and ability to work to tight deadlines.

-Strong communication and customer service skills.

-Ability to work independently and take ownership of tasks.

-Comfortable with change, learning, and improving processes.

-Ability to handle confidential information with integrity and discretion.

-Certificate, Diploma, or Degree in Accounting, Finance, Business, or related field

title: Influencer Research & Outreach VA (NO EXPERIENCE NEEDED) - 8
description:
TURN YOUR SOCIAL MEDIA SCROLLING INTO A REMOTE JOB (Influencer Research + DM VA)

If you spend way too much time on Instagram/TikTok checking gym creators, this might be the easiest job you ever land.



We’re a Gen-Z–run app studio building a fast-growing fitness app, and we’re hiring VAs to help us research, reach out to, and build relationships with influencers.



- No experience required.

- No resume required.

- Just strong English + good judgment + social media instincts.

- Must work NYC timezones! (in between 9am to 5pm)



If you understand gym culture, talk like a human, and type like a native English speaker, you’re already ahead of 99% of applicants.





WHAT YOU’LL DO

This role is part lead generation, part DM outreach, part relationship management.



Your daily tasks:

- Find new fitness creators (gym/lifting niche only)

- Add them to our Google Sheet with the correct info (username, followers, country,
, etc.)

- Evaluate their profile quality (are they legit, on-brand, and worth reaching out to?)

- DM influencers using our scripts

- Handle the conversation in a friendly, natural, professional way

- Answer questions, keep the convo alive, and push creators toward collaboration

- Follow up consistently

- Track responses and organize leads properly



You’ll basically be the person discovering new influencers and bringing them into the brand.

We’ll teach you everything, you just need strong English and social media instincts.





YOU’RE A FIT IF YOU

- Have very strong written English (this is the #1 requirement)

- Can communicate clearly and confidently

- Know the gym/fitness niche (huge bonus)

- Are organized and detail-oriented

- Can follow instructions EXACTLY

- Are comfortable reaching out to people on social media

- Have good judgment (can spot fake/farm accounts instantly)

- Are under 28 (our team is young)

- Want part-time remote work you can do from anywhere



We don’t care about degrees. We care about output, consistency, and attitude.





WHAT WE OFFER

- Remote work

- Fast replies, fast onboarding

- Fun Gen-Z team

- Simple tasks anyone smart can do

- Performance-based promotions

- The chance to handle creator deals + negotiations once you prove yourself





TEST 1 (WHEN APPLIYING) — Influencer Sheet Review + Research



Use this Google Sheet template (make a copy of the sheet to modify it): 
/drive/folders/1hDVQyxHEi-ZmaKfmGk1KWSzqrxKSM-Q7?usp=sharing



You must complete:

Rows 3–13 — PASS or FAIL



Look at the creators already listed and ONLY fill the PASS / FAIL column (1st column of the table).

Base your decision on:

- Fitness/gym relevance (are they a gym influencer?)

- Their country (our target audience is North American countries and 1st world countries)

- High number of views (100 000 median views minimum)

*Little tip, less than 50% are good :)*



Rows 14–23 — Add 10 New Fitness Creators (based on the same criterias that were used for rows 3-13)

Add:

- Username

- Instagram profile link

- Number of followers

- Median views per reel (approximately)

- Full name

-
 (if public)

- Country



These must be real gym/lifting creators. No deep digging. Just fast and accurate.





TEST 2 (AFTER YOU GOT SELECTED FOR THE 2ND ROUND) — 1-3 Minutes Introduction Video



Record a simple phone video (no editing needed) and answer:

- Who you are

- Any experience with customer support jobs, social media or research

- How comfortable you are chatting with influencers through DMs

- Why you’re a good fit for this role



Just speak clearly and naturally.





HOW TO APPLY

Reply to this job post with:

A Google Drive link containing:

- Your completed Google Sheet (for TEST 1 tasks)



Answers to these short questions (in text form in the message you send when applying):

- How many hours/day or week can you work?

- Are you comfortable with NYC TIME hours full-time?

- Are you comfortable handling DM conversations?



Applications missing either test 1 OR answers to the questions will be ignored automatically.

Write “Philippines #1” at the end of your last question's answer so we know you actually read this :)

title: Landing Page Builder (Elementor) – Direct Response Pages for Trades
description:
We run a marketing agency that generates leads for trades businesses in Australia (retaining walls, concreting, renovations, etc).



We are building high-converting landing pages for paid ads, not full websites.



We're looking for a landing page builder to help implement high-converting pages.



This is not a strategy or copywriting role.



We will provide:



- page structure

- copy

- images

- direction



Your job is to build clean, responsive pages quickly in Elementor.



Responsibilities



You will be responsible for:



- Building landing pages in Elementor

- Structuring sections clearly (hero, benefits, proof, CTA, etc)

- Ensuring pages look good on mobile and desktop

- Making small design improvements where needed

- Implementing forms and call-to-action sections



Most pages will follow a similar structure, so speed and attention to detail are important.



Requirements



Ideal candidate:



- Experienced with Elementor

- Has built landing pages before (not just websites)

- Understands conversion-focused layouts

- Can follow direction well

- Fast and reliable



Bonus if you have experience with:



- Direct response landing pages

- Local service businesses

- Lead generation pages



Compensation



You will be trialed for the first month and offered a full-time role if we think you're a suitable fit.



To Apply



Please fill out this short application form:







In the final question, write the word ADOBO so we know you read the full job description.

title: Google Business Profile & Local SEO Specialist (Project Based)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Google Business Profile and Local SEO specialist who understands how to increase local visibility, improve rankings, and drive real enquiries through Google.



This role will initially begin as a project-based engagement, with the potential to become a long term or full time position based on performance and results.



The right person must be highly experienced with Google Business Profile optimisation, local citations, and local SEO strategies.



Primary Responsibilities



Optimise and manage Google Business Profiles to improve visibility in local search results.



Create and build high quality local citations across major directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, Hotfrog, True Local, Bing Places and other authority directories.



Ensure NAP consistency across all citation platforms.



Identify and submit the business to relevant local directories and industry specific directories.



Optimise Google Business Profile including:



Business categories

Services and products

Business description

Images and videos

Attributes

FAQs

Regular posts and updates



Implement strategies to improve Google Map Pack rankings.



Audit existing citations and correct inconsistencies.



Monitor competitors and identify opportunities to outrank them locally.



Implement review generation strategies to increase Google reviews.



Track rankings and visibility improvements for targeted keywords.



Provide simple reports showing improvements in visibility and rankings.



Required Skills and Experience



Strong experience managing and optimising Google Business Profiles.



Deep understanding of Local SEO ranking factors.



Proven experience creating and managing local citations.



Knowledge of NAP consistency and citation audits.



Experience using tools such as:



BrightLocal

Whitespark

Moz Local

SEMrush

Ahrefs

or similar local SEO tools.



Understanding of Google Map Pack ranking strategies.



Ability to research and submit to high authority directories.



Strong attention to detail.



What We Are Looking For



Someone who understands how to rank businesses locally on Google.



Someone who is proactive and can recommend improvements.



Someone who focuses on real visibility and leads, not just tasks.



Someone who can work independently and deliver results.



Project Scope (Initial Phase)



Audit current Google Business Profile.



Build and fix citations.



Improve profile optimisation.



Increase local visibility.



Provide recommendations to improve rankings.



Opportunity



This role will start as a project, but if the candidate demonstrates strong results and reliability, it can turn into a long term full time role managing multiple profiles.



To Apply



Please include:



Examples of Google Business Profiles you have improved.



Before and after ranking results if available.



Your approach to improving local visibility.



Your experience with citation building and local SEO.



Your expected rate for project based work.

title: Editorial Outreach and Guest Placement Specialist
description:
We are hiring an experienced outreach specialist to secure high-quality guest placements and citations for our executive articles on pricing strategy, revenue management, workforce economics, and corporate performance. This is not a mass backlink role. We do not accept junk sites, link farms, or generic marketing blogs. We know how that works and those submissions will not be approved.



You must have proven experience placing finance, SaaS, consulting, or corporate strategy content on legitimate publications with real readership. All target sites must be pre-approved before outreach. We require full transparency and shared tracking.



We are focused on placements in the United States, Canada, United Kingdom, India, France, and Germany.



Compensation is capped at $300 per month.



Application Process:

First, provide 3–5 live URLs where you personally secured finance or strategy-related guest placements. Include the domain rating and explain your role in securing each placement.



Second, submit a short research test with 10 vetted publications that would be relevant for City Shift Finance. Include domain rating and a brief explanation of why each site is strategically aligned with our topics. Also include one short pitch outline tailored to our firm.



Any AI-generated application will be ignored. If you do not have direct experience securing legitimate editorial placements, do not apply.



Our website: 



We will offer a full time position if happy with the results.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Cinematic & TikTok)
description:
JOB TITLE: Short-Form Video Editor (Cinematic & TikTok) — Luxury Brand

SALARY: $800–1,000 USD/month (based on portfolio)

TYPE: Full-time (40 hours/week)

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Async, with Vancouver overlap (PST) for feedback



---



THE MISSION



Prismiera is a luxury jewelry brand built on ancient mythology, goddess archetypes, and Dark Academia aesthetics.



We need someone to own how the brand looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



You'll produce short-form content that makes a woman feel powerful in under 30 seconds. Cinematic pacing, dark femininity, sometimes music-driven editing — designed for how Instagram and TikTok audiences actually consume. You'll also work with our AI-generated personas, integrating them into edits and cinematic storytelling as the visual anchor of the brand.



We're hiring for Taste first. Your edits/videos make people feel something before they understand what they're looking at.



---



THE STYLE



YES: Aspirational. Cinematic Storytelling. Lethal elegance. Fashion-edit energy. Dark femininity. Music-driven impact. High-production value.



NO: CapCut presets. Generic motivational quote reels. Low-effort vlog-style acting. Anything that cheapens a demi-luxury product.



You instinctively know the difference between "luxury" and "cheap." Between aspirational and try-hard. Between powerful and loud. That instinct is what we're hiring for.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Edit & Create: Produce original Instagram Reels and TikToks — cinematic, atmospheric visuals, mythology, history, modern. Some pieces you'll build from scratch. Others you'll adapt from assets in our YouTube production pipeline. Either way, you're crafting content shaped for how each platform rewards engagement.



Music-Sync Editing: Sometimes, your cuts, transitions, and visual reveals are married to the beat. Swells, drops, silence, impact — all intentional. Music is a storytelling weapon, not background noise.



AI Persona Integration: Composite and stylize our AI-generated goddess characters into edits/videos. She's the visual anchor — the face the eye locks onto while mythology and editing layers move around her. You'll make her feel like she belongs in the scene, not pasted on top of it.



AI Content Generation: You won't just receive AI assets — you'll learn to create them. We provide paid accounts for frontier AI tools (Seedance 2.0, Seedream5, and whatever launches next). You'll generate AI influencer visuals, atmospheric environments, and character footage that feed directly into your edits/videos. Prior AI experience is a plus, not a requirement — we train the right editor.



Platform Instinct: You understand what gets saved on Instagram. What gets looped on TikTok. You design for those behaviors, not just for visual quality.



Volume at Speed: Once your templates and aesthetic are locked, we expect high output. You'll ramp up from 3-5 pieces per week to 10-15 at steady state.



---



CORE REQUIREMENTS



The Aesthetic Eye. This is non-negotiable. Your portfolio should make us stop scrolling. If your work already lives in the neighborhood of cinematic, aspirational — we want to talk.



Creative Instinct. You don't wait to be told what to make. Given a goddess/character, a mood, and a piece of music, you see the edit before you open the timeline. You pitch ideas, not just execute briefs. Storytelling comes naturally — you think in narrative beats, not just cuts.



Music & Rhythm. You've made edits where the music drives the visuals — AMVs, fashion reels, phonk edits, fan edits, whatever the genre. You understand pacing as a weapon.



Premiere Pro. Your primary editing tool. You're fast, clean, and comfortable working in shared project structures.



Loop Thinking. You design edits/videos that reward rewatching. The cut that lands on beat, the detail you only catch the second time, the seamless loop point. You think in circles, not lines.



Strong English. Daily async communication — clear, direct, professional. This matters as much as your editing. Responsiveness and clarity are non-negotiable.



Reliable & Coachable. You hit deadlines or warn early. You take direct feedback and iterate fast. You flag problems with options, not excuses.



---



BONUS SKILLS (Not Required, But We'll Notice — And They Affect Your Rate)



- After Effects — compositing, layering, motion graphics, light/shadow matching. This is how AI-generated visuals get integrated into polished edits. Strong AE skills will place you at the higher end of our compensation range.

- AI generation experience — Kling3.0, Veo3.1, Comfyui, Seedance2.0, Seedream5.0 or similar. If you already know these tools, your rate reflects it. If not, we provide paid accounts and training.

- Color grading — pushing mixed footage into a consistent luxury palette

- Typography sense — text overlays that feel intentional and premium

- Sound design — SFX layering beyond just music (risers, hits, atmospheric texture)

- Understanding of Instagram analytics — saves, shares, completion rates

- Experience building visual identities for brands or personas on social media



---



HOW THIS ROLE FITS



Other editors handle cinematic YouTube production — you own social media (sometimes YouTube as well). Same mythology, same brand, different platform behavior. Each editor has a distinct lane, and yours is how Prismiera looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



---



SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS



RAM: 16GB minimum (32GB preferred) + SSD

Reliable high-speed internet (upload speed matters)

Must run Premiere Pro and browser-based AI tools simultaneously



---



PAID TRIAL (Shortlisted Candidates)



Before any full-time commitment, we run a paid trial. We provide real assets, style references, and the AI persona visuals. You deliver content.



Trial is compensated at $150 USD at the end of each week. For select candidates, we may run a shorter 2-day trial at $100 USD for a single deliverable.



If it's a mutual fit after 30 days, you transition to confirmed status with bi-weekly payments at your assessed rate — paid before work. Prepayment is earned through the trial, not given on day one.



This protects both sides — you see whether the work fits your strengths, we see whether the output fits our brand.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



- Paid accounts for all frontier AI tools — we provide the tools, you bring the talent

- AI training — you'll learn to generate content with cutting-edge tools as part of your workflow, even if you've never touched them before

- Creative ownership — you're defining how a luxury brand looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok from day one

- Clear briefs — asset libraries, mood references, and specific direction for every batch

- Direct feedback — specific, constructive notes on every edit

- Rate growth — your compensation grows as your capabilities do. We invest in editors who invest in the work.

- A brand worth building — you're not joining a finished machine, you're helping build one. We're looking for long-term commitment.



---



COMPENSATION



$800–1,000 USD/month based on experience. Editors with stronger technical skills (After Effects, AI generation) start at the higher end. We assess your rate based on your portfolio, not your résumé.



After confirmed hire: bi-weekly payments, paid before work.



---



OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY



All outputs (edits, project files, prompts, generated assets, persona visuals) are Prismiera property and must remain confidential.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Do not send a generic cover letter.

Use 7 apply points or more when applying.



Subject line: PRISMIERA EDITOR — [Your Name]



Send the following (in this order):



1. Your Best Work. Link to ONE video that showcases your creativity, editing execution, and aesthetic taste. This should be the piece you're most proud of — the one that makes people stop scrolling.



2. The Rhythm Test. Link to ONE edit where the music drives the visuals. Show us your beat-sync instinct. (Can overlap with #1 if one video demonstrates both.)



3. The Luxury Test. In 3-5 bullets, how do you make an edit feel "expensive" instead of "cheap"?



4. The Creative Instinct Test (3-5 sentences). You're given a 45-second cinematic video about a queen who poisoned her entire court, a folder of our AI Goddess visuals, and a dark atmospheric beat. Pitch a 15-second Instagram Reel designed to get saved — tell us your audio choice, pacing, and what the first 2 seconds look like.



5. Hardware. Your PC specs: CPU / GPU / RAM. Plus your internet upload speed.



6. Turnaround Estimate. Given existing footage, a music track, and an established editing template — how long would a 15-20 second piece take you? How long would a 45 second Cinematic AI video take you?



7. The Rewrite. Rewrite this sentence to sound dark, powerful, and aspirational: "She is really cool and strong and she wins."



Looking forward to meeting and working with you!

nts, and industry updates

What We’re Looking For:

title: Senior Marketing Manager for Personal Growth Organization
description:
Are you an experienced digital marketer looking to make a positive impact on the world?

mbers to bring your ideas to life?

Do you want to take real ownership for architecting the marketing team of an established company, with a proven product and great content?



If you answered yes to any of the questions above, this job may be for you.



Overview: 



Andrew Horn is an industry-leading executive coach who helps founders and CEO's to cultivate personal integrity and relational mastery. You can learn more about his coaching and speaking at 
. In addition to his executive coaching practice, Andrew is the founder of The Junto. More information below. 



The Junto is a men’s work organization focused on quarterly wilderness retreats, a year-long mastermind, and 1-on- coaching. We support entrepreneurs and executives who are serious about growth and self-leadership. Having worked with hundreds of men—including founders of companies like Casper, Hinge, and TOMS—we are now at a stage where we need to systemize our marketing and outreach.



Historically, our marketing has been driven by referrals and our founder Andrew’s personal network. To scale, we need a full-stack marketing approach that removes Andrew from manual outreach, builds a sustainable pipeline of leads, and grows our influence in the space of men’s personal development.



–



We’re looking for a resourceful, results-driven Marketing Manager who can take full ownership of our marketing initiatives. This role requires hands-on execution and leveraging AI tools to amplify our message. You will report directly to the CEO and co-founder, Andrew Horn



Here are the platforms we most want to grow...








/itsandrewhorn



and 
 instagram and linkedin accounts. 



What You’ll Be Responsible For:



Content creation - Overseeing our project manager and creating quality content across web, newsletter and social to drive engagement. We have books, ted talks and podcast appearances that we need to mind for content and then need someone to distribute this across all relevant platforms. 

Video editing: You should be adept with things like riverside,  capcut and capable of repurposing long videos into short, viral content pieces.

Podcast production - I have a podcast and will need help producing episode and creation content from each. 

LinkedIn Outreach – Developing strategic outreach to founders and CEOs. 

Social Media Growth – Expanding our audience across relevant platforms and overseeing consistent content creation.

CRM & Referral Systems – Systematizing our CRM and enhancing our referral network.



Skills we are looking for:



Hands-on experience with ai content creation, Meta Business Suite, Linkedin and youtube. 



Exceptional written and verbal communication, with the ability to create compelling content using AI tools.

A strong aesthetic sense, ensuring brand consistency across all marketing channels. You need to know what looks good. 

Autonomous & resourceful, thriving in a high-growth, mission-driven environment.

Personality traits we value



Passionate about personal growth

Resourceful and comfortable working with a high degree of autonomy

Must be a fluid english speaker

Detail oriented

Deep kindness and conscious communication



How to Apply:

Include a short video note introducing yourself and why you think you are a good fit for this role. We value clear communication and tech-savviness. Use 
 is helpful.

title: High-Ticket SaaS Sales Closer (Canadian Tech) | Remote
description:
ARE YOU A HUNTER?

We are a Canadian-based technology company. We are looking for an ambitious Sales Hunter, not an order taker. We sell a "Smart Web Lead Management & Automation System" that businesses actually need.



THE PRODUCT:

You aren't selling "air." You are selling a high-value automation tool.



* The Market: North America (Canada/USA).

* The Pitch: We help businesses automate growth. It works.

* The Opportunity: The product is solid, meaning the chance of "Zero Sales" is near nil if you put in the work.



THE MONEY (BASE + HIGH COMMISSION):

We are looking for a partner, not an employee. We are willing to invest in the right person.



* Base Salary: Negotiable. (We are happy to discuss a base retainer for a candidate with a proven track record).

* The Commission: This is where you make your real money. You earn approx. 14,000 PHP ($335 CAD) for every single sale.

* The Target: Close just 2 deals a month = 28,000 PHP.

* The Accelerator: Continue earning 14,000 PHP for every single sale after that.

* The Potential: Uncapped. Our top reps aim for 60,
,000+ PHP monthly.



THE ROLE:



* Outbound Hunting: You will call North American businesses (EST hours) to demo our software.

* Closing: You are not just setting appointments; you are closing the deal.

* Tools: We provide the dialer, the leads, and the training. You bring the hustle.

* Schedule: Flexible, but you must be willing to make calls during Canadian Business Hours (Eastern Standard Time).



WHO YOU ARE:



* Hungry: You prefer uncapped commission over a limited salary because you know you can sell.

* Experienced: You have done outbound B2B sales or appointment setting before (SaaS preferred).

* Tech-Savvy: You can learn a new software product quickly so you can demo it with confidence.

* Resilient: You have a thick skin and a neutral/professional English accent.



HOW TO APPLY (STRICT REQUIREMENT):

I am looking for a star. To prove it is you:



1. Send a message with the subject line: "I'm Hungry"

2. Include a link to your resume/profile.

3. MANDATORY: Include a link to a 60-second voice recording (Vocaroo or Google Drive) telling me why you prefer commission sales.



Note: Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed.

title: Executive Assistant - Healthcare Operations
description:
We are a healthcare organization looking for a sharp, self-directed Virtual Assistant to join our team for the long haul. This is not a short-term project.  We are building a working relationship with someone who wants to grow with us, take on more responsibility over time, and become a trusted part of how we operate.



If you are highly organized, comfortable learning new systems, and take pride in doing things right the first time, we want to hear from you.



What You’ll Be Doing:

• Assist with healthcare administrative work including contracting coordination and operational projects

• Conduct online research and compile information clearly and accurately

• Organize documents, human resources, spreadsheets, and records so nothing falls through the cracks

• Support scheduling,
 organization, and task tracking for executive staff

• Handle miscellaneous special projects and adapt as our needs evolve



You’re the Right Fit If You…

• Are highly organized and genuinely enjoy bringing order to complex tasks

• Are tech-savvy and can learn new platforms quickly without hand-holding

• Are proficient with Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, and spreadsheets

• Are proficient with communication platforms like Slack, Microsoft Teams,

Preferred (Not Required)

The Details

• Rate: $5–$7/hr depending on experience

Why This Role

We are committed to building a real working relationship, not a revolving door. The person who joins us will have the opportunity to grow their responsibilities and become an integral part of our operations over time. We value clear communication, mutual respect, and people who take ownership of their work.



How to Apply

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph. In your application, briefly tell us about a time you had to learn a new system or tool quickly and how you handled it. Applications without this will not be prioritized.

title: Social Media Manager/Strategist VA
description:
Job Title: Social Media Manager/Strategist VA 

Send your resumes/portfolios to 

Type of Position: Full-time (40 hours per week) long-term position

Working Time Zone: Flexible (United States working hours are not required)



Job Description: 

ThorTeaches is an online educational services company that specializes in video-based training in the IT and cybersecurity field. We're looking for a creative and strategic Social Media Manager to build and manage our online presence. This role is ideal for someone who understands the power of not only social media but other online platforms to connect with audiences and grow communities.



Key Responsibilities: 

Social Media Strategy & Management: You'll be the voice of ThorTeaches across social media platforms, creating and curating engaging content that resonates with our target audience. This includes developing content calendars, writing compelling captions and posts, creating or sourcing visuals (graphics, photos, video) for posts, scheduling and publishing content across multiple platforms, and maintaining a consistent company voice and aesthetic.

Community Engagement & Growth: You'll actively engage with our online community by responding to comments, messages, and mentions based on defined schedules and priorities, monitoring company mentions and relevant conversations and identifying opportunities for engagement and collaboration. You'll also track engagement metrics and provide insights into what content performs best.

Analytics & Optimization: You'll monitor social media performance using platform analytics and third-party tools, prepare regular reports on growth, engagement, and key metrics with clear recommendations for improvement of our social media strategy, and stay current with platform updates, algorithm changes, and social media best practices.



Secondary duties may include occasional administrative or support tasks such as handling limited customer queries, maintaining mailing lists, conducting basic research, and creating or formatting documents in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint.

The role is a non-sales role, with no phone requirements, focused on growing out social media reach, support our customer experience, and our educational platform's growth.



Required Skills:

o Proven Social Media Management: 2+ years of experience managing business accounts with measurable results. Note: General Administrative VA experience does not qualify

o Experience managing communities beyond social media (
,
 Groups, forums, etc.)

o Excellent writing and communication skills with ability to maintain ThorTeaches' authentic, no-nonsense brand voice (not corporate/salesy)

o Proven ability to create scroll-stopping content using hooks, visuals, and timing

o Deep understanding of platform-specific content strategies, demographics, and algorithms 
, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram), especially for education/B2C conversion-focused content.

o Short-form video production experience, including editing, captioning, and repurposing long-form content into platform-native formats (Reels, Shorts, TikTok)

o Ability to analyze social media performance and translate insights into content and campaign decisions focused on conversions and growth

o Content Creation & Graphic Design: Proficiency with design tools (Canva, Adobe Creative Suite) to create high-quality static assets (carousels, infographics, thumbnails)

o Understanding of content marketing funnels and how social media drives course sales

o Campaign Strategy & Execution: Proven experience designing, executing, and optimizing social media campaigns end-to-end content across multiple platforms simultaneously (goals, content mapping, execution, performance tracking)

o Portfolio / Proof of Work: Applicants must be prepared to share examples of social media accounts, posts, or campaigns they directly managed and explain their role and results during the screening process.



Preferred Qualifications:

o Understanding of online course structures and educational content workflows

o Understanding of hashtag strategy and social SEO

o Familiarity with emerging social media trends and platforms

o Background in copywriting or content marketing

o Experience creating content in the IT/cybersecurity education space OR demonstrated ability to quickly learn technical topics



Technical Requirements:

o PC (laptop/desktop) with minimum specs:

? Windows 10/11 or macOS (recent versions)

? 16 GB RAM 

? 256 GB SSD storage minimum (video/audio files are large)

? Processor: Intel i5/AMD Ryzen 5 or better

o Webcam and microphone for video meetings

o Stable internet connection: 

? 25 Mbps download minimum (50+ Mbps preferred)

? 10 Mbps upload minimum (for video uploads)



Nice to have:

o Dual monitors for improved productivity

o Backup internet connection, Power backup/UPS recommended (for internet/power interruptions)

o Dedicated quiet workspace

o Smartphone for emergency communications and 2FA



• Personal Qualities: 

o Creative and proactive mindset

o Strong sense of brand awareness

o Excellent time management

o Authentic and engaging communication style

o Passion for social media and digital marketing



• What we offer: 

o Starting Salary: $800-1,000 dependent on experience.

o 75% salary in the training period, it can be up to 3 months, but most members finish it in 2 weeks.

o Profit sharing and 13th month 

o 15 days Paid vacation days (Accrued one day per month, 3 at EOY), unused days carry over for 1 year.

o 10 paid holidays per year

o HMO allowance ($100 /month) – 6 months after trial period.

o Internet allowance ($40 /month).

o 100% remote, flexible working hours (except the Mandatory Monday morning tea
eting, 8:00 PH time)

o Professional development with access to 50+ professional development courses (more being added as needed)

o Opportunities for certification exams

o Supportive, growth-oriented culture



Work Commitment:

o This is a full-time position with excellent compensation and benefits

o We expect this role to be your primary professional commitment

o Other freelance/part-time work MAY be acceptable IF: 

? It doesn't conflict with your responsibilities or schedule here

? It doesn't violate our NDA or non-compete agreements

? You maintain consistent quality and availability for our work 

? You're transparent about any potential conflicts

? You get written approval for it from leadership



Importance Note of our Culture: 



We operate differently from traditional hierarchical organizations. We expect you to:

o Ask questions when something isn't clear

o Propose better ways of doing things

o Communicate directly with leadership about any issues

etings

VERA OUTSOURCING

title: Senior Tax Accountant [Australian Experience] Remote
description:
Integrity Plus Accounting (Australia)



Short Video saying Hi! from Scott Kay, Founder of Integrity Plus Accounting:





? We will review the first 20 applications within 24 hours.

The successful applicant will be given time to consider the role, do a paid trial and to give appropriate notice to their current employer. 



Quick Summary



Integrity Plus Accounting is a growing Australian accounting firm specialising in small businesses, property investors and individuals building wealth. You will work directly with a Chartered Accountant with 20+ years Australian tax experience and help prepare and review tax work across companies, trusts and individuals.



Salary: PHP 120,000 – 180,000 per month depending on experience.



? Quick Apply: write the word "integrity" and send 2 lines with (1) your years of Australian tax experience and (2) the tax areas you are strongest in (CGT, Div7A, Trusts etc.).

e.g.  Hi

integrity - 4 years with Australian BPO doing Accounts/Tax returns. I'm strongest with company accounts and tax returns.

Thanks [your name here and Whatsapp phone number #}



You can send your resume later.



About Integrity Plus Accounting



Integrity Plus Accounting is an Australian accounting firm focused on helping clients build wealth through business and property.



Our clients include:



• Small business owners

• Property investors

• Individuals building long-term wealth



You will work closely with the founder and Australian team, assisting with complex tax work and helping mentor junior accountants.



We aim to build a long-term team where accountants grow professionally and technically.



Responsibilities

Tax Compliance & Advisory



• Prepare and review Company, Trust, Partnership and Individual Tax Returns

• Prepare complex Individual Tax Returns (property, CGT, shares, crypto etc.)

• Work with small business clients across multiple entities

• Assist with tax planning and restructuring work

• Apply Div7A rules and calculate Minimum Yearly Repayments

• Calculate Capital Gains Tax for property and investments

• Assist with FBT calculations and reporting



Small Business Support



• Review bookkeeping work

• Review BAS preparation

• Assist with payroll compliance and super obligations

• Ensure financial records are accurate before tax returns are prepared



Team Support



• Review work prepared by junior accountants

• Provide guidance and training

• Ensure workpapers are clear and compliant



Client Communication



• Draft client
s explaining tax matters clearly

• Translate complex tax issues into simple English

• Assist the founder with client advisory discussions



Required Skills



• 5+ years experience in Australian taxation

• Strong knowledge of:



Companies

Trusts

Partnerships

Individual tax returns

Div7A loans and UPEs

CGT events (property and shares)

Small business tax issues



• Experience preparing high-quality workpapers

• Strong written and spoken English

• Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Advantage (Not Essential)



Experience with:



• Xero / Xero Tax

• Karbon / Ignition

• BGL or SMSF knowledge

• Reviewing other accountants’ work

• Working with property investors



Training can be provided where required.



Work Hours



• Full Time – 40 hours per week

• Monday to Friday

• Flexible hours



Ideally starting before 10am Philippines time to align with Australian working hours.



Salary



PHP 120,000 – 180,000 per month



Salary depends on your experience and technical knowledge of Australian taxation.



Benefits



• Work directly with an Australian Chartered Accountant (20+ years experience)

• Long-term stable role with career growth

• Fully remote work from home

• Choice of Philippines Public Holidays OR Australian Public Holidays



Company Values



Integrity Plus Accounting is built on Christian ethics, including:



• Integrity and honesty

• Serving others

• Excellence in our work

• Supporting tea
mbers and clients to succeed



You do not need to be Christian, but we expect tea
mbers to respect these values and treat others with professionalism and kindness.



How to Apply



We encourage people who take action.



Send 2 lines (adding the word "integrity" at the front):



1?? Years of Australian tax experience

2?? Tax areas you are strongest in



Example:



“integrity - I have 7 years experience in Australian tax.

Strong in CGT, Trusts and Div7A.”



If suitable, we will ask for your resume and further information.

This role involves editing short-form videos with engaging captions, sound effects, and fast-paced edits designed to perform well on social media platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

title: Experienced Accountant
description:
Accountant (Remote)



About Us

We’re on a mission to bring high-quality, air- and oven-dried meat snacks to consumers across the U.S. through our growing portfolio of brands. As pioneers in the American biltong space, we take pride in offering protein-packed, clean-label snacks made with simple and honest ingredients.

As our operations continue to expand and the company grows, we are looking for a reliable and experienced Accountant to join our team and support the company’s finance and accounting operations.



Position Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Accountant with diverse accounting experience who can assist with day-to-day accounting tasks and support the preparation of financial reports. The ideal candidate is comfortable working with different accounting functions such as payroll, accounts receivable, accounts payable, and financial statement preparation.

This role is ideal for someone who is organized, analytical, and capable of managing multiple accounting responsibilities in a remote work environment.



Key Responsibilities

• Handle daily accounting operations, including recording transactions and maintaining accurate financial records

• Manage Accounts Receivable, including invoicing customers and monitoring collections

• Process and manage Accounts Payable, ensuring timely and accurate payments to vendors

• Assist with payroll processing and payroll-related entries

• Perform account reconciliations and ensure balances are accurate

• Assist in the preparation of financial statements and other financial reports

• Maintain organized and complete supporting documentation for financial transactions

• Work with the team to ensure accounting records are accurate and up to date

• Assist in improving accounting processes and maintaining proper financial controls





Qualifications

• Certified Public Accountant (CPA) required

• Experience with accounting software or ERP systems; familiarity with Sage 300 is an advantage

• Solid understanding of general accounting principles and financial reporting

• Experience handling multiple accounting functions such as payroll, A/R, and A/P

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

• Ability to work independently in a remote setup

• Good communication skills and ability to collaborate with team members



Work Setup

• Remote work

• 3:00 PM – 12:00 AM Philippine Time

title: LinkedIn Outreach & B2B Appointment Setting VA  Australian Buyer’s Agency (Long-Term Role)
description:
I run a fast-growing Australian Buyer’s Agency working with property investors.



Your job is to build and manage a LinkedIn outreach system that consistently books qualified B2B calls with Australian mortgage brokers (and later accountants).



This is not a content-only role.

This is not a spam role.

This is not “send 100 messages and hope”.



Your success is measured by:



Booked calls with the right people



How effectively you warm and nurture conversations



Your Core Responsibility (Very Clear)



You will own the LinkedIn B2B growth engine end-to-end.



That means:



Identifying and connecting with Australian mortgage brokers



Running structured, human, non-salesy LinkedIn conversations



Warming prospects and booking intro calls



Managing follow-ups and light nurture



Reporting weekly on connections, conversations, and booked calls



Later (once proven), this role may expand to accountants and other referral partners.



What You’ll Be Doing

Daily



Send 30–50 targeted LinkedIn connection requests (no mass spam)



Follow a proven messaging framework



Respond to replies and continue conversations naturally



Log activity and outcomes in a simple tracker



Weekly



Book a minimum of 3–5 qualified intro calls



Review what messaging is working and optimise



Share feedback on objections, patterns, and responses you’re seeing



Optional later responsibility (only after performance is proven):



Assist with light LinkedIn posting using repurposed content



Who This Role Is FOR



This role is for you if:



You’ve done LinkedIn outreach or B2B appointment setting before



You understand professional conversations, not copy-paste scripts



You’re confident messaging brokers, accountants, and business owners



You can follow systems and think independently



You care about results, not just activity



Absolute MUST-HAVES (Non-Negotiable)



? Proven experience with LinkedIn outreach or appointment setting

? Strong written English (professional, natural, not salesy)

? Comfortable following a framework and improving it

? Partial overlap with Australian business hours

? Detail-oriented and organised



Strongly Preferred



Experience in Australian real estate, mortgage, or finance



Clear understanding of:



What a buyers agent does



What a mortgage broker does



Prior experience booking B2B intro calls (not consumer leads)



What You Will NOT Be Doing



No cold calling



No selling on calls



No mass spam



No fake personalisation



You warm ? qualify ? book. Nothing else.



Tools You’ll Use



LinkedIn (Sales Navigator experience is a plus)



Google Sheets / CRM



Clear SOPs and frameworks (provided)



Pay & Growth



Starting rate: AUD $5/hour



Performance-based increases once results are proven



Long-term role with increased responsibility if you execute



This is not a short-term gig.



How to Apply (Mandatory)



Start your application with:



A short summary of your LinkedIn or outreach experience



Who you’ve booked B2B calls for previously



Answer clearly:



“How would you start a conversation with an Australian mortgage broker on LinkedIn without sounding salesy?”



Applications that skip this will be ignored.

title: Short-Form Content Strategist & Editor (Influencer-Level Growth Focus)
description:
About The Role



I run an Australian buyers agency and personal brand focused on property investment.



I’m not looking for someone to post content.



I’m looking for someone who understands:



Hooks



Storylines



Retention psychology



Viral research



Pattern extraction



Replication of proven formats



Your job is simple:



Study what works.

Break down why it works.

Rebuild it in my voice.

Execute at volume.



This is a performance role. Not an admin role.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

1?? Viral Research & Pattern Extraction



You will:



Study high-performing Australian property creators (100k+ views regularly)



Study creators outside the industry with strong engagement



Break down:



Hook structure



Opening tension



Story arc



Visual pacing



On-screen text psychology



Caption structure



Identify repeatable patterns



Build swipe files and content frameworks



You must explain WHY content performs not just say “it went viral.”



2?? Scriptwriting (Human, Not AI)



You will:



Write short-form scripts in my voice (using my previous videos as examples to how I speak)



Create strong first 3-second hooks



Build tension and narrative



Deliver clean logical flow



Avoid robotic, AI-sounding scripts



Every script must have:



Clear hook



Emotional or strategic tension



Insight or value



Strong close



3?? Editing (Authority, Not Gimmicks)



Clean, fast-paced Reels/TikToks



Strategic on-screen text to increase retention



No overused transitions



4?? Performance & Iteration



Track views, retention, engagement



Identify what flops and why



Double down on winners



Suggest new angles based on data



If content underperforms, you care.



You MUST Have



Direct experience working with an influencer or personal brand

OR

A proven portfolio showing high-view short-form content



Strong understanding of:



Hooks



Retention curves



Audience psychology



Viral formats



Ability to research creators with 100k+ views and extract patterns



High standards and independent thinking



Strong English



You Are NOT a Fit If



You rely on ChatGPT to generate scripts



You only schedule posts



You only add captions



You need step-by-step instructions for everything



You’ve never analysed why content performs



Bonus If You Understand



Australian real estate



Property investing terminology



Buyers agency model



Financial literacy content



Not mandatory, but helpful.
