title: Senior Accountant / Management Accountant
description:
Senior Accountant (AU Client) – Xero Certified



Reports to: Managing Director

Location: Remote (Work From Home)

Employment Type: Full Time

Work Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Manila Time



About the Role



Staff Connect Australia is recruiting on behalf of an established Australian business operating across multiple service divisions.



We are seeking a high-level, Xero-accredited Senior Accountant to take full ownership of the company’s financial systems, reporting, and compliance. This long-term role reports directly to the Managing Director and requires a detail-driven professional who can independently manage accounting operations while delivering accurate reporting and actionable financial insights to support business decisions.



This role is ideal for someone experienced in Australian accounting standards, multi-entity structures, and operational financial reporting.



Systems & Tools Environment

Xero

GeoOp

Live Payments Portal

Airtable

Slack



Certifications Required

- Xero Advisor Certified

- Xero Payroll Certified



Required Experience

- Australian BAS and IAS preparation

- Company tax return support (liaising with external accountants as needed)

- Experience working with Australian clients or accounting firms



Key Responsibilities

Bookkeeping & Reconciliations

-Maintain accurate financial records in Xero for all entities

- Perform bank, credit card, and loan reconciliations

- Allocate GST codes and track job-related costs

- Review and code expense entries with proper documentation

- Reconcile inter-entity transactions and maintain a clean general ledger

-

Accounts Payable (Suppliers & Contractors)

- Process and schedule invoices for payment

- Verify invoice accuracy against purchase orders or job references

- Reconcile supplier statements and maintain positive relationships

- Process weekly contractor payments and maintain payout registers

-

Accounts Receivable (Customer Billing & Collections)

- Review job logs from GeoOp and ensure accurate invoicing

- Identify and correct invoicing/data-entry errors

- Manage debtor follow-ups and resolve invoice disputes

- Maintain an accurate aged receivables ledger and report trends



Payroll & Contractor Management

- Process fortnightly payroll in compliance with Australian award rules

- Audit ove
 claims for accuracy and fairness

- Reconcile PAYG, superannuation, and leave balances

- Maintain employee and contractor payment records

- Post and reconcile all payroll journals



Balance Sheet, Assets & Financial Control

- Maintain reconciled balance sheets each month

- Manage the fixed asset register and depreciation schedules

- Record and monitor capital purchases (vehicles, IT, plant, and equipment)

- Administer dividend payments, director loans, and shareholder distributions

- Track intercompany transactions, retained earnings, and equity movements



BAS / IAS Preparation & Compliance

- Prepare monthly IAS and quarterly BAS for review

- Ensure GST and PAYG data is accurate

- Maintain full working papers and supporting documentation

- Monitor ATO correspondence and ensure timely compliance



Financial & Operational Reporting

- Produce weekly cashflow forecasts and monthly management reports

- Conduct variance analysis and identify cost-saving opportunities

- Track workforce utilization, revenue per labour hour, and service profitability

- Provide actionable insights for management, including pricing and discount analysis



Audit & Year-End Support

- Prepare reconciliations and schedules for audits and EOFY processes

- Liaise with external accountants and auditors

- Assist with year-end adjustments, including depreciation, accruals, and provisions



Key Skills & Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or equivalent

- Minimum 3+ years’ experience with Australian clients or accounting firms

- Advanced Xero proficiency, including payroll, fixed assets, and reporting

- Strong knowledge of Australian BAS, GST, PAYG, and Superannuation compliance

- Experience managing balance sheets, dividends, and inter-entity accounts

- Excellent accounts payable, receivable, and reconciliation skills

- Strong analytical and financial reporting capability

- High attention to detail and accuracy

- Able to work independently and proactively identify risks or opportunities



Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- Balance sheets reconciled monthly with full supporting schedules

- Zero unexplained variances in payroll, assets, or BAS accounts

- Timely issuance of invoices and active debtor management

- Accurate and punctual supplier and contractor payments

- Management reports delivered with insightful commentary on trends and efficiencies

- Workforce utilization, cancellations, and discount impacts reported monthly

- BAS/IAS submissions prepared ahead of deadlines

- EOFY and audit documentation complete and delivered on time

title: Online English/World History Teachers (Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Amazon Sponsored Ads SEO PPC Advertising Administrator
description:
We hope that you will consider joining our incredible eCommerce & Business Development team and help monitor and optimize our Amazon PPC Sponsored Advertising Campaigns. In this role you will work alongside a senior teammate who will help to educate you on our products, processes, and best-practices. This senior associate will also be available to help you throughout the day with your various assignments.



Job responsibilities include:

> Building and Optimizing Amazon Sponsored Advertising Campaigns using Helium 10 and Amazon Seller Central

> Removing Advertising Campaigns that are not performing to our specification

> Modify spend on Advertising Campaigns so they comply with our best-practices



Basic Requirements:

> At least 1 year of previous professional paid experience managing sponsored advertising campaigns

> Experience with Amazon Sponsored Advertising

> Knowledge of Helium 10

> Have a proven track record of success optimizing Amazon Sponsored Advertising



Accessory Power is a consumer electronics manufacturer dedicated to providing a diverse range of high quality products for over 30 years. We manufacture and market thousands of products under our four main brands: GOgroove® | ENHANCE® | ReVIVE® | USA Gear® along with a handful of other lines and various accessory products. We are growing and we need your help.



Visit 
/about to learn a little more about our incredible past and our bright future ahead.

title: Social Media Assistant
description:
We're a London-based social media agency working with food and beverage, lifestyle, and wellness brands. We're looking for a Social Media Assistant to support the day-to-day running of multiple client accounts.



This role is hands-on and collaborative, with a strong focus on organisation, consistency, and keeping multiple brands running smoothly.



Responsibilities

- Write and adapt copy for social content across TikTok, LinkedIn, and Instagram within established brand tones

- Schedule and publish content across multiple client accounts while keeping content calendars up to date

- Support copywriting for
 newsletters when needed

- Create simple visuals in Canva using existing brand templates and assets

- Do basic editing for short-form video content (trimming, captions, formatting)

- Monitor comments and DMs and flag anything that needs attention

- Stay aware of TikTok and LinkedIn trends and platform shifts, and flag relevant opportunities for clients

- Prepare monthly performance reports and highlight patterns or changes in performance

- Keep assets, calendars, and internal documentation organised across different brands



What we're looking for

- 1+ year of experience in social media management or a similar role

- Strong familiarity with TikTok and how content performs on the platform

- Comfortable writing in different brand tones

- Experience scheduling and managing content across multiple accounts

- Basic Canva and short-form video editing skills

- Strong organisation and attention to detail



Working setup

- Flexible schedule

- We require daily overlap between 10AM - 2PM GMT for collaboration with the team



How to apply



Please send:

- A short cover letter explaining why this role would be a good fit for you

- A portfolio or examples of social media work you've contributed to



A small task will be provided to selected candidates as part of the process.

title: Amazon PPC Manager
description:
Urgent Hiring: Amazon PPC Manager

Reports To: CEO / Amazon Optimization Manager

Work Hours: Philippines Daytime Work Hours



ONLY APPLICANTS WHO WILL APPLY THROUGH THE LINK WILL BE ENTERTAINED.



Company Vision

We want to work with you to grow our company while helping you to become a superstar in your field. We value problem solvers, go-getters, and people with opinions who want to make an impact. You will be on the leading edge of Amazon and online strategies, continually improving your knowledge in the pursuit of helping us grow our business.



At the same time, you will be working with a company that values community & family—both internally and customer-facing. Our mission is to delight kids & parents with creative craft kits and related products. We are 100% focused on that mission and want you to be there on the ride with us!



That’s where you come in as our next Amazon PPC Manager.



Role Purpose

The Amazon PPC Manager owns the performance of all paid advertising on Amazon across our catalog. This person leads the strategy, execution, and optimization of all Sponsored Product, Sponsored Brand, and Sponsored Display campaigns to drive discoverability, revenue growth, and profitable scaling.



You will leverage Scale Insights daily—using advanced features like automation flows, keyword scoring, search term mining, and campaign-level rule logic—to drive high-impact decisions. Your ability to move beyond manual optimization and harness automation for scale is critical to success in this role.



What Success Looks Like

You consistently drive performance improvements using both manual and automated techniques, with Scale Insights as your core control panel. You own automation flows that intelligently adjust bids, pause underperforming targets, surface search term goldmines, and scale winners. You don’t just use Scale Insights—you master it.



You maintain a proactive and adaptive PPC strategy aligned with the catalog lifecycle, launch timing, and seasonality. Through frequent reporting, experimentation, and coordination with SEO, creative, and ops, you ensure campaigns support profitable, long-term growth.



Primary Objectives

Maximize profitable growth through advanced automation using Scale Insights

Own and optimize campaign architecture to drive ROI across all product stages

Partner cross-functionally for ad-aligned launches, creatives, and keyword strategy

Test, measure, and iterate to continuously improve CTR, CVR, and ROAS



Regular Work Activities

Monitor and refine SP/SB/SD campaigns daily through Scale Insights dashboards

Execute bid adjustments, search term mining, negative pruning

Build and optimize automation rules and flows in Scale Insights

Audit underperforming ad groups and apply automated corrective logic

Set up rule-based triggers for seasonal budget shifts and event-based bidding

Conduct A/B testing for headlines, images, placements

Weekly reporting with commentary using Scale Insights and custom dashboards

Work with SEO to align ad keyword targeting with organic ranking efforts

Collaborate with creative to ensure ad assets match campaign goals

Track budget utilization and reallocate funds based on real-time data

Maintain documentation and SOPs for all Scale Insights workflows

Guide PPC Assistants on implementing and QA’ing automation rules

Troubleshoot disapproved or underperforming ads

Flag inventory and pricing concerns affecting campaign viability

Maintain performance calendars for launches, promos, seasonality



Key Skills

Advanced knowledge of Scale Insights (automation, keyword scoring, flows)

Deep understanding of Amazon Ads (SP, SB, SD)

Strategic and analytical mindset with strong Excel/Google Sheets skills

Mastery in keyword match types, campaign structure, and budget management

Proven record of improving CTR, CVR, and ROAS

Excellent reporting and data storytelling skills

Detail-oriented with strong project tracking ability

Comfortable owning results, fixing issues, and moving fast

Strong communication across SEO, creative, and leadership teams

Passionate about learning and applying new ad techniques



People Contacts and Interactions

SEO Manager: Weekly coordination for keyword and ranking overlap

Creative Team: Weekly/as needed for ad assets, testing needs

Operations: Weekly or ad-hoc for stock, pricing, launch strategy

CEO / Leadership: Weekly/monthly reporting, performance reviews



Role Requirements

3+ years managing Amazon PPC campaigns

Experience using Scale Insights (must demonstrate real automation flow use cases, not just dashboards)

Proven success managing TACoS, ACOS, ROAS in high-SKU environments

Experience launching campaigns for new products and scaling mature ones

High proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets

Familiarity with keyword research, ranking tools, and performance reporting

Experience with automation strategy, not just manual optimization

Self-starter with high personal accountability and ownership

Bonus: Experience in creative ad testing and headline writing



How to Apply:

Click the link - 
/o/JB-7HSMY4Q39/landing

ONLY APPLICANTS WHO WILL APPLY THROUGH THE LINK WILL BE ENTERTAINED.

title: Lead Research & Outreach Assistant (Youth Sports Organizations)
description:
Hello,



I run a design studio that builds custom apparel collections and online spirit wear stores for youth sports organizations and schools across the United States. Our business model is proven, and we are ready to scale our company and partner with organizations all across the United States.



We are looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant to help us research youth sports clubs and leagues and reach out to them to set up calls (with me) about potential partnerships.



This role is primarily focused on online research, data organization, and
 outreach (initial and follow up
s).



We are looking for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable working with spreadsheets,  internet research, and
 outreach.



Responsibilities



Your daily tasks will include:



• researching youth sports clubs and leagues in the United States

• gathering contact information for club directors, board members or administrators

• organizing leads into a spreadsheet

• estimating club size based on website information

• sending outreach
s using provided templates

• tracking responses and updating outreach status



Example Organizations You Will Research



• youth soccer clubs

• travel baseball organizations

• volleyball clubs

• youth football leagues

• wrestling clubs



Skills We Are Looking For



• strong written English

• good internet research skills

• attention to detail

• experience with Google Sheets or Excel

• ability to follow clear processes



Experience with lead generation or outreach is a plus, but not required.



Work Environment



This is a long-term role with a growing company. It will start at around 15-20 hours per week, but that can quickly grow if you do a good job at making contacts with organizations. 



We are building partnerships with youth sports organizations across the United States, and we are looking for someone who can grow with us as the company expands.



Work Hours: Flexible. 

Preferred availability: 15-20 hours per week to start, but hours could grow quickly if you find success finding the right clubs and helping us sign partnerships.



Application Instructions (Important)



To confirm you read this job description, please include " I love baseball” as the first sentence of your application.



Also include:



Your experience with online research



Your experience with spreadsheets



An example of a research task you have completed



Your experience with
 outreach and outreach funnels



BONUS TASK (not required): Please find three youth soccer clubs in Texas, ideally with over 1,000 kids playing in them, and include their website links in your application.



Thanks so much for your time, we look forward to reviewing your application.

title: Remote Care Coordinator / Operations Virtual Assistant (Home Care Agency)
description:
We are a growing home care agency seeking a reliable and highly organized Virtual Assistant to support our daily operations. This role involves coordinating caregivers (DSPs), assisting with hiring and onboarding, monitoring EVV activity, scheduling visits, managing administrative responsibilities, handling website updates, and accepting new client referrals. The Virtual Assistant will serve as the primary point of contact for caregivers and help ensure smooth communication between staff, members, and management.



Key responsibilities include interviewing caregiver candidates and assisting with the onboarding process while monitoring background checks and required hiring documentation. A minimum of one caregiver hire per week is required. The Virtual Assistant will also assist with matching newly onboarded caregivers with new clients when appropriate.



The role includes managing and monitoring the EVV system (CareBridge), which involves scheduling caregiver visits and reviewing clock-in and clock-out activity. The assistant will identify discrepancies such as late clock-ins or early clock-outs and communicate with caregivers to address and correct these issues while maintaining accurate records.



Client referrals will be forwarded to the Virtual Assistant, who will be responsible for accepting the referral, communicating with the client, and initiating the intake process. This may include coordinating introductions and scheduling meet-and-greet appointments between clients and caregivers.



The assistant will communicate with caregivers at least twice per week to provide updates, reminders, and general information. They will also serve as the first point of contact for caregivers when questions, concerns, or issues arise, and will escalate urgent matters to management when necessary.



Additional responsibilities include scheduling new hires within the CareBridge system, collecting caregiver timesheets and following up on missing submissions, monitoring incoming referrals, and ensuring proper documentation is maintained. The Virtual Assistant will also conduct monthly employee registry checks to maintain compliance and periodically contact members to gather feedback regarding the services they are receiving.



The Virtual Assistant will provide weekly reports to management summarizing hiring progress, caregiver updates, EVV discrepancies, referral activity, member feedback, and any operational concerns.



The ideal candidate is highly organized, communicates clearly and professionally in English, and is comfortable managing multiple responsibilities in a fast-paced environment. The candidate should be proactive, detail-oriented, and consistent in following up on tasks and assignments. Previous experience as a Virtual Assistant, Administrative Assistant, or Operations Coordinator is preferred, and experience working with home care, healthcare, or staffing coordination is considered a strong advantage.

title: HR Executive Assistant to Spa CEO USA
description:
**Location:** Remote www.cloud9.spa

**Employment Type:** Full-Time

Must be dedicated, cannot accept other side jobs or projects, otherwise, please do not apply.



About Us:

We are a rapidly growing chain of family-friendly spas committed to exceptional client experience, employee development, and operational excellence. As we continue to expand, we are seeking a highly experienced and proactive HR Specialist & Executive Assistant to the CEO to support high-level strategic initiatives and drive team success across our multi-location business.



---



### Key Responsibilities



**HR & Team Development** - PRIORITY FOCUS



* Recruit front desk receptionist and spa manager for all locations across the US.

* Assist the CEO in developing and implementing a manager training program tailored for the spa industry.

* Conduct monthly one-on-one meetings with front desk staff and managers to promote professional growth and address operational concerns.

* Review and enhance career development tracks for receptionists and managers.

* Lead quarterly performance reviews for all front desk staff and managers.

* Collaborate in project performance reviews, including tracking milestones and outcomes.



**Strategic Communications & Project Management**



* Communicate major project announcements, updates, and evaluations on behalf of the CEO.

* Support project execution and help ensure follow-through and accountability across departments.

* Manage and enhance online reputation by reviewing customer feedback, drafting responses, and proposing service resolutions.



**Executive Support**



* Manage the CEO’s calendar, travel, and strategic planning needs.

* Conduct business research to support decision-making and strategic initiatives.

* Assist in evaluating completed projects, including effectiveness, team performance, and client impact.

* Provide assistance on special projects and operational improvements across the organization.



---



### Qualifications



* 5–10 years of HR experience in an American business environment, preferably in multi-location operations.

* Proven experience in developing managers, leading teams, and implementing performance management systems.

* Exceptional written and verbal communication skills; must be articulate, persuasive, and detail-oriented.

* Strong project management and organizational abilities.

* Demonstrated success in managing by objectives and driving results.

* High level of discretion, emotional intelligence, and ability to handle confidential information.

* Background in wellness, hospitality, or service-based industries is a plus.



---



What We Offer



* Opportunity to work closely with executive leadership

* Collaborative and mission-driven team environment

* Growth potential in a fast-scaling company



---



How to Apply:

Please submit your resume, a brief cover letter, a self intro video, and some project summaries demonstrating your ability to communicate effectively and manage complex initiatives.

title: Personal Outreach & Scheduling Assistant (Private / Ongoing)
description:
I’m looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented personal assistant to help manage private outreach, profile engagement, screening, and scheduling on my behalf.



This role focuses primarily on managing profiles on select social platforms, handling written communication, and coordinating introductions. It’s ideal for someone with strong judgment, social awareness, and excellent written English.



You will be acting as my representative in digital conversations, so discretion, professionalism, and good taste are extremely important.



This is an ongoing role with consistent weekly hours if it’s a good fit.



Responsibilities



• Manage and maintain personal profiles across select social platforms (guidelines provided)

• Conduct outreach and handle inbound messages on my behalf

• Review and screen responses based on clear criteria

• Maintain organized tracking of conversations and follow-ups

• Identify strong potential connections and flag them for follow-up

• Coordinate scheduling for calls or in-person meetings on my calendar

• Communicate clearly while maintaining a natural, authentic tone

• Provide short summaries and recommendations when helpful



Requirements



• Excellent written English (native or near-native)

• Strong communication instincts and social awareness

• Comfortable representing someone else professionally in digital conversations

• Highly organized and responsive

• Discreet, trustworthy, and respectful of privacy

• Prior experience with inbox management, outreach, social platforms, PR, or assistant work is a plus



Nice to Have



• Experience managing social media inboxes or profile-based platforms

• Background in PR, communications, social media, or executive assistance

• Female candidates preferred (not required) due to tone and perspective of the role

title: Project Architect & Construction Coordinator
description:
We are a US-based architecture, construction, and construction tech startup looking for a highly skilled full-time remote Project Architect or Engineer to join our growing team. This is a critical role that combines technical design production, permit processing, and construction administration.



This is a full-time position with long-term growth potential as our company scales.



**What You'll Do**



Architecture & Design Production

- Produce and manage full construction document sets in Revit

- Work across architectural, structural, and MEP disciplines

- Apply redlines and incorporate design changes accurately and efficiently

- Maintain drawing standards and document quality control



Permitting & Code Compliance

- Prepare and submit permit applications to US city and county agencies

- Communicate directly with building departments on permit status and corrections

- Read, interpret, and apply applicable building codes (IBC, CBC, Title 24, ADA)

- Respond to plan check comments and correction notices



Construction Administration

- Assist with subcontractor outreach and procurement

- Handle subcontractor invoices, pay app tracking, and documentation

- Support RFI and submittal coordination

- General construction project coordination and follow-up



**What We're Looking For**

- Architecture or Engineering license strongly preferred (Philippine PRC license minimum, US license a major plus)

- Expert-level Revit skills — architectural, structural, and MEP

- Experience working with US building codes and permit processes

- Prior experience submitting to US city/county building departments

- Strong written and verbal English communication

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

- Comfortable working independently and managing multiple projects



**Work Hours**

- Full-time position

- Required availability: 10:00am – 7:00pm Pacific Time (PT)

- That is 2:00am – 11:00am Manila time

- Must be online, responsive, and active during these hours

- We use 
 for daily communication, screen sharing, and coordination



**Details**

- Remote, work from home

- Full-time, long-term position

- Rate: open to discussion based on experience

- Payment via EasyPay or Wise

- Opportunity to grow with an early-stage construction tech startup



Please include your resume, portfolio or sample Revit work, your license information, and a brief note and loom video about your experience with US permitting and building codes. Applicants with direct US city permit submission experience will be prioritized.

title: AI Automation & Workflow Builder (n8n / CRM / AI)
description:
About the Role



We are looking for an AI Automation & Workflow Builder to help design and implement automation systems connecting our CRM, AI tools, and productivity tools.



The goal is to reduce manual work and build efficient AI-powered workflows across content production, CRM management, and internal operations.



This is a remote freelance role with the potential for long-term collaboration if the initial projects are successful.



Our Current Tech Stack

Our current systems include:



• n8n (hosted on Hostinger)

• Fireflies for meeting transcription

• GPT and Claude

• Odoo CRM

• Microsoft 365

• OneDrive

Candidates may propose additional tools if they improve the system.



Example Automation Projects



AI Newsletter Automation

Create a workflow that:



• scrapes selected websites

• analyzes and summarizes articles

• generates a newsletter draft using AI

• prepares content to be sent through Odoo

• Add a human review step

• Automate the newsletter submission

The newsletter will be reviewed before being sent.



Meeting Automation

Based on Fireflies transcripts :

• generate meeting summaries in GPT or Claude

• create meeting minutes

• update Odoo contacts and opportunities

• create follow-up activities

 

Meeting Preparation Automation

Build a workflow that prepares a meeting briefing before meetings by collecting information from:

• Odoo CRM

• LinkedIn

• company websites

• Any relevant update on the web

 

Responsibilities

• design automation workflows using n8n

• integrate APIs and webhooks

• process data using JSON

• integrate GPT or Claude into workflows

• automate updates in Odoo CRM

• propose improvements to automation processes

 

Required Skills

• Experience building automation workflows using n8n, Make, Zapier, or similar tools

• Experience integrating APIs and webhooks

• Experience using AI models in workflows (GPT, Claude, etc.)

• Strong problem-solving skills

Python knowledge is helpful but not required.



Application Requirements

Please include the following in your application:



1?? Tools you use (n8n, Make, Zapier, Python, etc.)

2?? Links, screenshots, or diagrams of automation workflows you built

3?? Short explanation of one workflow you created

4?? Your hourly rate

5?? Estimated hours required to build a typical automation workflow



Applications without examples of previous automation work will not be reviewed.



Questions to Answer in Your Application



1. Have you built automation workflows using n8n?

2. Please share examples of workflows you built (links, screenshots, or diagrams).

3. Include the word “Red” in the subject of your application to show your attention to details

4. Have you integrated AI models such as GPT or Claude into automation systems?

5. How would you design a workflow that:

- scrapes news articles

- summarizes them using AI

- prepares a newsletter draft?

6. Please estimate how many hours would be required to build workflows such as:

- newsletter automation

- meeting summary automation

- CRM update automation

title: Senior WooCommerce Product Manager (Gaming)
description:
We are hiring a full-time SENIOR Product Team / Store Manager to manage and expand the product catalogue on our gaming marketplace.



This role focuses on creating new product packs, updating existing listings, researching new games, and optimising our store’s commercial performance.



You will work directly within WordPress and WooCommerce, managing product listings and ensuring our services remain accurate, competitive, and aligned with the latest updates in the games we support.



This is a long-term senior position with consistent full-time work and significant responsibility over how our store’s products are structured and maintained.



This is not a virtual assistant role. We are looking for someone with real experience managing WooCommerce product catalogs and ecommerce stores.



To peruse examples of websites in our niche, check out Overgear(.)com and Skycoach.gg



Core Responsibilities



Product Creation & Management

• Create new product listings and packs within WordPress and WooCommerce

 • Update existing products when games release new content, seasonal updates, or balance changes

 • Maintain accurate product structures, options, and variations

 • Ensure product pages remain organised, clear, and conversion-focused



Game Research & Product Structuring

• Research newly supported games to understand progression systems, items, currencies, and services

 • Structure product packs so they accurately reflect how the game works

 • Ensure listings remain aligned with how services are actually delivered

You will collaborate with professional gamers and suppliers to confirm details, but you must also be able to independently understand the systems over time.



Market & Competitor Research

• Monitor competing websites and marketplaces offering similar services

• Research how competitors structure and price their listings

• Apply this research to improve our own pack structures and commercial positioning

• These are the benchmarks we follow to determine how we should advertise and price our packages.



Product Performance Analysis

• Evaluate the commercial performance of products after release or updates

 • Track objective metrics such as sales performance and conversion rates

 • Identify opportunities to improve listings based on performance data



Store Operations & Coordination

• Work with designers to create product images and visual assets

 • Coordinate with suppliers and pro gamers when packs need updates or changes

 • Ensure listings remain accurate when game updates introduce new content

Examples include:

 • Adding new weapons when they release in a game

 • Updating product structures after seasonal updates

 • Adjusting pricing if supply availability changes



SEO & Content Collaboration

• Write and structure product listings with SEO awareness and strong copywriting

 • Avoid excessive reliance on AI-generated content that could harm search rankings

 • Coordinate with SEO specialists or copywriters who may later propose optimisation improvements

 • Evaluate whether proposed changes are appropriate for the product before approving them



Automation & System Integration

• When new products are created, ensure they are properly connected with internal systems, such as Monday and Zapier. 

 • We will have a technical member who can help with this, but independence in this area is valuable



Requirements (Mandatory)

Applicants must have experience with BOTH:

• WordPress

 • WooCommerce

You must be comfortable managing WooCommerce product listings, product variations, and product pages within WordPress.



Additional requirements:

• Excellent attention to detail

 • Strong research and analytical skills

 • Ability to understand complex systems and structure products clearly

 • Strong written English and copywriting ability. Not reliant on AI, as use of AI when copyrighting can lead to SEO penalties.

 • Ability to work independently and take ownership of projects



You must be able to quickly learn how different games function and translate those systems into product packs.



Bonus Experience (Not required but highly valuable)

• Gaming knowledge or familiarity with popular multiplayer games

 • Ecommerce product management experience

 • Conversion rate optimisation

 • SEO-focused product page writing

 • Experience managing large WooCommerce product catalogues



Work Details

- Full Time, 40 hours per week, $1500-$2000 USD per month 



This is a long-term role with stable work and significant responsibility.



You will be working with a growing gaming marketplace that frequently launches new games, services, and product packs.



How to Apply - Please include the following in your application:

1) Introduction

 A short introduction about yourself and your experience managing ecommerce stores.

2) WordPress & WooCommerce Experience

 Tell us about the websites you have worked on that use WordPress and WooCommerce. Please include:

• The website URL(s)

 • Approximately how many products the store had

 • How many products you personally managed or created

 • What your responsibilities were (creating listings, updating products, managing variations, etc.)

3) Product Catalogue Management Experience

 Describe your experience managing large product catalogues. Please include:

• The largest number of products you have managed on a store

 • How often you created or updated listings

 • Whether you structured product packs, variations, or bundles

4) Research & Analysis Experience

Briefly explain if you have experience researching competitors, analysing product performance, or improving ecommerce listings based on data. Finally, include the word "CACTUS" at the beginning of your application so we know you read the full job description.

title: Full Time Social Media Marketing Expert VA
description:

Social Media Content & Management

 campaigns

title: Workforce Coordinator / HR & Scheduling Virtual Assistant
description:
Enhanced Cleaning is a fast-growing residential and commercial cleaning company based in Western Australia. We are looking for a reliable and highly organised Workforce Coordinator to join our team as a full-time Virtual Assistant.



In this role, you will help manage the day-to-day coordination of our cleaning workforce. This includes assisting with employee onboarding, managing staff schedules, and acting as a communication bridge between our office and field team.



A major part of this role will involve conducting Zoom interviews with job applicants who are applying to work as cleaners. You will be responsible for speaking with candidates on camera, asking interview questions, assessing their suitability for the role, and helping guide them through the hiring process.



Because of this, it’s important that you are comfortable speaking on camera, confident communicating with people, and familiar with using tools such as Zoom for video interviews.



You will also regularly communicate with employees via phone, Slack, and other tools to help resolve scheduling issues, answer questions, and ensure our team is supported and organised.



In addition, you may provide backup phone support for our receptionist when needed, and assist with handling customer calls during periods of high call volume.



This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, proactive, organised, and confident speaking with people both on the phone and on video calls.



The typical working hours for this role are between 8:00 AM and 5:00 PM Perth time (AWST). Perth operates in the same time zone as the Philippines, which makes this role well suited for Filipino applicants.



Responsibilities may include:



- Coordinating employee schedules and managing roster changes

- Conducting Zoom interviews with job applicants before they are hired as cleaners

- Managing onboarding documents and employee records

- Calling employees regarding scheduling, attendance, or operational matters

- Answering employee enquiries and providing support

- Providing backup phone support if our receptionist is unavailable

- Assisting with customer calls during high call volume periods

- Using Jobber to manage schedules, jobs, and workforce coordination

- Communicating with the team through Slack

- Assisting with general HR and administrative tasks

- Maintaining clear communication between management and field staff



Required Skills



- Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken)

- Strong organisation and attention to detail

- Confidence handling phone calls and communicating with staff and customers



Application Instructions

If you apply for this position, please include the following with your application:



- A short video recording of yourself speaking to the camera (1–2 minutes is fine). Please briefly introduce yourself and explain why you believe you would be a good fit for this role.

- A short voice recording so we can hear your speaking and phone communication ability.

- A short explanation of any experience you have with HR, staff scheduling, workforce coordination, or interviewing candidates.

- If you have experience working with service-based businesses (such as cleaning companies, home services, trades, etc.), please mention that as well.



You can also check out our business online to get an idea of who we are and what we do:

title: Cleaning Business Scheduling Manager
description:
*PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DON'T HAVE ANY PREVIOUS EXPERIENCE WITH SCHEDULE/TEAM MANAGEMENT IN A SERVICE-BASED BUSINESS*



We are a fast-growing Australian cleaning company delivering high-quality residential and commercial cleaning services across multiple locations. We operate at a high level and rely heavily on structured scheduling, great communication, and organised systems.

We are looking for a detail-oriented, proactive Scheduling Manager (VA) to join our remote team and take full ownership of weekly job scheduling and admin support.



Role Overview



Your main responsibility is to manage, build, and optimise our cleaning schedule using the tools and systems we provide. You will work directly with our operations manager to ensure cleaners are assigned correctly, client bookings run smoothly, and the weekly roster is fully organised and conflict-free.



This role suits someone who is highly organised, reliable, great at problem-solving, and experienced in scheduling or workforce coordination.





Key Responsibilities



Scheduling & Workforce Coordination (Primary Task)

Build and manage the weekly cleaner schedule using our scheduling platform (Jobber).

Assign cleaners to jobs based on availability, location, skill level, and working hours.

Adjust and update the roster when bookings change or new jobs come in.

Coordinate with office manager and cleaners for confirmations, day-to-day changes, and job updates.

Ensure travel times, job durations, and cleaner workloads are well balanced.

Identify conflicts or gaps in the schedule and resolve them efficiently.

Monitor recurring jobs and make sure they stay on track without missing deadlines.





Admin & Operations Support





Update internal databases (Notion, spreadsheets, CRM, etc.).

Assist with client updates, rescheduling requests, and calendar changes.

Submit end-of-day or weekly schedule reports.

Handle simple customer service tasks 
/text-based only).

Assist with onboarding cleaners (collecting documents, adding to system, creating profiles).

Other light admin tasks as needed.





Requirements





Proven experience in scheduling, workforce coordination, dispatching, or similar administrative roles.

Strong English communication skills (both written and verbal).

Excellent organisation and time-management abilities.

Fast learner with strong attention to detail.

Someone who shows initiative and doesn't need to be micromanaged constantly.



Comfortable working with online tools such as:



Scheduling platforms (Jobber)

Notion

Google Sheets/Excel

Slack 



Ability to work reliably during Australian business hours.

Stable internet connection and backup options.

Highly proactive, takes initiative, and solves problems independently.



Preferred (but not required)



Experience working with cleaning companies, home services, or field service businesses.

Familiarity with recurring job scheduling.

Basic knowledge of Australian regions/time zones.

Experience coordinating staff across multiple locations.



What We Offer



Long-term, stable role with a growing company.

Full-time position with consistent hours.

Opportunities to progress into higher admin or operations roles.

Supportive team, clear training, and easy-to-follow systems.

Performance-based bonuses and pay increases over time.



How to Apply



Please send:

Your updated resume

A brief intro explaining your scheduling experience

Your expected monthly salary (in PHP)

Your availability and preferred working hours

title: Web Graphics Design & Build
description:
An exciting opportunity exists for a Wordpress Builder/Developer in the online marketing and website design industry.

 

This position is suited to someone who loves to work in a team and loves interacting with clients. 



Must have a reliable internet connection and good PC.



Must know WordPress, not just how to spell it, and understand website design.



Must have CSS Knowledge. 



Design skill a bonus.



Must have front end page builder design experience. Ideally experience with our stack below.



Our web build stack is Astra and Beaver Builder (Pro), Ultimate Addon + PowerPack (BB extensions), Gravity Forms



We want someone who has high attention to detail and listens well to instructions.



That starts NOW, if you can't follow the job ad process then you will automatically exclude your application from consideration.



NOTE: Please submit a voice recording explaining why you are the best person for the job.

===============================================================================

Remuneration by agreement

• Permanent Basis (long term)

• 40 hours per week

• Rapidly growing company (Lots of work on its books)

The company is situated in Perth, Western Australia (So same time zone as the Philippines).

MUSTS:

• Good spoken English

• Good written English

===============================================================================

• WordPress Experience

• Prefer Astra/Beaver Builder Experience (or front end page editor)

• Must have CSS Knowledge. 

===============================================================================



We build websites, from business start-ups to sophisticated high level websites.



We have our premium level websites, as well as 3 start-up level websites, and some predesigned ‘turn-key’ niched industry websites.



We have also ‘modulised’ extras such as custom page styles, custom web forms, advanced galleries function, lead generation, etc.



We also do SEO, social media, copywriting, content marketing and most things digital marketing or website related.  

We want a person who understands the true purpose of a website, to convert visitors into enquiries. 

This is a marketing ideas role, requiring good interpersonal skills.



Quite often what happens is a client will make certain edit requests, we want a person that has the gumption to better advise the client based on best marketing practices, to achieve the end game, better conversions, not just a people pleaser or yes person. The end result is we need to respect and honour the client requests, but we need to be the ‘advisors’ to help them be successful online.



===============================================================================

EG: In a recent simple project the client had 3 primary services, hats, shirts and badges. In the design layout and function briefing it was d
 we were to create 3 primary ‘doorway’ buttons on one row on the homepage linking to those product pages. 

The client then requested a 4th button to showcase suppliers.

We could do that, add a 4th button on that one row, no problems.

But, was that a good marketing or design decision? Was it going to be in the client’s best interest?

Should that page have the same priority as the 3 main product pages?

What would your response have been to that client’s request?

===============================================================================



We need a team player, who understands marketing, web design, and has the tech skill sets with our build stack. They must be willing to do Zoo
etings, camera on, with clients and the team. Do not waste your time, or ours, if that is not you.



We have broken the website build process into 10 distinct stages, from project setup and client onboarding right through to design and build and onto quality assurance, a clear ‘go live’ process and handover steps to project completion rap up.



There are 551 specific steps in this process, with the designers focus on Stage 4 of that, ‘The Build’, from the design concepts, mostly following a wireframe layout, to populating content, page styling, setting up and testing the forms, etc.



Really the designer builds the websites following our wireframe layout mostly, although some tight budget projects go straight to design using common-sense ‘doorway’ buttons and site elements.



Software we use:

• Teamwork: For client communication, project management, time tracking.

• Slack for team communication

• Zoom for team and client meetings

• Process St for ALL processes and systems

• Trello for tasking

• RoboForm for password management

• One Drive for all file assets

• WHMCS for client support

• Whimsical for wireframes

• Canva for predesign concepts



What does your day look like?

• Morning check in

• Check
s for project notifications, respond as appropriate 

• Check Trello Board for Priority 1 Tasks, check tasks previously assigned

• Check in with Project Manager

• Liaise with clients as required

• Handle brief questionnaires with project manager, and clients

• Handle layout and function briefings with project manner, and clients

• Check off that process has been adhered to



Here’s the question:

Can you see your existing skills sets being suited to these daily tasks?



The Team:

We have a project manager that checks and feeds all the relative information through

We have a local tech, who handles the phones, helps in support and also does our SEO.

We have a remote tech who handles all the hosting setup, techy stuff, and all things WordPress.

We also have a remote marketing person, who is an Infusionsoft Certified Specialist on the team, who also handles some social media aspects for us.

We also have a remote social media persona that handles all our social posts, and software we use to manage all that.

Then there’s me, I focus on sales, and marketing, networking, love creating new products and services,



So, is that you? Remember, don’t theorise about this!



We need a team player, who understands marketing, web design, and has the tech skill sets with our build stack. They must be willing to do Zoo
etings, camera on, with clients and the team.



Do not waste your time, or ours, if that is not you. We want someone who has high attention to detail and listens well to instructions.



That starts NOW, if you can't follow the job ad process then you will automatically exclude your application from consideration.



NOTE: Please submit a voice recording explaining why you are the best person for the job.

title: Airtable & n8n Developer for Operations System
description:
We run an after-school coding program for kids across Hawaii. We have a fully automated operations system built on Airtable, n8n, and Softr. We need a developer to build new interfaces and maintain/extend our automation workflows.



The system:

- Airtable (20+ tables) — students, programs, sessions, attendance, invoicing, payroll

- n8n (10+ workflows) — enrollment processing, attendance tracking,
 campaigns, invoice generation, payroll calculation, monitoring & alerts

- Softr — teacher and parent portals

- Integrations with Gmail, Slack, QuickBooks, Gusto





What you'll do:

- Build and maintain n8n workflows — new automations, bug fixes, extending existing flows

- Build Airtable Interfaces — dashboards, forms, and operational views for staff

- Improve Softr portal pages for teachers and parents

- Keep system documentation up to date as you build



You'll build:

- Airtable Interfaces — dashboards, filtered views, and forms for staff operations

- Softr portal pages — teacher attendance marking, parent-facing views

- N8N automation workflows (enrollment, attendance, invoicing, payroll, communications)



You need to know how to:

- Build n8n workflows — nodes, connections, expressions, error handling, API integrations

- Build in Airtable — interfaces, formulas, linked records, rollups, views

- Work with relational data across interconnected tables

- Read technical docs and work independently



How we built the system:

title: Pro-Level Sales & Operations Coordinator
description:
Pro-Level Sales & Ops Coordinator (Zoho CRM + Customer/Distributor Support)



Overview

We’re supporting a fast-moving CEO who needs a calm, high-urgency operator to take ownership of sales coordination, CRM hygiene, and customer/distributor responsiveness. This is a 20–30 hours/week role focused on making sure leads don’t slip, follow-ups happen on time, and inbound questions get handled quickly and consistently.

This is best suited for a Pro-level assistant/operator who can manage a small ecosystem of tools, keep workflows organized, and maintain strong written communication with external partners.





Key Outcomes (What “Great” Looks Like)

- Zoho stays current with accurate lead status, last contact date, and clear next steps—so pipeline visibility is reliable.

- No lead goes cold because follow-ups, reminders, and scheduling are handled consistently.

- Customer/distributor inquiries get responses within ~1 business day (often faster when time-sensitive).

- The CEO gets less reactive load because sales ops and customer support processes are running cleanly.



Core Responsibilities

1) Zoho CRM Ownership (Hygiene + Pipeline Visibility)

- Collect lead updates from a traveling/busy sales team and keep Zoho updated consistently

- Maintain clean pipeline stages, accurate contact records, last-touch dates, and next steps

- Flag stalled deals and ensure follow-ups are scheduled and executed



2) Sales Support + Follow-Ups

- Draft/send intro
s, follow-ups, and scheduling communications

- Track follow-ups and build a lightweight system for reminders and next actions

- Coordinate scheduling across stakeholders to keep 
ntum moving



3) Customer & Distributor Support (Repeat FAQs)

- Manage and respond to inbound messages (light volume) including:

- Pricing

- Lead times

- Inventory

- Onboarding steps

- Maintain fast, clear, helpful responses and know when to escalate



4) Scheduling Support

- Support scheduling primarily using Apple Calendar

- Propose or maintain a simple booking workflow (open to cost-effective tools like TidyCal)



5) Internal Coordination + Hand-offs

Own:

- Sales support inbox (quotes, POs, scheduling support)

- Customer support inbox (distributor questions)

- Partner with CFO (billing is handled by CFO), ensuring the CFO receives what she needs on time (clean details, docs, and handoffs)



Tools & Systems (Current Stack)

- Zoho CRM

- 

- QuickBooks

- 

-
 + text

- Travel is generally booked direct; currently testing Capital One Travel



Boundaries / Scope

- CEO will likely continue managing their personal inbox

- This role owns the sales support and customer/distributor support inboxes



Ideal Candidate Profile

You’re a fit if you’re:

- Fast + responsive with customer-facing items (urgency is non-negotiable)

- Organized and consistent with follow-through

- Comfortable owning a CRM and keeping it accurate without being reminded

- Strong in professional, friendly writing for customer/distributor communication

- Confident coordinating schedules and using simple tools to reduce friction

title: Freelance MS SQL Server Database Administrator (DBA)
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled Freelance MS SQL Server Database Administrator (DBA) to support, maintain, and optimize mission-critical SQL Server environments. The ideal candidate will have strong hands-on experience in high availability, disaster recovery, database administration, performance tuning, and production support within complex enterprise environments.



This role requires deep technical expertise in Microsoft SQL Server technologies, with a particular focus on Always On Availability Groups, Database Mirroring, Replication, Linked Servers, Clustered Environments, and T-SQL. Experience with monitoring and observability tools such as SolarWinds and New Relic is also essential.



The selected consultant will be responsible for ensuring database availability, stability, performance, and operational excellence across production systems.







Key Responsibilities



Administer, monitor, and support Microsoft SQL Server databases in production environments



Configure, manage, and troubleshoot Always On Availability Groups



Support and maintain Database Mirroring, Replication, and Linked Server configurations



Work within clustered SQL Server environments to ensure high availability and resiliency



Perform advanced T-SQL scripting, troubleshooting, and performance tuning



Investigate and resolve database performance issues, blocking, deadlocks, failed jobs, and query inefficiencies



Support backup, restore, recovery, and database maintenance activities



Monitor database health and server performance using SolarWinds and New Relic



Participate in root cause analysis and recommend preventive and corrective actions



Ensure database systems are secure, stable, and aligned with operational best practices



Required Technical Skills



Strong experience with Microsoft SQL Server Administration



Expertise in Always On Availability Groups



Hands-on experience with Database Mirroring



Strong knowledge of SQL Server Replication



Experience with Linked Servers



Experience supporting Cluster Environments



Advanced proficiency in T-SQL



Experience with SolarWinds



Experience with New Relic



Preferred Profile



Proven experience supporting complex and business-critical SQL Server environments



Strong analytical and troubleshooting capabilities



Ability to work independently in a freelance or contract capacity



Strong communication skills with the ability to provide clear technical updates



Professional, detail-oriented, and able to respond effectively in operational support scenarios



Engagement Type

Freelance / Contract



Ideal Candidate

We are seeking a hands-on technical professional who can quickly contribute to the stability, performance, and reliability of SQL Server environments while working effectively in a fast-paced and technically demanding environment.



Here is a slightly more premium title option in case you want it to sound more senior:



Senior Freelance MS SQL Server DBA – Always On AG, Replication, Clustering & Performance Tuning

title: Simpro Administration and Bookkeeping for Australian Trade Company
description:
HEG, or Home Efficiency Group, is an Australian rooftop solar, home battery and HVAC sales & installation company that focuses on the Tasmanian residential market. Simpro Enterprise underpins our operations, as well as Xero for accounting, Google Business Suite for office management, Podium for VOIP/chat/text communications and Wordpress for web.



We are experiencing solid growth, which is putting strain on our scheduling and accounts team. Depending on the skills, aptitude and experience that the applicant possesses, these are the main tasks of the position:



1. Assist current scheduling tea
mbers with general solar and battery administration, including liaising with sub-contractors, sales consultants, end customers and energy utility representatives.

2. Assist the Finance and Accounts Manager with AR/AP invoice entry and quality checks to ensure accuracy.

3. Lead entry of customer details, and initial "touch base"
s and text.

4. Updating of Simpro catalogue items and pre-builds when special pricing arises. (Mostly catalogues are automatically imported from our key suppliers.)



Whilst formal bookkeeping qualifications aren't required, they would be highly regarded, but significant exposure to AR/AP is requested.



Are you IT Savvy? AI Automation = bonus!

We have a strong emphasis on automation of repetitive tasks, where possible, to ensure accuracy and to allow tea
mbers to focus on customer-oriented interactions. This may include customer reminders and alerts, for example, or entry of leads, invoices etc automatically. A candidate with AI Automation exposure and IT/software literacy to allow automation of processes would be of value.



About HEG

20 staff, including 2 existing offshore tea
mbers and 3 others that work remotely from home. Based in Tasmania, Australia, established in 2009, flexible working hours with daytime ph hours available. We have 8 different product categories that we sell/install, including reverse cycle air conditioning, ceiling/underfloor insulation, solar, batteries, heat pump hot water and a newly-introduced thermal window furnishings division. Temperatures in Tasmania are cold/temperate, so the emphasis  is on heating down here.



To Apply

Please
 a covering letter or
 to us outlining your skill sets and experiences that outline why you think you'd be suitable for this position, and outline additional skills that you have that may contribute to the company. We really look forward to hearing from you.

title: Appointment Setting Virtual Assistant (Full Time)

We are specifically looking for someone who wants to build a long-term career, take ownership of responsibilities, and eventually help manage systems and other virtual assistants as the company grows.

mber of the team, not just an appointment setter.

mber

title: SEO Content Writer & On-Page Optimizer — Tee Vision Printing
description:
ABOUT US

Tee Vision Printing is a Philadelphia-based custom screen printing company serving businesses, schools, nonprofits, sports teams, and events. We've been operating since 2012 and are in an aggressive growth phase — building out a full SEO and content strategy to become the #1 screen printing brand in the Philadelphia market and beyond.

We have a clear roadmap, a keyword strategy already built, content brief templates ready to use, and a UX/UI designer waiting on content to build pages. We are not starting from scratch — we need someone to execute what's already been planned.

This is a long-term role with real room to grow.



HOW WE WORK — READ THIS FIRST

We use Claude AI as a drafting tool. Your job is NOT to write everything from scratch and it is NOT to copy-paste whatever AI generates. Your job is to:



Fill out our content brief template for each page or blog (keyword, audience, word count, internal links, page goal)

Use the pre-written Claude prompt from the brief to generate a first draft

Edit, optimize, and improve that draft — fix keyword placement, add local Philadelphia context, correct any errors, ensure it matches our brand voice

Verify the SEO is correct — right keywords in the right heading levels, meta title under 60 characters, internal links pointing to the right pages on our actual site

Submit the final version to the business owner for approval, then hand off to our UX/UI designer to build the page



You are the quality control layer between AI output and what goes live on our site. If Claude gets something wrong — a local detail, a keyword in the wrong place, a heading that doesn't match our strategy — you catch it and fix it. This requires you to genuinely understand SEO, not just follow instructions blindly.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

On-Page SEO Optimization (first 30-60 days — highest priority)



Go through our existing pages one by one using our provided keyword map

Write or rewrite meta titles, meta descriptions, H1s, and H2s for each page

Write optimized body copy for new audience and service landing pages

Ensure every page targets the correct primary and secondary keywords without cannibalization

Update internal links across existing blogs so they point to the correct landing pages

Fix existing blog meta titles that are over 60 characters (we have a list ready)



New Page Creation (ongoing)



Write landing page copy for audience pages: education, sports, nonprofits, business, events, and more

Each page follows our hub-and-spoke site architecture — you need to understand how pages connect

All pages go through the brief ? Claude draft ? your edits ? approval ? designer workflow



Blog Content (ongoing)



Write 2-3 SEO-optimized blog posts per week

Topics, keywords, and structure are pre-planned — you execute the brief, not pick your own topics

Each blog targets a specific keyword, audience, and internal linking goal

Blogs are part of our "Wikipedia of printing" strategy — comprehensive, citable, AI-friendly content



Light Outreach Support



Write guest post outreach
s to help secure backlinks (templates provided)

No cold calling, no sales — just written outreach



WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU

Required:



Fluent written English — your writing must be clean, natural, and sound like a real person, not AI

At least 2 years of experience writing SEO content (blogs, landing pages, service pages)

Solid understanding of on-page SEO: keyword placement in titles and headings, meta title character limits, internal linking strategy, avoiding keyword cannibalization

Experience using Claude, ChatGPT, or similar AI tools — and knowing when the output needs fixing

Ability to follow a content brief exactly

Experience writing for US-based businesses or clients

Comfortable using Google Docs and basic CMS platforms



Strongly preferred:



Experience writing landing page copy AND blog content (both, not just one)

Familiarity with hub-and-spoke content architecture

Experience doing outreach
s for link building

Portfolio that includes local service business content (home services, trades, restaurants, professional services, or similar)



Not required:



Experience in screen printing or apparel (we'll train you on the industry)

Technical SEO skills

Design skills

Ahrefs or SEMrush (we provide all keyword data — you don't need to run your own research)





DELIVERABLES (what we expect per week)



2-3 fully optimized blog posts (800-1,500 words each)

2-3 landing page briefs completed, drafted, edited, and submitted

Meta title and description updates for 5-10 existing pages

Internal link updates across existing blogs as new pages go live





COMPENSATION



Full-time (40 hours/week)

Rate: negotiable based on experience — include your expected monthly rate in USD with your application

Long-term role — we are not looking for someone for a one-time project





HOW TO APPLY

Send the following — applications missing any of these four items will not be reviewed:

1. Two writing samples — one blog post AND one landing page or service page. Links or attached documents both fine. Show us you can do both, not just one.

2. Answer this question in 3-5 sentences: You are given a Claude AI draft for a screen printing company landing page. The draft is well-written but the primary keyword "t-shirt printing Philadelphia" only appears in the body copy — not in the H1, H2, or meta title. What do you do?

3. Write a meta title for this page: a screen printing company in Philadelphia targeting the keyword "t-shirt printing Philadelphia." Keep it under 60 characters.

4. Your expected monthly rate in USD.

We read every application and respond to every qualified applicant within 3 business days.



Tee Vision Printing — Philadelphia, PA

We build fast. We ship faster. If you can turn a Figma mockup, a Cursor prompt, and a Supabase schema into a production-ready feature in a single sitting — we want to talk to you.

Work Setup & Compensation

How to Apply

 with the following:

title: Advanced Excel & Google Sheets Specialist
description:

This role is ideal for someone who is exceptionally strong with complex formulas, data modelling, dashboards, and automation, and who enjoys turning raw or fragmented data into clear, structured business intelligence.



You will work directly with the business owner to build spreadsheet systems that connect daily operational data with global reporting dashboards, helping leadership monitor performance across the business.

• Clean, structure and transform datasets for analysis

• Implement visual dashboards for management reporting

• Develop spreadsheet systems that minimise manual work and reduce errors

• Troubleshoot and optimise existing spreadsheets

Advanced Formulas

Array formulas

INDEX / MATCH

XLOOKUP

QUERY

FILTER

Google Sheets automation

Nice to Have (Highly Valued)

• Experience designing business reporting frameworks

title: URGENT: Experienced AU Mortgage Loan Processing Manager (WFH)
description:
URGENT: Experienced AU Mortgage Loan Processing Manager (WFH) 



Company: Premium Select Finance (Australian Mortgage Brokerage) 

Employment Type: Full-time | Work From Home 

Location: Metro Manila preferred, but not required 

Salary: 35,000 – 45,000 php

Start Date: Immediately 



Work Schedule: 

Monday – Friday 

6:00 AM – 3:00 PM Manila Time 

During Australian Daylight Saving Time (DST): 7:00 AM – 4:00 PM Manila Time 



ROLE 



Premium Select Finance is a multi-award-winning Australian mortgage brokerage known for delivering exceptional service and reliable loan solutions to our clients. 



We are looking for an experienced AU Mortgage Loan Processing Manager who can confidently manage the end-to-end loan process, from submission through to settlement and post-settlement. 



This role requires someone who is highly organised, proactive, and confident communicating with clients, lenders, and solicitors via phone and
 to move applications forward efficiently. 



If you have strong experience in Australian mortgage processing and thrive in a fast-paced environment, we would love to hear from you. 



RESPONSIBILITIES 



You will manage the full loan processing lifecycle, including: 



• Processing Australian home loan applications from submission to settlement 

• Submitting and managing applications through Infynity CRM (required), Quickli, AOL, and lender portals 

• Reviewing income for PAYG and self-employed applicants 

• Ordering property valuations and managing lender requirements 

• Coordinating with clients, brokers, lenders, solicitors, and valuers 

• Calling clients to chase required documents or provide loan updates 

• Calling lenders or solicitors to follow up application progress 

• Managing lender forms, supporting documents, and compliance checklists 

• Handling complex scenarios including refinances, discharges, FHOG, top-ups, and SMSF loans 

• Maintaining detailed file notes and application updates in Infynity CRM 

• Ensuring all files meet Australian mortgage compliance standards (NCCP, ASIC, Privacy Act) 



REQUIREMENTS 



To succeed in this role, you must have: 



• 3–5 years experience processing Australian mortgage loans (broker-side preferred) 

• Strong knowledge of loan structures and lender policies 

• Experience using Infynity CRM (required) 

• Experience using Quickli, AOL, and lender portals 

• Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) 

• Confidence making phone calls to clients, lenders, and solicitors 

• Strong attention to detail and organisational skills 

• Ability to manage multiple files and deadlines 

• A stable home office setup and reliable internet connection 



Preferred but not required: 



• Metro Manila based 

• Experience handling complex loan scenarios (SMSF, trusts, investors) 



REWARDS 



Why join Premium Select Finance? 



• Stable long-term WFH opportunity with an Australian brokerage 

• Work with a supportive offshore team and experienced brokers 

• Structured systems and processes to support your success 

• Opportunity to grow within the company 

• Australian public holidays observed (paid) 

• Professional development and training opportunities 



HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT) 



To ensure your application is processed correctly, please follow the steps below. 



Applications sent via message or admin
 will not be reviewed. 



Step 1 



 your CV and a short cover letter to: 




 

CC: 
 



Step 2 



Complete the application form: 



 



Step 3 



Take the DISC personality test: 




/disc-personality-test 



Take a screenshot of your result, upload it to Google Drive, and include the shareable link in your application
. 



Shortlisted applicants will be invited for a final interview with our Director, Lalen. 



About Premium Select Finance 



Premium Select Finance is a people-first Australian mortgage brokerage dedicated to helping clients secure the most suitable loan solutions for their needs. 



We combine deep industry expertise, structured systems, and outstanding service to guide clients from their first enquiry through settlement and beyond.  




 


 

LinkedIn: Premium Select Finance

title: Inbound Sales & Dispatch Specialist
description:
Company: Staff Connect (on behalf of an Australian client)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based applicants only)

Schedule: Rotating shifts between 5:00 PM – 9:00 AM AEDT

Employment Type: Full-Time

Salary: Competitive (based on skills and experience)

Leave: 1 week paid annual leave



About the Opportunity



Our client is Australia’s leading misfuelling response company, providing nationwide emergency assistance to drivers who a
 put the wrong fuel in their vehicle.



When customers call, they’re often stressed and stranded. Your role is to confidently guide them, secure the booking, and coordinate the technician response.



This is more than a dispatcher role — it’s a structured pathway toward leadership. High performers will gradually take on operational oversight and team responsibilities, with the goal of stepping into a Sales Manager / Team Leader position.



Staff Connect is helping build the client’s first offshore team in the Philippines — this is a ground-floor opportunity with real long-term growth.



The Role



You’ll begin in an Inbound Sales & Dispatch position, managing live calls and coordinating technicians across Australia.



As you prove your reliability, sales ability, and leadership potential, you’ll be given expanded responsibilities in operations, quality control, and team support.



Core Responsibilities

Inbound Sales & Job Coordination

- Answer incoming calls from motorists requiring urgent assistance

- Convert enquiries into confirmed bookings using empathy and confidence

- Coordinate nationwide technicians via scheduling platforms

- Secure deposits and accurately log all job details

- Manage cases from first contact through job completion

- Communicate via phone, Gmail, Slack, SMS, and booking systems



Operations & Quality Oversight

- Review previous day’s jobs for accuracy and completion

- Identify and correct unclosed or incorrectly logged jobs

- Ensure jobs are properly transferred to Xero and GeoOp



Monitor call logs for:

- Correct objection tagging

- Accurate ETAs and timestamps

- Proper discount logging

- Missed sales opportunities



- Assist in managing long fleet-related calls for PO numbers

- Track spill kit usage and upload relevant invoices in Xero (creation only)

- Act as a quality control layer to prevent operational errors



Process & Admin Support

- Update internal fleet documents using new templates

- Assist with SOP improvements and documentation updates

- Support onboarding and training initiatives as the team expands



Customer Escalation & Tech Coordination

- Manage escalated customer calls professionally

- Coordinate servo runs and tech card runs

- Participate in Slack huddles (camera-on when required)

- Be an active contributor during live team support sessions



Ideal Candidate

- At least 2 years’ experience in sales, dispatch, or call centre roles

- Strong track record of converting inbound enquiries

- Excellent English communication (written and spoken)

- Calm and composed under pressure

- Highly organised with strong attention to detail

- Confident using Google Workspace, Gmail, and Chrome

- Comfortable with Slack and video calls

- Reliable home setup with stable internet



Highly Regarded:

- Automotive or roadside assistance experience

- Knowledge of Australian geography
