title: Video Editor - Full Time
description:
OR
dia is a digital marketing and creative agency based in regional Victoria, Australia. We work with businesses across a range of industries - including automotive, agriculture, allied health, and more, producing high quality video content, social media campaigns, and web experiences that help brands stand out. We're a small, tight-knit team that moves fast and takes quality seriously.



We're looking for a talented and organised Video Editor to join our team full-time. You'll be responsible for editing and delivering polished video content across a range of clients and platforms - from short-form social reels to longer-form brand content.



Beyond editing, you'll play an active role in content scheduling and project management, using SocialPilot to schedule posts on behalf of our clients and Asana to manage tasks, deadlines, and workflow across the team.

This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow with an agency and take ownership of their work.



What You'll Be Doing



Editing video content for social media (Reels, TikTok, YouTube) and long-form brand use

Colour grading, audio mixing, motion graphics, and captions

Scheduling and publishing content via SocialPilot on behalf of clients

Managing your tasks and deadlines in Asana

Communicating proactively with the team on project status and turnaround times

Adapting edits based on feedback quickly and accurately



What We're Looking For



Proven video editing experience - portfolio or reel required

Proficiency in Premiere Pro and/or DaVinci Resolve and or capcut

Experience with or willingness to learn SocialPilot and Asana

Strong attention to detail and a good eye for pacing, colour, and storytelling

Reliable internet connection and a professional remote setup

Excellent communication - you respond promptly and flag issues early

Self-motivated with the ability to manage your own workload



Bonus Points



Motion graphics skills (After Effects)

Familiarity with
/Instagram ad formats



What We Offer



Full-time, fully remote position

Stable, long-term role with a growing agency

Collaborative team environment with clear processes

Opportunity to take on more responsibility over time



How to Apply

Send your CV, portfolio/reel, and a short note about yourself. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: Social Media Content Creator
description:
Smarcomms is a leading social media management agency with over 1,000 active clients and a team of over 80 talented social media pros, designers, and creators from the Philippines. Our tea
mbers have thrived and grown their careers through our comprehensive training programs, and now we’re looking for more passionate individuals to join our exciting journey. Here’s why you’ll love working with us:



Why Smarcomms?



Enjoy a Flexible Work Environment: We provide a work setting that emphasizes freedom and trust. You won’t find time trackers or micromanagement here—just the autonomy to deliver great work in a supportive atmosphere.



Feel Valued Every Day: We believe in fostering a work environment where every tea
mber feels appreciated and enjoys their job. Your contributions will be recognized and rewarded.



Join a Growing Team: As we expand, so do your opportunities for growth. Start with 20 hours per week and transition to full-time if you desire. The choice is yours!



Your Role: Social Media Content Creator



In this role, you’ll work under the guidance of our Creative Managers and Creative Leader to turn our clients’ social media strategies into engaging, impactful content. Here’s what you’ll do:



Craft Compelling Messages: Develop content that captures attention, evokes emotion, and drives action. Whether it’s text, image, graphic, video, or carousel, your work will resonate with target audiences.



Focus on Outcomes, Not Outputs: Apply the jobs-to-be-done framework to ensure your content meets our clients’ objectives and delivers meaningful results. Your content will align with our clients' goals and resonate with their target audiences.



Functional Design Thinking: Prioritize functionality and user experience over mere aesthetics, ensuring your content is not only visually appealing but also effective in achieving desired outcomes.



Master the Marketing Funnel: Create content for all stages—from awareness (TOFU) to nurturing leads (MOFU) to driving conversions (BOFU).



What We’re Looking For

If you have the following traits, you might be the perfect fit:



Strong command of the English language

3+ years of hands-on experience in a fast-paced, results-driven environment (preferably within an agency)

Excellent time management skills

Proficiency with AI-powered tools like Canva and Hemingway App

A keen understanding of social media performance metrics

Bonus Scheme and Career Progression



Please insert the word 'Zebra' in your application so that we know you have read it in full. 



Earn a $20 bonus for every 5-star review a customer leaves us due to your work.



Enjoy ample opportunities for career advancement as Smarcomms grows.



Requirements



Functioning laptop and fast internet connection



Social media savvy with examples of previous content writing work



How to Apply



If you’re a creative individual who thrives on crafting messages that inspire action and drive results, we’d love to have you on our team. Join us in our mission to help our clients succeed through powerful, performance-driven social media content.



Apply using the form below and let’s make an impact together!





Smarcomms is an Equal Opportunity Employer and welcomes applicants from any national origin, race, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability status, or any other characteristic that makes you unique. We are committed to fostering an inclusive environment where all tea
mbers feel valued and empowered.

title: Freelance SEO - MUST HAVE SG Experience
description:
Company Overview – 338aircon.sg



338aircon.sg is a Singapore-based air-conditioning service provider specializing in installation, servicing, repair, and maintenance for residential and commercial properties. Operating in Singapore’s highly competitive home improvement market, the company is focused on building strong organic visibility, dominating local search results, and ranking **Top 3 for high-intent home improvement keywords in Singapore**.



This is a long-term role for an SEO professional who deeply understands the Singapore market and can consistently deliver measurable organic growth.



---



Role Objective



Your primary goal is to rank our business in the Top 3 Google search results for priority Singapore home improvement and aircon-related keywords, driving qualified leads and sustainable organic traffic.



Only candidates with proven Singapore SEO experience will be considered.



---



Key Responsibilities



* Develop and execute SEO strategies **specifically targeting the Singapore market**

* Conduct **Singapore-focused keyword research** (local intent, service-based searches)

* Optimize website content, landing pages, and service pages for conversions

* Perform technical SEO audits and coordinate fixes with developers

* Build **high-quality, locally relevant backlinks** within the home improvement industry

* Manage and optimize **Google Search Console & Google Analytics**

* Optimize **Google Business Profile** for Singapore local SEO dominance

* Track rankings, traffic, and conversions; deliver **monthly performance reports**

* Recommend content strategies aligned with **Singapore search intent and buyer behavior**



---



Requirements (Strict)



* **Minimum 2–3 years proven SEO experience**

* **Direct, hands-on experience handling a Singapore-based company (REQUIRED)**

* Strong understanding of **local SEO in Singapore**

* Solid experience in **on-page, off-page, and technical SEO**

* Proficiency with SEO tools

* Ability to analyze data and translate it into **actionable strategies**

* Strong written English skills



---



Strong Advantages

* Experience in **home improvement, renovation, aircon, property, or service-based industries**

* Proven success ranking businesses in **competitive Singapore local markets**

* Familiarity with **Singapore consumer behavior and search patterns**

* Basic knowledge of **conversion rate optimization (CRO)**



---



Compensation



* **Competitive salary** (based on experience and results)

* **Long-term engagement** with performance-based growth opportunities



---



How to Apply



Please submit the following:



1. **Updated resume**

2. **Portfolio or case studies** of Singapore-based SEO projects

3. **Sample results** (ranking improvements, traffic growth, lead generation)

4. **Expected monthly salary (in PHP)**

5. A brief outline of your SEO strategy for a Singapore home improvement company aiming for Top 3 rankings



---



**Important Notice**

**Only applicants with verified Singapore market SEO experience will be considered.**



We are looking for a **results-driven SEO professional** ready to grow long-term with **338 Aircon SG** and our partner brands.

title: Writer (English)
description:

Job Description:



Research and write news stories, articles, and features for publication.

Ensure accuracy, clarity, and adherence to house style and tone.

title: Online English Teachers (Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Automation & Technical Operations Assistant (Zapier, QA)
description:
We are hiring a Part-Time Automation & Technical Operations Assistant to help maintain and improve the automation systems and integrations that power our gaming marketplace.



This role focuses primarily on automation management, technical troubleshooting, and QA testing, helping ensure our internal systems, integrations, and development projects run smoothly.



You will work closely with our internal team and developers, assisting with automation maintenance, testing new features, troubleshooting issues, and helping coordinate technical tasks across the business.



This is a long-term role starting part-time, with the opportunity to grow as our technical operations expand.



Responsibilities



Automation Management (Zapier)

• Monitor and troubleshoot Zapier automations when issues occur

 • Maintain and update existing Zapier workflows as products and processes change

 • Build new automation flows when needed

 • Ensure integrations between platforms continue working correctly

Examples of systems you may work with include:

• Zapier + Monday CRM

 • Zapier + WordPress / WooCommerce

 • Zapier + SendGrid

 • Zapier +
 notifications

 • AI by Zapier automations



Technical QA & Testing

• Test new features and updates implemented by developers

 • Identify bugs, inconsistencies, or workflow issues

 • Document problems clearly and report them to developers

 • Verify that issues have been properly resolved after fixes are deployed

Examples include testing:

• new marketplace features

 • seller dashboards

 • WooCommerce functionality

 • custom user role permissions

 • integrations between systems



Developer & Support Coordination

• Communicate with developers to track progress on development tasks

 • Help test and validate new changes before they go live

 • Report bugs or technical issues to developers and follow up on fixes

 • Communicate with external support teams when necessary (WordPress, WooCommerce, WPVIP, etc.)



Technical Operations Support

• Assist with maintaining integrations between different systems and platforms

 • Help manage technical accounts such as Google Workspace when needed

 • Assist with troubleshooting website or system issues

 • Provide general technical assistance across internal tools



Issue Tracking & Technical Communication

This role requires strong organizational and communication skills when working with developers and technical support teams.

You should be able to:

• Build and maintain clear systems for tracking issues, development tasks, and ongoing projects

 • Track multiple moving parts across automation workflows, development updates, and support threads

 • Maintain structured documentation so issues and progress are easy to follow

When reporting issues or feedback, communication must be clear, concise, and systematic.

This includes:

• Providing detailed explanations of issues

 • Including screenshots, recordings, or step-by-step examples when necessary

 • Clearly explaining how a bug occurred and how it can be reproduced

Because developer time is expensive, feedback should always be specific and well-structured to avoid unnecessary back-and-forth or miscommunication.

Strong candidates will be able to communicate technical problems efficiently and clearly, helping development tasks move forward quickly without repeated clarification.



Communication & Coordination

You will regularly communicate with our team and developers using:

•

 • Slack

 • D(i)scord

Clear communication and structured reporting are important for this role.



Requirements (Mandatory)

• Experience using Zapier

 • Strong troubleshooting and logical problem-solving ability

 • Excellent attention to detail

 • Ability to clearly document and explain technical issues

 • You must be highly organized and capable of creating your own systems for tracking tasks, issues, and development updates.

You should be comfortable understanding how different systems connect and interact with each other.



Preferred Experience (Not required but helpful)

• WordPress or WooCommerce familiarity

 • CRM systems such as 

 • Automation platforms or integrations

 • QA testing or software testing experience

 • Basic understanding of APIs or system integrations



How to Apply

Please include the following:

1) Introduction

A short introduction about yourself and your technical or automation experience.

2) Zapier Experience

Describe your experience with Zapier, including:

• automations you have built

 • systems you have connected

 • examples of troubleshooting issues

3) Example

Please describe one automation workflow you created or maintained, including:
